name: GOP Battleground Fund
subject: The clock is ticking
body:
April 1st is rapidly approaching.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, right now the future of our nation hangs in the balance.
Two special elections for control of **FL-01** and **FL-06** will conclude _**just weeks away on April 1st**_ , and the Democrats are salivating at the chance to snatch these House seats from us.
This is the Left’s first opportunity to give President Trump and our GOP House majority a defeat at the ballot box since last year’s historic election.
That’s why liberal donors have poured in millions of dollars to chip away at what is already **the slimmest House majority in nearly a century**.
If they succeed, everything we’ve fought for, everything that President Trump and House Republicans have promised the American people, will be slowed down and obstructed by House Democrats.
We cannot afford to waste time during Trump’s second term slowly pushing our America First agenda through congressional deadlock.
**_[We need to send a message that Americans support President Trump and they voted for a Congress that would help him deliver his agenda](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!**
[DEFEND TRUMP’S AGENDA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and their cronies are ready to pounce. They know as well as we do what is on the line if the current GOP majority is reduced.

Here’s the cold hard truth, they may not be able to beat President Trump but******if we give them an inch they can make it nearly impossible to pass Trump’s policies into law****.**

Every piece of legislation Republicans propose to _**secure our borders**_ ,**__**_**cut taxes**_ , _**promote energy independence**_ , and **_restore law and order_** will be stalled or and may be completely gutted by the time it gets through the House.

Our America First GOP nominees, **Jimmy Patronis** and **Randy Fine** , are conservative fighters who will stand with President Trump and help deliver Agenda 47 if they win.

It is clear that we cannot afford to drop the ball in Florida yet Democrats are already putting their campaign war chest to use in the Sunshine State against our party’s nominees by ___**flooding the airwaves and mobilizing their base**_.

Both congressional districts up for grabs voted Republican last November but they are hoping that conservatives overlook these races and don’t contribute the necessary resources to hold the line.****
**Democrat donors are all in because they are betting that MAGA conservatives aren’t taking these races seriously and won’t fight back.****__**
**_[Let’s prove them wrong>>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****__**
[HOLD THE LINE IN FLORIDA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**The House GOP Battleground Fund** was created to ensure that conservatives fighting to defend the House have the resources they need to stay in the fight.
Friend, with the support of patriots from across the nation our team was able to help deliver victory in crucial battleground races that delivered a GOP House majority!
**We know we can make a difference because we have done it before.**
Now we need to do it again because the fight to save our country from the Left is not over and our hard-won majority is at risk of being chipped away.
_**[Please stand with us today by rushing a contribution of whatever you can at this time to help make sure that conservative operatives in this fight have the needed funds to DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
[SUPPORT THE HOUSE GOP BATTLEGROUND FUND](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ab8B/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Thank you for you time and your continued support of our team and the America First movement. It is because of you that we are able to continue fighting to save America.

clean_body: April 1st is rapidly approaching. | | | | Fellow patriot, right now the future of our nation hangs in the balance. Two special elections for control of FL-01 and FL-06 will conclude just weeks away on April 1st , and the Democrats are salivating at the chance to snatch these House seats from us. This is the Left’s first opportunity to give President Trump and our GOP House majority a defeat at the ballot box since last year’s historic election. That’s why liberal donors have poured in millions of dollars to chip away at what is already the slimmest House majority in nearly a century. If they succeed, everything we’ve fought for, everything that President Trump and House Republicans have promised the American people, will be slowed down and obstructed by House Democrats. We cannot afford to waste time during Trump’s second term slowly pushing our America First agenda through congressional deadlock. ! Friend, Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and their cronies are ready to pounce. They know as well as we do what is on the line if the current GOP majority is reduced. Here’s the cold hard truth, they may not be able to beat President Trump but****if we give them an inch they can make it nearly impossible to pass Trump’s policies into law. Every piece of legislation Republicans propose to secure our borders ,_cut taxes , promote energy independence , and restore law and order will be stalled or and may be completely gutted by the time it gets through the House. Our America First GOP nominees, Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine , are conservative fighters who will stand with President Trump and help deliver Agenda 47 if they win. It is clear that we cannot afford to drop the ball in Florida yet Democrats are already putting their campaign war chest to use in the Sunshine State against our party’s nominees by _flooding the airwaves and mobilizing their base. Both congressional districts up for grabs voted Republican last November but they are hoping that conservatives overlook these races and don’t contribute the necessary resources to hold the line.** Democrat donors are all in because they are betting that MAGA conservatives aren’t taking these races seriously and won’t fight back.** _ The House GOP Battleground Fund was created to ensure that conservatives fighting to defend the House have the resources they need to stay in the fight. Friend, with the support of patriots from across the nation our team was able to help deliver victory in crucial battleground races that delivered a GOP House majority! We know we can make a difference because we have done it before. Now we need to do it again because the fight to save our country from the Left is not over and our hard-won majority is at risk of being chipped away. . Thank you for you time and your continued support of our team and the America First movement. It is because of you that we are able to continue fighting to save America. | | | | | | | | | | | | | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: GOP Alerts
subject: The Left is panicking over Trump’s tax cuts—Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
“In this world nothing can be said to be certain, except death and taxes.”

| | | Peter,

President Trump’s **bold tax plan** is ready to go–and it’s precisely what Americans need to take our country back. He’s locking in the 2017 tax cuts, cutting corporate taxes even more, and putting tariffs on foreign goods to protect American workers.

The radical left is terrified. They see this as a direct threat to their pocketbooks. **They’ll stop at nothing to undermine President Trump’s agenda and destroy the progress we’ve made.** But we can’t let that happen. The more we stand united behind this plan, the more power we give President Trump to fight for everyday Americans.

GOP leaders need to hear from YOU. Do you stand with President Trump’s tax plan? [**We need your answer NOW.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._5nXelWCh8DFrCt6fBTYA)

name: The Flyover
subject: The Flyover Turns 2, NCAA Brackets, and $50 Million Tea
body:
Two years ago today, the first national edition of _The Flyover_ was delivered to 47 people.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z81qtDAUxvGrSXYjJyeJ0UUW70tJN7UfUBjoRqIm42mjDpqOzN0Xu-_-9zzwPzdt4ynRfHn2U7A5Li0C6hPIkzDt4CndW8UHG0PAIHmwwihE0GWNfLTGawTfd15IFevOSNDK1FHpoCqoKs3JHm8ghREAAnXRKa9DrLWPPla97pmCMFBe1uJzoTmPIab7cgtr0S8TT3bM-box-Y-hY-j2fS_2tf-iuUvpEAwdPopKiDcsGbqn1_N_bD4OLN323QkmH97dC1_tcN0pJdpKwxRcJk-_c57_Cr5Z_AkAAP__ItZUcw) | |
# Monday, March 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 2023, _The Flyover_ launched as a national news publication. [Here's the inaugural edition. ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngc3RcQfGHhi6eEvXjhYGLr4Kx5GDUvntq3atuv_6pP_jOl-jVLnf3uNWQuN9RkDXAXXGzzlKPWerc-BSsJAuwXiLCK4fUa8hW-ptPzKxJ-cGAz0B2zwstCQPmLSEHw3IeANg0F0WG13h0UWOPCSXlIWSpe3H5XOXe1sL13N_leOS9k3XsLb2eCp6UzgpnP4mCic-JMez2-KR1s74DgFJ4aSPkB9fUqs8e68s3LYo9Vdt_12-An4HAAD__yFRUwg) Today marks _The Flyover's_ second anniversary! We sent our very first national issue on March 17, 2023, and never turned off the afterburners. Over 2 million Americans take off with us every morning, and we're honored to have you aboard.

Later today you'll receive a special note from our founder recounting our journey. In the meantime, please enjoy today's top story about our growth from an idea to one of America's largest and fastest growing news organizations—thanks to you! Check it out below. Today's sponsor is [BrightMeds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z81qtDAUxvGrSXYjJyeJ0UUW70tJN7UfUBjoRqIm42mjDpqOzN0Xu-_-9zzwPzdt4ynRfHn2U7A5Li0C6hPIkzDt4CndW8UHG0PAIHmwwihE0GWNfLTGawTfd15IFevOSNDK1FHpoCqoKs3JHm8ghREAAnXRKa9DrLWPPla97pmCMFBe1uJzoTmPIab7cgtr0S8TT3bM-box-Y-hY-j2fS_2tf-iuUvpEAwdPopKiDcsGbqn1_N_bD4OLN323QkmH97dC1_tcN0pJdpKwxRcJk-_c57_Cr5Z_AkAAP__ItZUcw), offering discounted semaglutides to help you start your weight loss journey.
|

## _The Flyover_ Celebrates 2nd Anniversary
Two years ago today, the first national edition of _The Flyover_ was delivered to 47 people. Our writing, editing, and proofreading staff consisted of just one person, Cole. Today, 10 editions of _The Flyover_ reach more than 2.1 million readers daily, and we have a full team of writers, editors, and proofreaders across the country—along with sales, technology, and customer support staff.

We've learned a lot in two years, but as [you can see in our first edition](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngc3RcQfGHhi6eEvXjhYGLr4Kx5GDUvntq3atuv_6pP_jOl-jVLnf3uNWQuN9RkDXAXXGzzlKPWerc-BSsJAuwXiLCK4fUa8hW-ptPzKxJ-cGAz0B2zwstCQPmLSEHw3IeANg0F0WG13h0UWOPCSXlIWSpe3H5XOXe1sL13N_leOS9k3XsLb2eCp6UzgpnP4mCic-JMez2-KR1s74DgFJ4aSPkB9fUqs8e68s3LYo9Vdt_12-An4HAAD__yFRUwg)—the goal has always been to cover the day’s news in a direct and unbiased way.

In 2024, we added our _Rotator_ section (take the poll below to let us know your favorite!) along with our special coverage section (_Olympics, Election, Holiday_ , etc). We also listened closely to your feedback, and we worked hard to improve our news coverage.

Growth brought new opportunities. Texas got the first _Flyover_ state edition in January, 2024, and that’s grown to over 300,000 readers. Since then, we've added eight more state editions.

_The Flyover's_ success is due to you, our readers, and we can't thank you enough for sticking with us.

We've got big plans for year three—including new state editions and a big new project that you'll hear more about soon. (Hint: it's a podcast )

If you like _The Flyover_ and find value and appreciate our work—we would love for you to support us financially if you can. We know everyone isn't able, but your financial support means a lot to us. [You can do that by clicking here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u7CAUBOCngc7W4WCwXVDcxt3eNqXFz2EhwsayyUb79tFGKdKkHc180rzd1pvNJe_3_3Yj02JdEVB1IDsxrsHm8lwHHkwkQpKcjBgHRFB6Rp7M7CWQHp2enJYyaJjcHKR0oL2z3guezUsDKUYBIFD1brCK4qxstHHyyrMBKORWz_695r0liuVZH3T2vm68mNTacTH5j-HCcLnIf5zU251Cba8Gw6Ul6n42DJdE5eh-Rfw04fjMpeRLj2yA-2Zz-bbbX18fBr8CAAD__wohV3Y). ## U.S. Strikes Houthis in Yemen
The U.S. launched multiple, wide-ranging military strikes against [Houthi targets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpCAURn8Ndhi4io4FhVvYzZa7yTaGlYve9xAmgEPm37_M61_1FV9ycnL-3te7IU9h_21O1MXFFQQoLjoux9Ua8q-1b6x2iIBdg1qOPYBQwwTNocduE-M0WXGTYnQOHFg12AHkbbPSOdWQftNEJ0cphATV_u-NQjcp44y7bWpjvUBLJab2I1IoBzr_ik9M7RbPxuujlEdm3cxgYbDUWtszh_fHYMHAr8xgCVjfU2PylsFyZb7FYK-tZF7JIk8m7BR2nkuiT8zc7IZCLrwcyI94lYMyp8BfeGJgsJjE51nO_5Y_v5qk7aOS95SHkfViPw35b7PyU6mnhq8AAAD__9IHbH4) in Yemen on Saturday, killing at least 31 and wounding 101, according to reports. President Trump indicated that the strikes—the most extensive in Yemen since he took office— were just the beginning, and that the U.S. would use "[overwhelming lethal force](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQBp_GdEZmsc--wkUaukubEhmzwCbmR_Zy6N4-uvTpPumTZqT5evSPQIm2-TOs6Hnae1BgpGplY_sxUHr1uhr9hAjYVugbqwGUud2hWrzDOAz3Npo2uiGAdta5IVrdwOgs4liRf9NU29hGqQZMPehgcLqbMIXJRROFVjgS77n-3mnjBaf02p-Y67ivVfIL81FE-yGgE9Bd11XHoWx4lfcvoHtPAd0pi0zh3OKCRa5nYjoSysKZfrDIMAfaCstlP3khySHPyEVyPtdDQFdlPx4XpUTlZoVW8xoo_fn5vx5PD78BAAD__xtjZW0)" until Houthi shipping attacks stopped. Plans for the attack reportedly accelerated after Houthis shot down a U.S. military drone two weeks ago and in the wake of President Trump re-designating the Houthis as a terrorist organization. A Houthi spokesman responded to the strikes by vowing “[more escalation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfgzcseBgTDwxdvKVrR-sFHjEtMREQW_n3lbt3O-mTTqf7ui5XjClu9098kG0hLyBAc6G4NIvHmN7L0HkbiIBUR1aaAUDocYJutdqP6CZFl4tWAEG6YIJWbhRee6PRdNGebUJJI4WQoPvbgJrCpDFguDjt2CDIx5ZL_53j1lYK6Z13Kr3Ljy7ZtbVnZeqDwcxgPo6j325uo6OezmA-4wm5JM9gXvOrrbHyPR-8UMMUsRF_VV5biT9UuSdsK285JV7chnIaR6G7Yv3ziCnFOho2iPsDY_ob0P47ZLfwGwAA___gBWRS)” from the Iranian-backed rebels.

clean_body: Two years ago today, the first national edition of The Flyover was delivered to 47 people. | | | | | | Monday, March 17, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 2023, The Flyover launched as a national news publication. Today marks The Flyover's second anniversary! We sent our very first national issue on March 17, 2023, and never turned off the afterburners. Over 2 million Americans take off with us every morning, and we're honored to have you aboard. Later today you'll receive a special note from our founder recounting our journey. In the meantime, please enjoy today's top story about our growth from an idea to one of America's largest and fastest growing news organizations—thanks to you! Check it out below. Today's sponsor is , offering discounted semaglutides to help you start your weight loss journey. | The Flyover Celebrates 2nd Anniversary Two years ago today, the first national edition of The Flyover was delivered to 47 people. Our writing, editing, and proofreading staff consisted of just one person, Cole. Today, 10 editions of The Flyover reach more than 2.1 million readers daily, and we have a full team of writers, editors, and proofreaders across the country—along with sales, technology, and customer support staff. We've learned a lot in two years, but as —the goal has always been to cover the day’s news in a direct and unbiased way. In 2024, we added our Rotator section (take the poll below to let us know your favorite!) along with our special coverage section (Olympics, Election, Holiday , etc). We also listened closely to your feedback, and we worked hard to improve our news coverage. Growth brought new opportunities. Texas got the first Flyover state edition in January, 2024, and that’s grown to over 300,000 readers. Since then, we've added eight more state editions. The Flyover's success is due to you, our readers, and we can't thank you enough for sticking with us. We've got big plans for year three—including new state editions and a big new project that you'll hear more about soon. (Hint: it's a podcast ) If you like The Flyover and find value and appreciate our work—we would love for you to support us financially if you can. We know everyone isn't able, but your financial support means a lot to us. . It's a huge help! U.S. Strikes Houthis in Yemen The U.S. launched multiple, wide-ranging military strikes against in Yemen on Saturday, killing at least 31 and wounding 101, according to reports. President Trump indicated that the strikes—the most extensive in Yemen since he took office— were just the beginning, and that the U.S. would use "" until Houthi shipping attacks stopped. Plans for the attack reportedly accelerated after Houthis shot down a U.S. military drone two weeks ago and in the wake of President Trump re-designating the Houthis as a terrorist organization. A Houthi spokesman responded to the strikes by vowing “” from the Iranian-backed rebels. March Madness Brackets Set Let the games begin! The NCAA March Madness brackets were set Sunday with claiming the No. 1 seeds for the men’s tournament. For the women's tournament, were selected as the top seeds. The SEC conference with 14 of its total 16 teams selected for the men’s NCAA Tournament. Only South Carolina and LSU were left out. The first four play-in games for both tournaments are slated for Tuesday and Wednesday, and the tournament’s first round contests will kick off Thursday. () ➤ Russia and Ukraine traded large-scale overnight drone attacks this weekend, less than a day after Russian President Vladimir Putin met with a U.S. envoy to discuss a possible cease-fire. () ➤ A power grid failure in Cuba has left millions of people without electricity on the island, the fourth such blackout in the past six months. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Organize Your Life & Protect Your Legacy — In 1 Box! helps you easily organize all of your important accounts, possessions, policies, government documents, estate plans and more! | ➤ A California man was awarded $50 million by a jury after suing Starbucks for serving scalding hot tea at a drive-through that then spilled in his lap. () ➤ A police officer in Bradenton, Fla., had to step in to deliver a pizza to protect the delivery driver from an alligator blocking his path to the house. () ➤ ESA Doctors, an emotional support animal service, is looking to award $1,000 to a “Chief of Pet Flicks” who would watch five animal movies for them. () | What's your favorite rotating section of The Flyover? 1. 2. 3. 4. 5. Yesterday's Results: Do you prefer a big breakfast or a big dinner? 1. Breakfast: 39% 2. Dinner: 30% 3. Neither: 22% 4. Both: 9% | | Daily Quote | "Two years ago today, we launched The Flyover with a simple vision: to create a trustworthy, comprehensive morning news source—free from political agendas and media bias.” — Guy Short, founder of The Flyover | Today's Trivia On a typical day, what's the most clicked feature in The Flyover? | (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. | ---|---

name: Josh Weil
subject: Ron Desantis didn't expect us.
body:
That was his first mistake. Now we need to capitalize on it.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wt3ms-vombag-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Ron Desantis Didn't Expect Us**
---
| | | | friend, We aced our first test: We WON the Democratic primary in January, but now its on to April where we MUST take down Trump’s hand-picked crony. Gov. Ron DeSantis purposely set this special election on a tightly compressed timeline—only 4 months from start to finish—so that grassroots Democratic campaigns like ours would have significantly less time to fundraise and organize. **_But DeSantis underestimated the strength, resolve, and resilience of Americans from across the country coming together to fight back._** He didn't expect us to be able to build a strong, well-funded campaign that can win. Together, we have done just that—thousands of people like yourself have answered the call. **Our fundraising is what is keeping us afloat in this race—but only if we can count on thousands more supporters to give whatever they can by the end of the day**. [**_Will you split $5, $10, or whatever you can with No Dem Left Behind and our campaign to help us exceed our goals and start this general election contest strong and ready to defeat Trump's handpicked MAGA lackey?_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wt3ms-vombah-kyd76rh2/)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: The Flyover Turns Two, Weekend Wildfires, and Juice Box Graffiti
body:
Two years ago today, the first national edition of The Flyover was delivered to 47 people.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71qwzAUxfGnkbYY3SvLsgcNhaB2cUshkG5Gn7GoHAdbjZO3L-7e_XcO_M_90JuU0_XybqagyiPOAzIUB8YPIAdvUn4ONfXKMt8BDQpkjcg6bJGOCo0DcB2wKGQjRZAWbeQ-NIIFYQ2nSe1njIMEJiTnVQfRQXQsRFnbRiKpWfCpzEtVxlDCw6wxP-d7WCo3TzSrsZTbSvgLQU1Qb9tWbYv7Tleb8y4IanyFFuATG4L6BMfzW9vvmOv1xwLhx9OX_qCL8rct5ZzWRpKaXSaT_va0_Jt8V_gbAAD__0bBVZ0) | |
# Monday, March 17, 2025
---|---
**Happy St. Patrick's Day!** On this day in 1855, the [first law school in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAUheGngU7D3iCMBcVt7Oa2pzQgGyVBmSgZx7c_cfpT_dX6kvXzHJ8u5bTN_91Ktn5iGVFg1wjZgBmDS_kaFQ_Wi9ADJwtGIYoeH8gXC30MAoRUXkofqCPtphi8fngDunPAk70xIcGA6IyUbQ9xgjgJikZ5bZApQSHVsrd1oUofd8R8lTft7VRWnu1S6-tg8h_DgeFwnmdbj8WVLaeN2rLPDIfvqgnuavx1h-FAW93vKt3x3YbXmXJOhzZMiXl1KX_x-ufbt8XfAAAA__-ralcz) was established at Austin College in Huntsville. The liberal arts college was incorporated in 1849 and moved to Sherman in 1876. Today marks _The Flyover's _second anniversary! We sent our very first national issue on March 17, 2023, and never turned off the afterburners. Over 2 million Americans take off with us every morning, including those in Texas, and we're honored to have you aboard.

Later today, you'll receive a special note from our founder. In the meantime, please enjoy today's top story about our journey from an idea to one of America's largest and fastest-growing news organizations--thanks to you! Check it out below. We're sponsored today by [Audien Atom Hearing Aids](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71qwzAUxfGnkbYY3SvLsgcNhaB2cUshkG5Gn7GoHAdbjZO3L-7e_XcO_M_90JuU0_XybqagyiPOAzIUB8YPIAdvUn4ONfXKMt8BDQpkjcg6bJGOCo0DcB2wKGQjRZAWbeQ-NIIFYQ2nSe1njIMEJiTnVQfRQXQsRFnbRiKpWfCpzEtVxlDCw6wxP-d7WCo3TzSrsZTbSvgLQU1Qb9tWbYv7Tleb8y4IanyFFuATG4L6BMfzW9vvmOv1xwLhx9OX_qCL8rct5ZzWRpKaXSaT_va0_Jt8V_gbAAD__0bBVZ0), offering affordable hearing aids with crystal clear sound.
* * *
Abilene ⛅ 84/44° | Amarillo ☁️ 81/43° | Austin ⛅ 83/44° | Brownsville ⛅ 84/56° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 82/55° | DFW 🌤️ 80/47° | El Paso ☁️ 86/39° | Houston ⛅ 80/52° | Laredo ⛅ 89/50° | Lubbock 🌥️ 83/44° | Midland ⛅ 83/46° | San Antonio ⛅ 85/42° | Tyler 🌤️ 78/42° | Waco ⛅ 82/43°
|
---
## _The Flyover_ Celebrates 2nd Anniversary
Two years ago today, the first national edition of _The Flyover_ was delivered to 47 people. Our writing, editing, and proofreading staff consisted of just one person, Cole. Today, ten editions of _The Flyover _reach more than 2.1 million readers daily, and we have a full team of writers, editors, and proofreaders across the country--along with sales, technology, and customer support staff.

We've learned a lot in two years, but as [you can see in our first edition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngc3WcdjGDAxdvKVrR4uYI1yFQ4RRGr991U5duv_6pP_jsl48Z77f3v1Orr1iWRFw7EB3yqzBcz7XQQZ3hWCVJKfMgAgWZ5TJRcLRwzzNxqOFSQWyABC13fSsbQyS3Q8GWhkFo9G6typuKm5A0QzXyaAYgAK3UvuWqNHLHzGf5Um138ous0utPQ6h3wQuApfPwveW6E8icImVgz-73dctdcp0CKgFLrK68PjinPmYjBjgtnvOv2r7d_Pp8DsAAP__oGRTgA)--the goal has always been to cover the day's news in a direct and unbiased way.

In 2024, we added our _Rotator_ section along with our special coverage section (_Olympics, Election, Holiday_ , etc). We also listened closely to your feedback, and we worked hard to improve our news coverage.

Growth brought new opportunities. Here in Texas, we got the first _Flyover _state edition in January 2024, and _The Texas Flyover_ has now grown to over 300,000 readers. Since then, we've added eight more state editions.

_The Flyover's_ success is due to you, our readers, and we can't thank you enough for sticking with us.

We've got big plans for year three--including new state editions and a big new project that you'll hear more about soon. (Hint: it's a podcast. )

If you like _The Flyover_ and find value and appreciate our work--we would love for you to support us financially if you can. We know everyone isn't able, but your financial support means a lot to us. [You can do that by clicking here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvgzAQBeBfY2-gu7ODw-ChC1u6dkTGdw6WTEDgpsm_r1J16NL16b1Peh-X8RJyybfre1jE10daRwI6NWAadCOHXJ6j1ewn4B61eHSWCHo6k549mg6hj8wUqePOWAnncJKpZzTGJdLZvzAw6BBOzpi2xxQxRZDk7NQ5UhaEc133ts5S5RGOVJ7rXfY2rosufq51O5R5UzQoGg6Jn7u04Sa81ldD0VBnaX43ioZZytb8ifTuefvKpeSjc8rCdQm5_Nj137N3T98BAAD__z1CV4g). It's a huge help!
## Wildfires Threaten Panhandle, Hill Country
Dry and windy conditions are fueling [nearly a dozen active wildfires](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFywyAQRL8GddIcBzJyQZGGzmlTapA4bCZYeABb1t9ncJ_qrth9u7M_l_liQwzb9dveSde3TzMCjj2InqvZ2RCPWXZOL-DOvCPNlUSEM07Y3bQbafK4CFyRpORA02gVcUv-JNAtvAu6wUBwxWFUQgxn7lfuVyCv5HJSyCSQCzXlod6o0tsWH4_0ojys6d5Ffav1UZj4YmgYmn3fh2exNTl7NAFDU2rKB0Oz0V7asTWkjaFpuQwNCIaGt-8D730mRzmsv2V55mu_h-h8yNSsE8pRyFEAKIamy9o99hBjKCfFJFzvNsRPqfrvSi-NfwEAAP__Nxhnpw) that have consumed more than 40,000 acres across the state, including 23,000 acres in Roberts County, northeast of Amarillo, and 9,500 acres in Gillespie County, west of Fredericksburg. As of Sunday morning, the [Windmill Fire in Roberts County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd0QwkBAXFLehy223tMb8xGjHxjIkcd5-5WjbrefM0dH3dRtumCkv9_84R9v2VAYQcOZCcWmGgJneg-6CHUXoZRetNBpA9HCFbrLXPik0GkGMwaBMIHEMRhlAr-TVj122h0woaaQ4G6VOvUxeJi9iMnq8GGBaxJBb2U5tii3uWBO9yzNuJ1_mjuzU2lqZ-sfAMXB1jb5tj5mKR1riqx4UA9f241gebeIfB4_EV6yFgTsoBu7IYOCEYuCkZuBemULKW6y8rrh987z8vq64TLgEit1mw_rKRLleDNPiPmOmT1b7c6enhZ8AAAD___Vlaxs) was 65% contained. The nearby Rest Area Fire in Gray County, which has burned nearly 8,000 acres and is 65% contained, prompted a mandatory evacuation order for the community of Alanreed and a disaster declaration by Amarillo Mayor Cole Stanley. As of yesterday morning, the Crabapple Fire in Gillespie County was 40% contained. County Judge Daniel Jones issued a disaster declaration, and on Sunday, Gov. Greg Abbott announced that FEMA [agreed to reimburse 75% of the costs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHO4yAQBOCnwR0WLBhCQXGNu__aK60FlgSFxBYmcfL2p6T_69F8Gs2_n-UHSy3381-8ke-vvC4gYOJCcWmXhKW-Fz0kH0RyciAvrQYQDk4wXLwiKSVCNuhQ2HSyBDlBimCTmKzMQ_EfTChppZisUqOTOcocBWWrg7HAtKBU-trGfqFOL9xzfa9PamNcb0P1l963nak_DGYG83Ec4_X5oE_IYMbWS6zEYL7TsTOY6xqxMphzo0StxOseHu3Mvy6PDQNuWyWeS_uUwDjuREY1AXAnteM6GMNPwSjuBEGmkFIEGppP21FqLbuxTIvzDUv97uu_Hvb08D8AAP__DqJrrg) associated with containing the Crabapple and Rest Area fires. Although Sunday provided a reprieve from strong winds, windy weather is [expected to return](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1iAcYgLite4y2u3tDAzOCMRsIDEyd-vnH7bmXOPru7Pbbk5ipS2_-6Btr1DXpRQIxcDl2YBR_Gz6A7sKmCSHVpptFJiUlfV3S1KdwEtUetJBxyN9yNe_SikdCPgqjqyp0wM0kgxmmHoJxm8DF5gMHq9GMW0QKCWS9_u2PDtaoif_MLS-_zoor23tlc2_GNqZmo-jqP3a0141PPP1PyNMDWfpxOgCIEKVr7nfae08efOnS-5Vv5FOTyRt8xrKzlt_KAElbsEHMqH-5yAGuV0qrpiYT8oRqoXw7TYHo7it1X7c6aXVb8BAAD__6BFbYY) for much of Texas over the next few days, complicating efforts to bring active fires under control. For the latest updates on wildfires, [see this website](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OrCAUAOCngW4MHFC0oLi5id1ss8WWBuEwngR1gsf5efvNbr8v8CXf13W6Biq03T7Cip5feZ9AQXtR5qLdlAKV92Rl8rNKg5botbMAaoAe5OJdD33sEkbbxXmOLZpOh5xCbgdloDeS_A-mjHZatc6YZtA56hwVZmfnzoGwChPxXhtekPEVjlze-wNrE_dVFr8w3w9h_gkYBYycjyfODYf1bDCdAsb_Z6248SfxGZj2TcAoq0_3J5VCR-eEVbc1UPnl-M_fw8N3AAAA__8ddVMV) provided by the Texas A&M Forest Service.
## Two Texas Universities Investigated
The U.S. Department of Education has [launched investigations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb8Gd1gw2CEuKLZxl223tAgM8UgYLGDt-O-fkv71V_ccnX-P5WEpUnr9tRua9g55AQEjF4pLvXhL8VqGzpun8JPs0Eg9AIgJ7tCtZlBa3AenQtAOhZeoBD5Hp27T5EcbQkfmcyaU1FKMWql-ksHJ4AQGPTxvGtgg0FPLpW8rNnzbGuKVDyy9y1sXzdraXpn6w2BmMJ_n2W9XtcmmlhPlz4jBnPCsDOaYnY0MZlsauYgMZp-R_090YKnULp5yaSv_Unghh5zSgbXRyzbKiYMAAKmmfl_3rhi_nxQj1Ztmg3htluLXqf0a6TDwEwAA__-IAmvI) into the University of North Texas (UNT) and Rice University for allegedly "engaging in race-exclusionary practices" in their graduate programs. The two schools are among 50 the department indicated are under investigation. Specifically, the probe will examine the institutions' [partnership with the PhD Project](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL8GOiPbODgULq5Jl2uvRMbehZUcHNl7kPz9ifRXzRSjp9H7uU93T4m25ds_wPEL86SlvgjZC2Wn6Cm9J9NGN8s4qhacskZrOeqrbleHAccYcY4zXKM3AXV_7XH2w2BGDCq25E6Y7JVV8mL7vhsVBoVBAlozD1Y3RkIkzqXjFRhevmJ65x1KF_KjTW5lftam_2r0rdG34zg6zC-zwVHPQaNvZz0jF17FByAKBRC_G-1QKjFBFezLAgxRIEQoPokIJGjboTItnilvtS0uPg9KiepgGyOXh6f0OcH_Wtmd_gsAAP__y0lpXA), which was founded "with the goal of diversifying corporate America by diversifying the role models in the front of classrooms." In January, Gov. Greg Abbott [threatened to fire](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQhZ8GOiN7IHEoXLAF3d02JRrsgYxkDLINJG-_Ilvfakb6dH50nj_DD7LnMP_FhUx-T-sAEm5C1kLpwSH7z9CUzozStaoko3QDIFt4QPkyjVUIUj4sPtqbtGNrx3GCUd8RalC2LdlcZrJWWsmbruuqVZNVk5U06Wa8aygaSY7zGqv8okxvTJP_rAfFyq5L6c0r5y0VdVdAX0B_nme1pHCxAnoKYk8F9IHO63x_RxvGvFDIYp0Eud1i5jUIDgelzDNmDrOIbEnsgQ-KifNHoPc0fwFaEvS2fk__VWKO6MQW1znilYlRdJ3qnu0fKKNx28nec7rropHzguy_tfOvOx4G_gUAAP__Lft4Ug) Texas A&M University President Mark Welsh III over the school's planned participation in a conference sponsored by the organization, citing the state's ban on diversity, equity, and inclusion programming at public universities. Welsh announced staff would not be attending the conference, and several other universities, including UNT, followed suit. A representative for UNT said the school "discontinued its affiliation with PhD Project in early 2024." Rice University has not yet commented on the investigation.

clean_body: Two years ago today, the first national edition of The Flyover was delivered to 47 people. | | | | | | Monday, March 17, 2025 ---|--- Happy St. Patrick's Day! On this day in 1855, the was established at Austin College in Huntsville. The liberal arts college was incorporated in 1849 and moved to Sherman in 1876. Today marks The Flyover's second anniversary! We sent our very first national issue on March 17, 2023, and never turned off the afterburners. Over 2 million Americans take off with us every morning, including those in Texas, and we're honored to have you aboard. Later today, you'll receive a special note from our founder. In the meantime, please enjoy today's top story about our journey from an idea to one of America's largest and fastest-growing news organizations--thanks to you! Check it out below. We're sponsored today by , offering affordable hearing aids with crystal clear sound. Abilene ⛅ 84/44° | Amarillo ☁️ 81/43° | Austin ⛅ 83/44° | Brownsville ⛅ 84/56° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 82/55° | DFW 🌤️ 80/47° | El Paso ☁️ 86/39° | Houston ⛅ 80/52° | Laredo ⛅ 89/50° | Lubbock 🌥️ 83/44° | Midland ⛅ 83/46° | San Antonio ⛅ 85/42° | Tyler 🌤️ 78/42° | Waco ⛅ 82/43° | The Flyover Celebrates 2nd Anniversary Two years ago today, the first national edition of The Flyover was delivered to 47 people. Our writing, editing, and proofreading staff consisted of just one person, Cole. Today, ten editions of The Flyover reach more than 2.1 million readers daily, and we have a full team of writers, editors, and proofreaders across the country--along with sales, technology, and customer support staff. We've learned a lot in two years, but as goal has always been to cover the day's news in a direct and unbiased way. In 2024, we added our Rotator section along with our special coverage section (Olympics, Election, Holiday , etc). We also listened closely to your feedback, and we worked hard to improve our news coverage. Growth brought new opportunities. Here in Texas, we got the first Flyover state edition in January 2024, and The Texas Flyover has now grown to over 300,000 readers. Since then, we've added eight more state editions. The Flyover's success is due to you, our readers, and we can't thank you enough for sticking with us. We've got big plans for year three--including new state editions and a big new project that you'll hear more about soon. (Hint: it's a podcast. ) If you like The Flyover and find value and appreciate our work--we would love for you to support us financially if you can. We know everyone isn't able, but your financial support means a lot to us. . It's a huge help! Wildfires Threaten Panhandle, Hill Country Dry and windy conditions are fueling that have consumed more than 40,000 acres across the state, including 23,000 acres in Roberts County, northeast of Amarillo, and 9,500 acres in Gillespie County, west of Fredericksburg. As of Sunday morning, the was 65% contained. The nearby Rest Area Fire in Gray County, which has burned nearly 8,000 acres and is 65% contained, prompted a mandatory evacuation order for the community of Alanreed and a disaster declaration by Amarillo Mayor Cole Stanley. As of yesterday morning, the Crabapple Fire in Gillespie County was 40% contained. County Judge Daniel Jones issued a disaster declaration, and on Sunday, Gov. Greg Abbott announced that FEMA associated with containing the Crabapple and Rest Area fires. Although Sunday provided a reprieve from strong winds, windy weather is for much of Texas over the next few days, complicating efforts to bring active fires under control. For the latest updates on wildfires, provided by the Texas A&M Forest Service. Two Texas Universities Investigated The U.S. Department of Education has into the University of North Texas (UNT) and Rice University for allegedly "engaging in race-exclusionary practices" in their graduate programs. The two schools are among 50 the department indicated are under investigation. Specifically, the probe will examine the institutions' , which was founded "with the goal of diversifying corporate America by diversifying the role models in the front of classrooms." In January, Gov. Greg Abbott Texas A&M University President Mark Welsh III over the school's planned participation in a conference sponsored by the organization, citing the state's ban on diversity, equity, and inclusion programming at public universities. Welsh announced staff would not be attending the conference, and several other universities, including UNT, followed suit. A representative for UNT said the school "discontinued its affiliation with PhD Project in early 2024." Rice University has not yet commented on the investigation. | Experience crystal-clear hearing with Audien's Atom and Atom Pro hearing aids,. () | ➤ Canyon: At least three people died in crashes caused by Friday's severe dust storm. On I-27, multiple people were injured in a 38-vehicle pileup. () ➤ Austin: Meanwhile, Solomun Weldekeal Araya, 37, has been charged with intoxication manslaughter in connection to a 17-vehicle pileup on I-35 Thursday night that killed five people. () ➤ Harris County Attorney Christian Menefee filed to run for the congressional seat of the late U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner hours after attending the former Houston mayor's funeral. Gov. Abbott has not yet announced an election date to fill Turner's seat. () ➤ Attorney General Ken Paxton said Friday that state district courts do not have the authority to direct state agencies to change a transgender-identifying person's listed sex on a driver's license or birth certificate. () ➤ McKinney: A K-9 dog named Azi was killed during a shootout with a suspect who had barricaded himself in a hotel room after shooting a woman. The suspect died from his wounds, and the woman is in stable condition. () ➤ Crockett: A 34-year-old man was arrested after posing as a federal agent requesting to inspect records at the Houston County Sheriff's Office on Saturday. When he was turned away, the suspect brandished an AR-15 and started firing rounds into the air outside the office. () ➤ Keller ISD: The board of trustees has abandoned plans to split the district, saying it would require incurring additional debt. The Texas Education Agency recently revealed it was reviewing complaints that district leaders have not been transparent regarding such plans. name: History Facts
subject: How Oklahoma got its unique shape
body:
The Oklahoma Panhandle is an unusual boundary that exists due to a law passed 87 years before Oklahoma even became a state: the Missouri Compromise of 1820.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dhqf00gcj0nfn1r9nnqrvo1r29qdtj59pr4eoso59wcm0tatfw2j3a458aqpreq59ywv4jb6pvmf7fc736kjii1yny4g88nryenyaubxn0nm3cfg1kcd48tvyhkcdmz06ygzu4vtdq3vtbn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Oklahoma has a panhandle because of the Missouri Compromise.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he Oklahoma Panhandle is an unusual boundary that exists due to a law passed 87 years before Oklahoma even became a state: the Missouri Compromise of 1820. The [law](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) admitted Missouri to the union as a slave state and Maine as a free state to maintain the existing balance, and prohibited slavery above the 36 degrees 30 minutes north parallel in the rest of the Louisiana Purchase. The panhandle was formed after the Republic of Texas was [admitted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to the union in 1845 as a slave state south of this line, but with a little sliver of land jutting above the boundary. Rather than separate Texas into two portions, Congress passed the [Compromise of 1850](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), in which Texas ceded the land. The region became known as the Public Land Strip, or colloquially as “No Man’s Land.”
---
From 1850 to 1890, this narrow, rectangular tract of land, roughly 167 miles long and 35 miles wide, existed as a separate entity from any state or territorial government, making it an attractive destination for homesteaders and outlaws. The land was bordered by Texas to the south, the New Mexico Territory to the west, and unorganized territories to the north and east. The Organic Act of 1890 finally brought an end to this unusual situation, as the Public Land Strip was assigned to the new Oklahoma Territory. The panhandle remained a part of Oklahoma when it became the 46th U.S. state on November 16, 1907, giving the Sooner State its unique shape.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our [Terms of Use](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=2kh5r9m0gvwoqxe9ulw67o48l4n7c3vhij99jg5xqruhoduynkrcryemiw45zfsbmaz0ew5v8o4s7af00twhlh1qvibwjg6k8ebxm0yymmxpnun8pb077k5tdoompmemnaohsaptzsku1fira2dszoww0fec148ufyruhwppi7x94&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [Privacy Policy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=463ko1dghoub87hgy867yxzi7ztwhuh70i9raho1qbrbofefgkpupzct7ejpx9gvm4jmk4i0gifh5tq1yu9738absrvxyxxivbrb7pxe6wu34li2nqmkw7ap3gmllyu6127lduh4ciwe9dqh4dqif4fwckltn074hmayxpf8o5kx7vti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---

---|---|---
## The world’s first parking meters were installed in Oklahoma City.
In 1930, there were an [estimated](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st9ljv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) 500,000 vehicles in Oklahoma, mainly throughout its namesake capital city. This created a lot of unwanted congestion, as people who worked downtown would occupy all available parking spaces for the entire day, forcing potential customers to park far away from the retail district. Though the city tried to solve this issue with parking enforcement, those efforts fell short, so in 1932, inventor, lawyer, and newspaper publisher Carl C. Magee was hired to come up with a solution. Magee conceived of a mechanical device that could not only track how long a car was parked, but also collect money for the right to park. It took three years to design and manufacture the newfangled machines, but 175 parking meters were finally installed around Oklahoma City on July 16, 1935, to test the concept. The “Park-O-Meters,” as they were known, were highly successful at both limiting congestion and generating revenue, inspiring other cities to follow suit.

clean_body: The Oklahoma Panhandle is an unusual boundary that exists due to a law passed 87 years before Oklahoma even became a state: the Missouri Compromise of 1820. | T he Oklahoma Panhandle is an unusual boundary that exists due to a law passed 87 years before Oklahoma even became a state: the Missouri Compromise of 1820. The admitted Missouri to the union as a slave state and Maine as a free state to maintain the existing balance, and prohibited slavery above the 36 degrees 30 minutes north parallel in the rest of the Louisiana Purchase. The panhandle was formed after the Republic of Texas was to the union in 1845 as a slave state south of this line, but with a little sliver of land jutting above the boundary. Rather than separate Texas into two portions, Congress passed the , in which Texas ceded the land. The region became known as the Public Land Strip, or colloquially as “No Man’s Land.” From 1850 to 1890, this narrow, rectangular tract of land, roughly 167 miles long and 35 miles wide, existed as a separate entity from any state or territorial government, making it an attractive destination for homesteaders and outlaws. The land was bordered by Texas to the south, the New Mexico Territory to the west, and unorganized territories to the north and east. The Organic Act of 1890 finally brought an end to this unusual situation, as the Public Land Strip was assigned to the new Oklahoma Territory. The panhandle remained a part of Oklahoma when it became the 46th U.S. state on November 16, 1907, giving the Sooner State its unique shape. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Counties in Oklahoma 77 | | Year Spanish explorer Francisco Vázquez de Coronado became the first European to visit Oklahoma 1541 | Year Spanish explorer Francisco Vázquez de Coronado became the first European to visit Oklahoma 1541 | | Percentage of Oklahomans who identify as American Indians 14.2% | | People who left Oklahoma during the Dust Bowl ~440,000 | People who left Oklahoma during the Dust Bowl ~440,000 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The world’s first parking meters were installed in Oklahoma City. In 1930, there were an 500,000 vehicles in Oklahoma, mainly throughout its namesake capital city. This created a lot of unwanted congestion, as people who worked downtown would occupy all available parking spaces for the entire day, forcing potential customers to park far away from the retail district. Though the city tried to solve this issue with parking enforcement, those efforts fell short, so in 1932, inventor, lawyer, and newspaper publisher Carl C. Magee was hired to come up with a solution. Magee conceived of a mechanical device that could not only track how long a car was parked, but also collect money for the right to park. It took three years to design and manufacture the newfangled machines, but 175 parking meters were finally installed around Oklahoma City on July 16, 1935, to test the concept. The “Park-O-Meters,” as they were known, were highly successful at both limiting congestion and generating revenue, inspiring other cities to follow suit. name: AMAC Action
subject: Help us counter radical leftists
body:
As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with the left-leaning AARP...

| |
---
| | Soros has channeled millions into electing hand-picked radicals.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zik3gh04dkbib0mdmlbsck46e3gnvgl6rho6pgeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)
---
| | Friend,As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with _the left-leaning AARP..._ By now you’ve probably heard of **billionaire globalist George Soros** and his support for the most radical leftist ideas on the planet.He’s injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, and our justice system. In the past few years, Soros has channeled millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys—including New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. What I’m about to tell you will make your blood boil—**[**but I hope it will inspire you to take action!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3kto7pepf6pbfjgofvlksrp82unihecbs2371fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)** According to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.” **You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’** And the AARP is taking multi-millions from this group funded by the man whose life mission is to destroy our nation. It’s not hard to see why the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine, calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time.”Friend, it makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.And listen to this...Of all age groups (including 18-29-year-olds!), when asked **“Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Donald Trump?”** —seniors aged 65 and older are the ONLY age group in America with a decreasing approval rating of President Trump.**Coincidence or Soros-backed AARP influence?****And so today I’m writing to sound the alarm.** To help President Trump usher in the **Golden Age of America** , AMAC Action must double and even triple our efforts against these radicals and George Soros’ network of prosecutors and Attorneys General who are obstructing President Trump’s America First Agenda.**_We can’t do it without brave patriots like you._** **[That’s why I’m asking you to follow this link to make a critical one-time donation today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmkv6ko0iorv85r17brnbfgju9csvd2dfokcsecg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)****My friend, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action.** With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to the left-leaning AARP. And our 82 chapters and 348 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. With the support of conservative seniors like you, AMAC Action has confronted the radical left at every turn. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him. And I know that together, we can counter the poisonous ideas he’s spreading through groups like the Tides Foundation and the AARP. **Just look at what we accomplished together in 2024 alone:**
---
* **We bombarded** members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* **We mobilized** seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states.
* **We organized** a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* **Together with Donald Trump, Jr.,** we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”**
* **In Missouri and Kentucky,** we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* **We defeated** a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida.
* **In Ohio,** we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* **We stopped** left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
And our efforts are so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who are ruining our country! AMAC Action isn’t going to back down and let the Left obstruct President Trump’s America First agenda. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But we’re going to shout it from the rooftops so unsuspecting seniors know the truth!** We can’t do any of this critical work without you. **[Today—right now—when so much is at stake—will you please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500 or more?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn6ls1id8ktcieoj9b4hbec9mjs5m6m8jd3hjtag_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)** The radical Left isn’t letting up for one minute, and neither are we.**Your AMAC Action is taking every step possible to protect the interests of you and your family—but we can’t do it without you.** We already have a full agenda for the rest of this critical year that needs financing. And now that Soros has unleashed his radical D.A.s, our fights will multiply across the nation. But please know that **ANY amount** that you can contribute, whether it’s smaller or larger, is greatly appreciated. **[**Whatever you decide, please donate within the next 72 hours so we know what resources we have to work with.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4kn7012b3eodpffnb3i07s8rfu170bfhnjpq3do_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)** If we allow radical leftists like George Soros to continue without opposition, every one of us will suffer. Thank you for standing with us.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkuhqp1vlal9vrhj9dnb8iqtph7hp9ob52tlep30_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)
---
| |
---
[ **Renew Your Support**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhd9lgc9849o6did8lu6m32hs3jdbuiubairhvd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)

| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znddb1ksnv9932vgbmp0nveb1itu7le84tp7unf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)

_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9646bimvmau62i278odg8eofqb49qpafa628c3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h66pj2c3h2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

subject: Help us counter radical leftists
body:
As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with the left-leaning AARP...

| |
---
| | Soros has channeled millions into electing hand-picked radicals.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr8r2uhkjkif29v23an9us3qk0fsuoc5ghf5bnfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend,As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with _the left-leaning AARP..._ By now you’ve probably heard of **billionaire globalist George Soros** and his support for the most radical leftist ideas on the planet.He’s injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, and our justice system. In the past few years, Soros has channeled millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys—including New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. What I’m about to tell you will make your blood boil—**[**but I hope it will inspire you to take action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7sbrae2tf977l817clv36ap4ucggfr4nnivmb9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)** According to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.” **You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’** And the AARP is taking multi-millions from this group funded by the man whose life mission is to destroy our nation. It’s not hard to see why the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine, calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time.”Friend, it makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.And listen to this...Of all age groups (including 18-29-year-olds!), when asked **“Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Donald Trump?”** —seniors aged 65 and older are the ONLY age group in America with a decreasing approval rating of President Trump.**Coincidence or Soros-backed AARP influence?****And so today I’m writing to sound the alarm.** To help President Trump usher in the **Golden Age of America** , AMAC Action must double and even triple our efforts against these radicals and George Soros’ network of prosecutors and Attorneys General who are obstructing President Trump’s America First Agenda.**_We can’t do it without brave patriots like you._** **[That’s why I’m asking you to follow this link to make a critical one-time donation today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jnp56i6o7lt12r7956jp8mlck16ruhibpgpdkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)****My friend, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action.** With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to the left-leaning AARP. And our 82 chapters and 348 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. With the support of conservative seniors like you, AMAC Action has confronted the radical left at every turn. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him. And I know that together, we can counter the poisonous ideas he’s spreading through groups like the Tides Foundation and the AARP. **Just look at what we accomplished together in 2024 alone:**
---
* **We bombarded** members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* **We mobilized** seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states.
* **We organized** a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* **Together with Donald Trump, Jr.,** we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”**
* **In Missouri and Kentucky,** we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* **We defeated** a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida.
* **In Ohio,** we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* **We stopped** left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
And our efforts are so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who are ruining our country! AMAC Action isn’t going to back down and let the Left obstruct President Trump’s America First agenda. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But we’re going to shout it from the rooftops so unsuspecting seniors know the truth!** We can’t do any of this critical work without you. **[Today—right now—when so much is at stake—will you please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500 or more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z891p7bdn29uqdegef5jt770bt357cigcd6idcog_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)** The radical Left isn’t letting up for one minute, and neither are we.**Your AMAC Action is taking every step possible to protect the interests of you and your family—but we can’t do it without you.** We already have a full agenda for the rest of this critical year that needs financing. And now that Soros has unleashed his radical D.A.s, our fights will multiply across the nation. But please know that **ANY amount** that you can contribute, whether it’s smaller or larger, is greatly appreciated. **[**Whatever you decide, please donate within the next 72 hours so we know what resources we have to work with.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z01o4p69r3m88o6j40l0060s4nuj80kv79s4dhcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)** If we allow radical leftists like George Soros to continue without opposition, every one of us will suffer. Thank you for standing with us.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtoiasu5l5h6qlprsv364gln2m7qboquqj0njjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)
---
| |
---

---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z74u71lp981me6gg8gohag5mfusgrdel3g02u5ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zupsgdafkj50h6snhgqmindgjfs4iph19i4oo25g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h6eoj6c9h2bs)**_**_
---

The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: Josh
subject: Randy Fine called for my arrest
body:
It doesn’t get more fascist than your political opponent trying to have you arrested weeks before an election.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wOyovyCQyMVcExs0tERwu7WDnbO7GGhukvJc46RFf1xbcyoHCYwq4KpaE-cbxl4QhJe4wFH7LeeZAaJSjbAc2w-Ll-502yXWdOF48E3PLOU7WjKippvytYkRFTGoJl5CLm8DvIRWqVYE9SuS2RDWID8Hr2_zxuNmJdXkEDdz1hPF9Lt3jLHOt6_UenX-N3n44N-Yvu0f3RREybnfyhjwXReuTW29ntek&c=DCn1W4PqI3YqrKItG-sN1h71AXl5NjVM5rAZLy8qVAvn79W0rOuTIw==&ch=7QU0-WqGYUODb-AmnPQ4sUB16YtCVLn2kRh9Jx_oEBq0kqZtoHtA8A==)
---
| | | | Team \- it's Josh Weil, the Democrat running in Florida's 6th district special election.
I wanted to make sure this news was on your radar: my MAGA opponent, Randy Fine, has gone full Mussolini and called for my arrest just two weeks ahead of this election:
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wOyovyCQyMVcExs0tERwu7WDnbO7GGhukvJc46RFf1xbcyoHCYwq4KpaE-cbxl4QOj5_Rm5SutETqqe-PuMP9mR5gt0i26fP0MgNP2NBekl4w7iHWSHo9jq1crhL_4GXivQePIpmam4S9tovcz92ky7NMl_AHSKRtmAhdj96SPluVou0T2VGmdxZBDQK83V1WT9jydMv0EhhRyizafjbPJNyUcCfTev6&c=DCn1W4PqI3YqrKItG-sN1h71AXl5NjVM5rAZLy8qVAvn79W0rOuTIw==&ch=7QU0-WqGYUODb-AmnPQ4sUB16YtCVLn2kRh9Jx_oEBq0kqZtoHtA8A==)
---
Randy Fine: "I call on law enforcement to immediately arrest 'Jihad Josh' Weil"
---
| | | | Let me be perfectly clear. I am NOT afraid. And we will NOT back down.
But this should absolutely send a chill down the spine of every American. Now that Trump is back in power and hellbent on enacting Project 2025 (despite every poll showing this agenda to be extremely unpopular), MAGA brownshirts are taking away our freedoms and shredding the Constitution bit by bit.
Fine's threat is just the latest in this trend. But it certainly won't be the last.
We are running out of time to fight back and save our democracy. This race is not about me. It is about something so much bigger than one person or one campaign: it truly is a battle for the soul of America.
Friend, we can't let these fascists win. We have hundreds of paid staff and volunteers knocking thousands of doors every single day and we will not be deterred by MAGA fear mongering.
---
| | | | [Will you support our critical work with a donation in these final days before our election?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wOyovyCQyMVcExs0tERwu7WDnbO7GGhukvJc46RFf1xbcyoHCYwq4KpaE-cbxl4QhbUskBDW4_zLkL_EWA7QdVnnomDxSalJPsDvkzzW2bZfGRAqM5ZCh8f0-OFh9iedQE7e5_4y6CAbx3N04NMqEoVdC0rCv66pwPSlwCreTXeWx_qoGoJ5dLicUQGc9fCkalJB_Eg7KmTloqu-Wz2MoqD4zWaOizK95vA3OBOnRzw=&c=DCn1W4PqI3YqrKItG-sN1h71AXl5NjVM5rAZLy8qVAvn79W0rOuTIw==&ch=7QU0-WqGYUODb-AmnPQ4sUB16YtCVLn2kRh9Jx_oEBq0kqZtoHtA8A==)
---
| | | | | [DONATE TO FIGHT BACK >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wOyovyCQyMVcExs0tERwu7WDnbO7GGhukvJc46RFf1xbcyoHCYwq4KpaE-cbxl4QbZuwBI4v2UOVaR5m86NrI3N9gNz1b5cpv8GiJuYQgT6aEoUN6ZVnw8UdA3USVoPUceCLep1JJUgkd_HDgAse0Fkyq0B0o7IuFoobSeLy6FMxfTsWLlzK4EDjlS58w8pmPy1OUpHU-2GGe9fSkRDyNw==&c=DCn1W4PqI3YqrKItG-sN1h71AXl5NjVM5rAZLy8qVAvn79W0rOuTIw==&ch=7QU0-WqGYUODb-AmnPQ4sUB16YtCVLn2kRh9Jx_oEBq0kqZtoHtA8A==)
---
| | | | [Or multiply your impact through our final month with a weekly recurring donation](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wOyovyCQyMVcExs0tERwu7WDnbO7GGhukvJc46RFf1xbcyoHCYwq4KpaE-cbxl4QBjl7rRBEUhlc6snHS8Qfu9iZILOa-YOwCgkNgYau9pqKKPT7hhWdKJdQavLNRt9Pyo6XfufuFufOSOZrmYJ8XB-f4nSkrHpZPOnD95RQra6kwPZLeC-Y2mZwDaPGHdIl8ZW2ab_0iUoCdB7ehZ3fxIVkMCL5WXu_XTEmVOynOIQ=&c=DCn1W4PqI3YqrKItG-sN1h71AXl5NjVM5rAZLy8qVAvn79W0rOuTIw==&ch=7QU0-WqGYUODb-AmnPQ4sUB16YtCVLn2kRh9Jx_oEBq0kqZtoHtA8A==)
---
| | | | Will we stand up for the things that made America a force for good in the world? Will we fight for freedom and democracy, and the power of the people to decide our own destiny?
These values are being put to the test right here and right now. Let's fight for them like our freedom depends on it--because it just might.
Josh Weil Democrat for Florida's 6th District
---

clean_body: It doesn’t get more fascist than your political opponent trying to have you arrested weeks before an election. | | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | | == | | | | Team \- it's Josh Weil, the Democrat running in Florida's 6th district special election. I wanted to make sure this news was on your radar: my MAGA opponent, Randy Fine, has gone full Mussolini and called for my arrest just two weeks ahead of this election: | | | | | == Randy Fine: "I call on law enforcement to immediately arrest 'Jihad Josh' Weil" | | | | Let me be perfectly clear. I am NOT afraid. And we will NOT back down. But this should absolutely send a chill down the spine of every American. Now that Trump is back in power and hellbent on enacting Project 2025 (despite every poll showing this agenda to be extremely unpopular), MAGA brownshirts are taking away our freedoms and shredding the Constitution bit by bit. Fine's threat is just the latest in this trend. But it certainly won't be the last. We are running out of time to fight back and save our democracy. This race is not about me. It is about something so much bigger than one person or one campaign: it truly is a battle for the soul of America. Friend, we can't let these fascists win. We have hundreds of paid staff and volunteers knocking thousands of doors every single day and we will not be deterred by MAGA fear mongering. | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | Will we stand up for the things that made America a force for good in the world? Will we fight for freedom and democracy, and the power of the people to decide our own destiny? These values are being put to the test right here and right now. Let's fight for them like our freedom depends on it--because it just might. Josh Weil Democrat for Florida's 6th District | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Checks can be sent to: Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | | | | == == == == | | | | | | | | | Josh Weil for Congress | 8381 Citrus Chase Drive | Orlando, FL 32836 US |

name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv9s75jgtphk09lo3du3d5g42dvcq3c9hs2a3gg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h69p71chh2bs "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zseve03e3l1t93clljsc557vt9r7218700f257ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h69p71chh2bs "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z420570b8timch936mb96mrhugp1ibpa2m7nduao_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h69p71chh2bs "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z95mqrh3uhueh0bkc4j38rev6c07rbt5iotdskr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h69p71chh2bs "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7e0n5fbrio032s3ehg9slngcdhq6ssmqdrsjm48_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h69p71chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmcq3e4pfebfecd76ua77r690orn06qvrde829cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9h69p71chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

body:
It’s no surprise this is what they spend their time working on...| | |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103988500/533917835/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250317men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTU4NmJjLTJmMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u6lly8R-CdZbLJH8B_PJnwhuoIIC2oGYt_TKm1AIbKE=)

Hi Peter,

In case you missed it, last month, a New York doctor was indicted by a Louisiana grand jury for prescribing an abortion pill to a young minor (under the supervision of her mother) across state lines. We are keeping a close eye on this case as it could have a drastic impact on abortion rights nationwide.

Louisiana has a total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. Under their state law, doctors face penalties of up to 15 years in prison and $200,000 in fines for facilitating an abortion. Since the state’s ban went into effect, pregnant women and children have been given “risky, unnecessary surgeries, denied treatment for miscarriages and ectopic pregnancies, and forced to wait until their life is at risk before getting the care they need.” _(NPR)_

**Louisiana’s State Legislature is 77% male lawmakers – one of the most underrepresented state governments for women in the country.**

[**We are no longer accepting the dangerous underrepresentation that has given rooms full of men the power to make laws about OUR bodies. We are working tirelessly to get more women elected. Help us chip away at male GOP supermajorities across the country by donating $25 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103988502/533917867/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250317men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTU4NmJjLTJmMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u6lly8R-CdZbLJH8B_PJnwhuoIIC2oGYt_TKm1AIbKE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103988504/533917870/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250317men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTU4NmJjLTJmMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u6lly8R-CdZbLJH8B_PJnwhuoIIC2oGYt_TKm1AIbKE=)

---
Louisiana has some of the HIGHEST rates of maternal mortality and morbidity in the nation. **It is dangerous to be a woman in a red state – and there is virtually no infrastructure in place to change that.** The Democratic party, most progressive orgs, and virtually all other institutional funders dedicated to getting more women in office are directing their resources to – you guessed it – blue and purple states.

The reason for that is understandable. They want to put their money behind “winnable” races and they don’t believe red states have winnable seats worth fighting for.

But here’s the thing: in 2024, **44% of our Her Bold Move victories happened in red states.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103988521/533917931/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250317men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTU4NmJjLTJmMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u6lly8R-CdZbLJH8B_PJnwhuoIIC2oGYt_TKm1AIbKE=)
---
**That is why we at Her Bold Move have created a plan to support women candidates in underserved races and build infrastructure in underserved places. Because women across the country are counting on us – and they deserve real representation in their government. It’s our job to make that happen.**

[**We won’t leave any women behind – women in red states need our help urgently. You can join our fight today by donating $25 or more right now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103988530/533917949/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250317men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTU4NmJjLTJmMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u6lly8R-CdZbLJH8B_PJnwhuoIIC2oGYt_TKm1AIbKE=)

Together,

Ileana Paules-Bronet
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103988534/533917953/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250317men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTU4NmJjLTJmMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u6lly8R-CdZbLJH8B_PJnwhuoIIC2oGYt_TKm1AIbKE=)
