name: Chris Meek
subject: If we forget 9/11, history will repeat itself
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kL-SgjAQh58m6WSSXSBQpDj_YOGMxXmFV4YkaE4iGCCMb3-j51nu7rf7-2aV71vX3CURSwJwdmYgAAQ_CMDte_Zh-vG77WKzj6fFLd_77DGF1QuN8IavWl32y8Pnhk_FIALXvj_uIn_j4723b_gVmlivXPvoijU1EhvDUmolFykAL3ha0LOsa8tEVtRWaVaUJtM8L1HYrIAmbUpE6iQwyBhywRFKhkkGYIwpc6MMqlIDSdkzJ1HeBqcVH8ZZhdB1PtGdp608j2M_PMUqAtUcuuQ66dZOw9-a7jyB6qVMoIqPSlzi17Q6zJZg9Xwark-4NdNR9DUN0vSza1s35IKk7PR_hkYJvwEAAP__oF1viQ)
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr9u2zAQx_GnoTYKvKMsSgOHpok6BPDQLu1UULyTzVYUFeqP4bcPZARe7z7A7-viPIbhboV5EYjXQItAFPqbQPz4c4t5-xfff8i3836RH_U5no4vfv-iOz7x5N3_88uvn2-wNYvJ4OP8-32HJ1_vMz_x12jJ0YXxuJrXgqweSFUFWzAVIjRQNcXV6tYMNdR9D9ToXrMenOIaDXLvTg5cESwqPCkNBjS2SpcnRCJqa3KkXetRVOqxU7rIOXgHy3pzOacUS59iMdrrus7LI6wT2C3st8ylm5jSegiBXSsB5MgX5-9ySNtEbg1pEtgxRbkiSY5SYS90t6Qte_7rE7HQr9TLFkByVNhLpaoiW5pvYRzDUhtRqcuj66jYLX4GAAD__zB0dro)
---
Dear Friend, A nation that forgets its history is doomed to repeat it. The September 11th attacks weren’t just an attack on our country—they were a wake-up call. We vowed to never forget. Yet today, we’re watching that promise slip away. 1 in 5 young Americans now see Osama bin Laden positively. Social media is flooded with videos glorifying a terrorist who killed thousands of Americans. The majority of U.S. states don’t even require 9/11 to be taught in schools! **If this trend continues, an entire generation will grow up disconnected from the truth, the sacrifice, and the lessons of 9/11.** This is why the 9/11 Legacy Foundation was created— **[and with your gift today, we’ll ensure that "We Remember" is more than just words.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr9u2zAQx_GnoTYKvKMsSgOHpok6BPDQLu1UULyTzVYUFeqP4bcPZARe7z7A7-viPIbhboV5EYjXQItAFPqbQPz4c4t5-xfff8i3836RH_U5no4vfv-iOz7x5N3_88uvn2-wNYvJ4OP8-32HJ1_vMz_x12jJ0YXxuJrXgqweSFUFWzAVIjRQNcXV6tYMNdR9D9ToXrMenOIaDXLvTg5cESwqPCkNBjS2SpcnRCJqa3KkXetRVOqxU7rIOXgHy3pzOacUS59iMdrrus7LI6wT2C3st8ylm5jSegiBXSsB5MgX5-9ySNtEbg1pEtgxRbkiSY5SYS90t6Qte_7rE7HQr9TLFkByVNhLpaoiW5pvYRzDUhtRqcuj66jYLX4GAAD__zB0dro)** Because time is running out more quickly than you realize. By 2026, we will mark 25 years since 9/11—the last major milestone where survivors, first responders, and military service members can share their stories firsthand. If we don’t act now, these stories could be lost forever. We must always remember: The selflessness of first responders, many of whom lost their lives or continue suffering from 9/11-related illnesses. The sacrifices of our service members who fought in the Global War on Terror, with thousands killed and many still battling mental and physical wounds. The importance of vigilance—because our adversaries are still out there, waiting for America to let its guard down. We must ensure that future generations learn the truth—not a watered-down, rewritten version of history. **[**Your action today will make the difference - can I count on your generous donation of $35 or more today to help us preserve the memory of 9/11?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr9u2zAQx_GnoTYKvKMsSgOHpok6BPDQLu1UULyTzVYUFeqP4bcPZARe7z7A7-viPIbhboV5EYjXQItAFPqbQPz4c4t5-xfff8i3836RH_U5no4vfv-iOz7x5N3_88uvn2-wNYvJ4OP8-32HJ1_vMz_x12jJ0YXxuJrXgqweSFUFWzAVIjRQNcXV6tYMNdR9D9ToXrMenOIaDXLvTg5cESwqPCkNBjS2SpcnRCJqa3KkXetRVOqxU7rIOXgHy3pzOacUS59iMdrrus7LI6wT2C3st8ylm5jSegiBXSsB5MgX5-9ySNtEbg1pEtgxRbkiSY5SYS90t6Qte_7rE7HQr9TLFkByVNhLpaoiW5pvYRzDUhtRqcuj66jYLX4GAAD__zB0dro)** The 9/11 Legacy Foundation is leading a nationwide effort to:
* Support national commemorations for the 25th anniversary.
* Push for 9/11 education in all 50 states.
* Preserve first hand survivor and hero testimonies before they are lost forever.
* Launch national media campaigns to keep the memory and lessons of 9/11 alive.

This isn’t just about remembering the past—it’s about protecting our future. History has shown that when America forgets, our enemies take advantage. We ignored the warnings before 9/11. We cannot afford to make that mistake again. Your urgent donation today will ensure that "We Remember" remains a call to action—not just a slogan. We must honor the heroes, tell the truth, and stand guard against the threats still facing our country. **[**Will you help ensure 9/11 is never forgotten?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr9u2zAQx_GnoTYKvKMsSgOHpok6BPDQLu1UULyTzVYUFeqP4bcPZARe7z7A7-viPIbhboV5EYjXQItAFPqbQPz4c4t5-xfff8i3836RH_U5no4vfv-iOz7x5N3_88uvn2-wNYvJ4OP8-32HJ1_vMz_x12jJ0YXxuJrXgqweSFUFWzAVIjRQNcXV6tYMNdR9D9ToXrMenOIaDXLvTg5cESwqPCkNBjS2SpcnRCJqa3KkXetRVOqxU7rIOXgHy3pzOacUS59iMdrrus7LI6wT2C3st8ylm5jSegiBXSsB5MgX5-9ySNtEbg1pEtgxRbkiSY5SYS90t6Qte_7rE7HQr9TLFkByVNhLpaoiW5pvYRzDUhtRqcuj66jYLX4GAAD__zB0dro)** Sincerely,
Dr. Chris Meek
P.S. The 25th anniversary of 9/11 is our last chance to preserve this history for future generations. If we don’t act now, it may be too late. **[Donate today and help us keep America’s promise to remember.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr9u2zAQx_GnoTYKvKMsSgOHpok6BPDQLu1UULyTzVYUFeqP4bcPZARe7z7A7-viPIbhboV5EYjXQItAFPqbQPz4c4t5-xfff8i3836RH_U5no4vfv-iOz7x5N3_88uvn2-wNYvJ4OP8-32HJ1_vMz_x12jJ0YXxuJrXgqweSFUFWzAVIjRQNcXV6tYMNdR9D9ToXrMenOIaDXLvTg5cESwqPCkNBjS2SpcnRCJqa3KkXetRVOqxU7rIOXgHy3pzOacUS59iMdrrus7LI6wT2C3st8ylm5jSegiBXSsB5MgX5-9ySNtEbg1pEtgxRbkiSY5SYS90t6Qte_7rE7HQr9TLFkByVNhLpaoiW5pvYRzDUhtRqcuj66jYLX4GAAD__zB0dro)**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zr9u2zAQx_GnoTYKvKMsSgOHpok6BPDQLu1UULyTzVYUFeqP4bcPZARe7z7A7-viPIbhboV5EYjXQItAFPqbQPz4c4t5-xfff8i3836RH_U5no4vfv-iOz7x5N3_88uvn2-wNYvJ4OP8-32HJ1_vMz_x12jJ0YXxuJrXgqweSFUFWzAVIjRQNcXV6tYMNdR9D9ToXrMenOIaDXLvTg5cESwqPCkNBjS2SpcnRCJqa3KkXetRVOqxU7rIOXgHy3pzOacUS59iMdrrus7LI6wT2C3st8ylm5jSegiBXSsB5MgX5-9ySNtEbg1pEtgxRbkiSY5SYS90t6Qte_7rE7HQr9TLFkByVNhLpaoiW5pvYRzDUhtRqcuj66jYLX4GAAD__zB0dro)
---

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGS4iAQhp-G3ExBQyA5cFhX48EqD7sX50gAlZmQIISkfPspnYzXv7_u_6tWPvTu8pBIbBHAzZmEABD9gwDuH4uP-dMfD5v9ab5u7vzkq-cU_q7oDG940OrrtP3_b09ynUQk2ofzcSZvfHoE-4bX0tJ65fpnKnaFkfRiMCusJIIBkJqwurhJwoBrIwi3DSEMd6KpFOa0YrrRDed14SRgqDAlglBoMC0rAGNMw40yVDUaEMOvnlJ5G51WJE2LinEcfalHX_TyNk0hvcRaBO0Sx3LIurc5_azp0SNoV2UEbcpd0tGFyY1DQtDmYU06i2j7-iDdXenB5LMIXRGlCYvre5e4QAxff28Ws4TvAAAA__8PUHSm)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA March 17th: Dismantle the Left’s Lies
body:
Our new guide will help you support and defend GOP lawmakers and President Trump’s popular agenda against leftist lies.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** The congressional recess is in full swing now. Leftist activist groups are mobilizing to harass GOP lawmakers over the recess, with the express intent to manipulate them into thinking President Trump's policies are not popular. They want the GOP to abandon the president and the American people, and they want the Democrats to fight every good reform.
Thanks to you, we're not sitting idle. Over the weekend, we delivered our **[" Stand Up & Speak Out" recess how-to guide](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa105abf/1edb9794aa05cc16 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/download-americafirst-guide/")** to you. It's your tool to fight back against the left's lies and stand strong with your GOP lawmakers while they're home. __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ DOWNLOAD GUIDE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa105abf/1edb9794aa05cc18)
---
| **** The Trump administration is battling to rip out the deep state and woke ideology that's choked our government for decades. This isn't a quick fix--it's a brutal, root-pulling grind that demands your grit and engagement. The left's counting on us to flinch. We won't. Inside the guide, you'll find strategies to bolster our lawmakers and keep our voices heard over the left's noise. We've packed it with talking points on key fights and samples you can use to quickly and easily take action, to show why President's Trump's policies are popular and good for America.
There is no "next week" when it comes to this congressional recess; **this is the week!** Please download the guide and do whatever you can to support President Trump and GOP members of Congress during the recess. We also need to bring the heat to Democrats and ask them why they don't care about the revelations made by DOGE--why don't they care about the corruption and waste?
[**Download the guide today**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa105abf/1edb9794aa05cc1a "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/download-americafirst-guide/") **and let 's support President Trump's America First agenda!**
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Why Wyandotte?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2256%2E135344%2EZ-EbTL)

When I was asked to give the Democratic response to President Trump’s speech, I knew that I wanted to highlight a place in Michigan where voters made their voices heard in the last election.
I chose Wyandotte, Michigan.
It’s a working-class town just south of Detroit. President Trump and I both won there in November. After I gave the speech, a local news station interviewed people in Wyandotte to ask them how they’re feeling about the state of politics today. I was glad to see that one resident thought it was “kinda cool” that we highlighted their town.
Here are a few of their impressions:
* On the economy: "I'm not seeing inflation rolling back as what was promised. Certainly, my prices continue to go up constantly, and now I just was informed the fish that we get from Canada, the oysters we get from Canada, they're all gonna have tariffs on them. So either I am going to have to stop carrying or raise my prices.”
* On dynamics in Washington: “I just cannot stand that they don't work together."
* On tariffs: "I work in the automotive industry, and that's going to be a huge impact for us, and it's gonna be difficult to withstand, and I imagine that's gonna impact our jobs too. Nervous for my kids. This isn’t the future I imagined for them, but I’m still hopeful.”

It might not seem like it, but plenty of places like this still exist all across the United States – places where people believe that if you work hard, and play by the rules, you should do well and your kids should do better.
It’s up to all of us in elected office to make that a reality. You have my word that I’ll work with anyone I can to make life better for Michiganders from Wyanotte to Grand Rapids, Petoskey to Jackson.
Thank you,
Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-mar25.epzXv3&refcode=em250317-1&t=2&akid=2256%2E135344%2EZ-EbTL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-mar25.sFsXfP&refcode=em250317-1&t=3&akid=2256%2E135344%2EZ-EbTL)**

You have my word that I’ll work with anyone I can to make life better for Michiganders from Wyanotte to Grand Rapids, Petoskey to Jackson. Thank you, Elissa 👋🏻 Wait, before you click away! 🇺🇸 United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests. What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread. But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly: | | ** | ** PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Support Hamas? Lose your visa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA _
body:
Anti-Jewish hatred should never be tolerated in the United States |
---
__

Peter,

As a newly sworn-in U.S. Senator, I know that time is short, and there is more news to consume than possible in a day, but I’m writing to ensure you saw a piece that caught my eye in the WSJ, which every major news outlet in the country has now picked up.

In short, President Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have revoked the green card of a Columbia University student who led the pro-Hamas movement on campus. These student-led “protests” in support of radical Islamic terrorism have destabilized the New York City university since October 2023.

You shouldn’t be able to come to this great nation and reap the benefits of a world-class education while spreading anti-Jewish hatred and openly supporting a terrorist organization, yet some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have taken to social media to decry the move by the administration as an attack on free speech; **it’s their new cause celebre.**
_**[Do you support President Trump’s policy of revoking green cards from foreign nationals who advocate hate and openly support terrorists?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9be7e78e6d51449d97284722139e8600&_e=Uzwxw6wA5rfF_k19ExiYrzAZcR4jsUPPZ8g1-BrKO3A5ZRu2eyRtdYmb135VsLdX4SDe3if4gwzkCKNmwCsQvPefQMBmBc2W930Bzx0ArS_sc0CICRxUAFV4PkbC4AgML9byIKl2l2q-nRAHPwCRSUwRCQzsru1fDmezkE6EGWRXfJWPQaXESUoqCx0lL7kFaCF1a3TbzR2CgoM1pC76PpyvdrIe4uBww5hrawNxu_Qj0EMynkVSiyOXT50rA5QJr_LgDayXfMnptUL3VtsZVhvEa-f9frWzpZ3nra6FMBJw7vusaH1Ij-Q91YCbEmjItCvPfhCycmV13WMNEAOP--gQ9oHUiRnJi4lWfw9nUqdaMYo34qz7syo5-_tLopzP3Apkzg91kJ4CoYSqhXk9sM0-pRSw3O9IQn9ZFS9PscZmuavFPdQ1OgHTM9ovVYZsxNVkXRbSFNQNv2PnwCzF00mp856slvm7PFvEOl36JO00Yp1EmOduFUKSbPf0Nc2u8PqN-QpqmrW6uSY4VJdQrfIMOX1pZ5tKr0eYcEBtiV0%3D) **_

name: JL Trahan

body:
Huffines, the undisputed champion of individual rights, liberty and fighter for the small businessman and woman has entered the arena for Texas State
| | [](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2105129.784.1.d19d317f10d89576476009fe762350a0)
---
[](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2105129.785.1.dd9ff44fe8c53475e6cfd38f9ed8b98d) |
---
# Huffines, the undisputed champion of individual rights, liberty and fighter for the small businessman and woman has entered the arena for Texas State Comptroller to DOGE Texas!
Don Huffines is a fearless lover of liberty and fighter for transparency in government. His business career is marked with big Texas sized successes and political career is known for "sunlight" or exposure to the public of all things government. WE WANT ANSWERS! And Don Huffines is the right man to help us get them from our government. How did Texas Comptroller's Office OVER COLLECT $53 Billion in taxes and return NONE of that to us? That's right, the RINO led Texas House RAISED our Texas budget to the highest level ever in history and the biggest one time state budget expansion EVER. They didn't do away with our property taxes and could have...they just jacked up our state budget to create more red tape and bureaucracy and government spending. We want to learn all we can from Don Huffines in this important luncheon. YOU should join BIZPAC and make a difference. Do it. Sincerely, JL Trahan
BIZPAC.us Founder and Executive Chairman
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2105129.786.1.8b70dae46d7312375f1844c5c14933b4) choose your membership level here:
---
Our state and federal legislators have targeted the small business owner with the bulk of the tax burden and regulatory. Their lobbyists have big corps paying almost zero tax and have turned their regulatory into secondary markets where they trade "credits" for cash and stick us with the bill. At BIZPAC, we have organized and are fighting back. Join with us and take control. Together, we are taking control and turning this around for small business owners.
---
## BIZPAC's Founders Club may be right for you
---
Join at the VIP Founders Club level and you and your guest never wait in line, pay a fee and you are invited to private briefings and exclusive receptions with only fellow VIP Founders Club Members. **We have 24 Luncheons and Receptions planned for 2025** **PLUS Special Events and trips to the Capital to work with our Legislators** **And** **the BIZPAC Center for Business Excellence Accelerator and PITCH ROOM**
---
|
---
| | Caption goes here
---
Caption goes here
---
| | [ Select your BIZPAC Membership ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2105129.787.1.f057fbb9fdbb92422c4bf957b996ce9c)
---
**It is time to renew your membership and we hope you will take advantage of this amazing offer.** **The small business owner is vulnerable alone, but, together we are strong.** **We are building an effective and amazing organization that fosters our business growth and guides our legislative bodies.** **-JL Trahan,**
**Founder & Executive Chairman**

# [Tell the Supreme Court: Don't let Trump end birthright citizenship](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea6e6e23-4be0-42b5-aed7-c2299d9dbfe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92e69f9b-2f89-4cc8-acf2-21432d6be57e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump is asking the Supreme Court to allow him to move forward with his plans to end birthright citizenship. Since his cruel and illegal executive order to end this constitutional right was blocked by lower courts, Trump’s administration is filing emergency appeals to circumvent those rulings. Trump’s efforts to end birthright citizenship are blatantly unconstitutional – even Trump’s hand-picked Supreme Court Justices should be able to see that. But we’ve seen this extremist court upend years of precedent before, and they could do it again. Birthright citizenship is enshrined in our Constitution and it must stay that way. [Join us in telling the Supreme Court: Don’t let Trump end birthright citizenship!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te16db787-5c83-44b8-8f29-e039080f609e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbtd0i361j7a72ebhmmr3p1nh59ffko24nl832p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j62ob6chh2bs "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvs7tkidsnrqkoj5m3nb4p7qmjcnd87c362hg8j8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j62ob6chh2bs "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z52m7etja5ga744tig7doptph8avvf2pkjrjlk0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j62ob6chh2bs "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm7vafbvjpbcdn2borgkgs8otncnj9p18o351500_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j62ob6chh2bs "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkr5cl0inqvhkcvn9as36uevk4n1p5sm39gmo13o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j62ob6chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4m93nd8cbm6jgohgmkioudna2ddord9e14g6fe0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j62ob6chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

clean_body: I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate. | | | | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support." Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting." If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?" It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | | "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. body:
Right-wing billionaires are using their fortunes to bankroll extreme Republicans and fund their self-serving agendas in the states. But here’s the good news: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$6,000,000.** That’s how much PACs tied to right-wing billionaire Elon Musk have dumped into Wisconsin’s all-important state Supreme Court race. **Let’s put that into perspective:**
* A **$6,000,000** investment could buy **well over half a million orders of Culver’s Cheese Curds.**
* A **$6,000,000** investment could buy **667,407 6-packs of Spotted Cow beer.**
* **$6,000,000** is the total of **857,142 donations of $7 to the DLCC** and our movement to elect state Dems.

[One $7 donation from you, paired with thousands will ensure our state Democrats across the country can continue competing against GOP mega-donors like Elon Musk. name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9980qf0jrhrgsjsj6ffv7fh2d1bu5mm3jd0g618_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6apj2chh2bs "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zghteldourt6srr3fee7pf42a61etpp46je4k55g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6apj2chh2bs "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zce34jt318v5itcaoqisi3jjt5u8kvu6tfef5uu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6apj2chh2bs "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zkau8hg0bkig7hj4aols5dug1jnisfl2s1pgclb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6apj2chh2bs "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zidi7245k5a6npulgbq7o5drm52kjth5davst7ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6apj2chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zd9blj9ae39c28m4taq0e9gtm2109e6dt5tn4s3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6apj2chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate. | | | | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support." Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting." If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?" It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | | "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. name: Nigel Bristow for Congress
subject: The People's Voice Weekly with Nigel Bristow
body:
For too long, Richard Hudson has been missing in action in our district.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://nigelbristowforcongress.com/so/92Or6VrMl/c?w=YhVhRowXpuPFjk5cWe7gip3CKU7b3HveLiYBRj0BxWE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uaWdlbGJyaXN0b3dmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vc28vOTJPcjZWck1sP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODkwYWE1MGUtYTI2My00MGUyLWJmNjgtYzA1MDQxZjY2ZjEyIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | The People's Voice
---
| | Fighting for You, Listening to You!
---
| | | |
---
| | Here's the million dollar question: Will Richard Hudson Show Up? I Will.
---
| |
---
| | Where is Richard Hudson?
---
| | For too long, Richard Hudson has been missing in action in our district. Now, when given the chance to meet with you—the people he is supposed to serve—he’s silent. As head of the NRCC, he even told his fellow Republicans to stop holding town halls. But we all know that’s not how democracy works. That’s why on March 20th, at the West Southern Pines Center Auditorium, I’ll be there—whether Richard Hudson shows up or not. I may not be on the official speaker list, but I’ll be working the crowd, talking with you, and answering any questions you have. You deserve a representative who is accessible, who listens, and who fights for your interests. That’s exactly the kind of leader I will be. I am campaigning to be a voice for the people—to advocate for:
✅ Affordable healthcare – No one should go bankrupt trying to stay alive.
✅ Protection from gun violence – Our families deserve to feel safe in schools, churches, and communities.
✅ Living wages – If you work hard, you should be able to provide for yourself and your family. Congress was created to be the voice of the people. You are the people. And if I’m elected, I will listen to you, understand your needs, and fight for you—not for special interests or party elites. So while Richard Hudson may continue to ignore this district, I won’t. I hope to see you on March 20th—stop by, introduce yourself, and let’s talk about the future we can build together. Yours in service,
Nigel Bristow

About "Death of the Dollar"**
****
**[__](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**[_These 42 powerful nations just launched the first-ever “Anti-Dollar Alliance”..._](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
And together, they plan to _**KILL**_ the greenback and _**DETHRONE**_ America once and for all.
Leading the charge are the usual suspects: Russia, China, Iran, and oil-soaked Saudi Arabia.
And because this alliance holds close to 70% of all US Dollars...
Ditching their holdings could flood America with a tsunami of US Dollars...
Triggering hyper-inflation and a Wall Street nosedive so deep, it VAPORIZES trillions in hard-earned retirement savings.
Peter Schiff, who famously predicted the housing crash, declares:

Congressman Scott FitzgeraldWisconsin’s 5th Congressional District

| FIRST: Ever since Mikie entered the race for New Jersey governor, she has held a lead in poll after poll. New Jerseyans know Mikie has what it takes to deliver solutions to the issues voters care about most and stand up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s attacks on New Jersey families. THEN: A new poll released this week shows Mikie still has an edge, but that 38% of voters still don’t know who she is and what she stands for. And with the share of voters who remain undecided plummeting from 52% to 23%, we can’t wait to reach out to those voters. NOW: We need to double down on our efforts to elect Mikie as our next governor. The latest poll shows that when New Jerseyans learn more about Mikie, they’re fired up to vote for her. But now with less than three months to go, our mission is to make sure we can introduce Mikie to more of the electorate and get her name out there. [Will you split $10 or more between our campaign and Blue Amp to help us reach undecided voters in all 21 counties across the state? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b8b4d24-2e8d-479a-9e81-848b72cdb7fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: The Washington Post just reported:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
BREAKING: Trump puts USPS on the chopping block [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2]

Peter, I can’t believe what I’m hearing: The Washington Post just reported that Donald Trump is considering a move to PRIVATIZE the USPS. The Post Office is one of our greatest national assets, and now Trump wants to dissolve their leadership. This is why I’m asking for your signature before midnight. Will you sign on to condemn Trump’s attack on our beloved Post Office? >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2]

Peter, this is too dire to ignore:
If Trump succeeds in privatizing the USPS, more than 51 million [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2] households and businesses in rural communities would have no guaranteed delivery of critical mail.
Will you take 10 seconds to sign my petition and help me condemn Trump’s attack on our Post Office? I can’t tell you how much I’m relying on your signature at this crucial moment. I need 8,000 signatures before midnight to reach my goal. Can I count on you? >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2]
NAME: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2] dpwillis67@gmail.com [#]SIGN ON BEFORE MIDNIGHT >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2]

Peter, I’ll tell it to you straight:

Instead of looking out for everyday folks, I’ve watched Trump and his MAGA allies use their Majority to...

... SLASH [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2] the health care our veterans fought for.

... IGNORE [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2] rising prices on the groceries our families rely on.

... ATTACK [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2] everything from the Department of Education to our beloved Post Office.

I won’t stand for it — and neither should you.

That’s why I’m asking 8,000 of my best supporters to step up before midnight and sign my petition to condemn Trump’s attacks on the Post Office. It would mean so much to me if you’d take 10 seconds to sign my petition. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2]

SIGN ON >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dBqV1s-d-U-naLfX-2batQ2]

Thank you so much for all you do,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I know what the Democrats are planning next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Their worst-kept secret

|
---
| | | I don't mean to alarm you, but I have some not-so-great news.

**I'm writing to you today because I know just how high the stakes are in the special elections that are just weeks away. **

As a member of the House GOP leadership, _I've seen firsthand the lengths to which Democrats will go to try and flip our seats and undermine our America First agenda. _
_Suffice it to say, they 'll play dirty to get what they want._
That's why I'm counting on your support to defend our crucial seats in FL-1 and FL-6. **[We can't afford to lose even one of these seats, or our Majority will be put in jeopardy, and our ability to pass crucial legislation will be severely hindered.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo7m54trfil9m3hhb4o44ahrvh5u491n1dj5ef2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6ep32c1h2bs "We can't afford to lose even one of these seats, or our Majority will be put in jeopardy, and our ability to pass crucial legislation will be severely hindered.")**

As someone who's been on the front lines of this fight, I can tell you that every dollar counts. We need your support to fuel our efforts on the ground and ensure that we're doing everything we can to protect our America First agenda.

---
| | | [CHIP IN TO SAVE THE HOUSE MAJORITY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb9hibvncdgh4uqu6lgboe2eo4dd77365upcika0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6ep32c1h2bs "CHIP IN TO SAVE THE HOUSE MAJORITY")
---

I've seen the Democrats' playbook, and I know they're pouring in resources to try and take us down.

**[The first special elections are just around the corner, and we need your support now. Will you chip in NOW to help keep the Left far away from these open seats?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5lko30s9gqbrv0i93l8q8jsilojebvugaj51epo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j6ep32c1h2bs "The first special elections are just around the corner, and we need your support now. Will you chip in NOW to help keep the Left far away from these open seats?")**

* * *
**__** **_Annie’s Original Message:_**

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtQPN9kEWITGu0HWNmw27arNBVdc_224XvfJpjhicPSERLzXb2IklTtHpLhxQ3-EqvNYkxPhh_xoh_vlUGWXVFst-tSXX55dddgNcnj7I2RTesmKIQqovTrdEgUNZaou2PWiXG5g_2VFbhXeatqQEJKO60zMR_wSYABDImxjUp4e687UvAn2JV7eAKPOJcr5JsRhuiE70KTxqyKFGpPNmiUjsKPvyouS8UvvimGx1DUU1iMIpb_3HOxbS2xC1LSlAx9gjvmj6zpuE358ZoSiu5a59sGhFPpKuhvHQkVWkotXba6PHjSdMO44AIVPv-v9uonw7c3d1Zc-uCE98sDKPvW1k5ck-jWxM2WHaoKLlIUbExJS_i-VNi4P1aHXGzxylhrIP19MCbWdbtszIj7d7w_gXMqgZhjVa4Gf8HEJsu-gA/4ev/t2_8mNKfSYiv_FAE3C_jpg/h2/h001.aYprpuWMdsFi1y70j81pzdwDJwkI1d3-Sy0Ed2DaBbg)
The health of our children is in peril as RFK Jr. leads our federal health department. Measles is a preventable disease that we should not have to worry about, and yet here we are.

We can’t just blame RFK Jr. Republican Senators like Dr. Bill Cassidy knew of RFK Jr.’s proven track record of spreading anti-vaccine misinformation and still confirmed him. NOW, measles is spreading at a rapid rate in Texas and we are stuck with a health leader who consistently undermines vaccines.

Chip in anything you can to our Call Out Dr. Cassidy Fund to hold him and the Republican senators accountable for putting anti-vaccine RFK Jr. in charge of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) amid a health crisis in America. **_[Chip in anything you can to our Call Out Dr. Cassidy Fund to hold him and the Republican senators accountable for putting anti-vaccine RFK Jr. in charge of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) amid a health crisis in America.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtQPN9kEWITGu0HWNmw27arNBVdc_224XvfJpjhicPSERLzXb2IklTtHpLhxQ3-EqvNYkxPhh_xoh_vlUGWXVFst-tSXX55dddgNcnj7I2RTesmKIQqovTrdEgUNZaou2PWiXG5g_2VFbhXeatqQEJKPJ1sG-6cccmA_eo0T1Mq4Y6kg1CM9si-8HnE2bnASbQ9voBEIS-c-7BtG3VpiwpWgmSMhcFQHW1R7TbmuO04mrevdkY1EvZFa66UDwwoSTSnE7cRJ8cYoeDiawrWa35_rBHeIDjCiZgVtaJQSBTy6BRiwn9bAYAXiUk011-ow1pej699PZ2_YaWwfuXFZlaqBKsH75Fid6wxivg4kId395PiROYV3c5j3UVi-owFX3CzeKkMbsL7CNOkkXxEiW563mW6CIvl2fW86wWXnIXU-A/4ev/t2_8mNKfSYiv_FAE3C_jpg/h3/h001.WbrJWlYBU49V_J2oS50SbvrZjDx4tFVaJg7u6oYy9AU)_**

As a doctor myself, it astounds me that Bill Cassidy, a doctor who did vaccine research, would bend to political pressure from Trump’s allies and confirm RFK Jr.

Cassidy said he would use his authority as Chairman of the Senate Committee that oversees the HHS to protect vaccines and to rebuff misinformation. But where is he now as RFK Jr. continues to spread dangerous misinformation?

RFK Jr. promoted Vitamin A as a way to manage measles, said it’s ‘almost impossible’ for an infectious disease to kill a healthy person, and tried to link measles to bad diets. Children are suffering from a preventable disease due to false rhetoric like this and it must be stopped.

**_[Together we must call out Dr. Cassidy to honor his commitment to public health and be held accountable for confirming the unqualified RFK Jr. to the highest healthcare position in the country. Join us in the fight today to safeguard the health of all children.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtQPN9kEWITGu0HWNmw27arNBVdc_224XvfJpjhicPSERLzXb2IklTtHpLhxQ3-EqvNYkxPhh_xoh_vlUGWXVFst-tSXX55dddgNcnj7I2RTesmKIQqovTrdEgUNZaou2PWiXG5g_2VFbhXeatqQEJKa2h_3GPlMsIvRtCArvXRDFOKzAziQmvf2fD7t87C1s9CpxIF7ytkyrNfFR5_a_VhREoXpCn9WyZ5hVLDj8dNhvvSV-8mJNruAr8xqbXnm0xyu_DBFO1DXQEmW5ifRPZLNvGi2gDwZYzdJGC13mLqjmWhOPLixJtYk5vn86dQOTWL7L6zGW-YWB0my90DYDREaJI0UM2UrCLjxmZDqLJVZcQ63ERmqLzPdy3z-yCHpt8_SyofVkJIeCnH8bGhEyfanDyInxyvn0Pdf8SsdBC6dA/4ev/t2_8mNKfSYiv_FAE3C_jpg/h5/h001.q5GjwRqrIVqzOPTrFEMm13w-xFszldRuuYT96DKTVck)_**

Until the kids are alright,

Annie Andrews

### This is how you handle the mainstream media!
Mar 17

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=159249302&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MjQ5MzAyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MjIyNTEzNywiZXhwIjoxNzQ0ODE3MTM3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KTZHAw8NMaT3p0hRw7NnjE9IYH6LAoAklyROdpquDoY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/chip-roy-shuts-down-cnn-fear-mongering?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Texas Rep. Chip Roy **[DEMOLISHED CNN host Kasie Hunt for making a false claim](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca653d0-214b-458f-b16d-f70b2dff80d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about President Trump & Elon Musk wanting to cut Social Security and Medicaid.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca653d0-214b-458f-b16d-f70b2dff80d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/653487a8-3732-4442-a0ae-736131c67691?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hunt asked Roy, "Would you be supportive of Elon Musk doing what he said he was going to do in that interview, which is to cut entitlements essentially?!"

Roy responded, "We are now dealing with the expansion population under Obama, where able-bodied individuals are getting 90% federal funding compared to the vulnerable and the elderly and the sick, who are only getting 50 to 75% because ObamaCare was structured in a bad way. You have an enormous amount of fraud under Medicaid! You have illegal aliens getting Medicaid!"
"Do you really think there's $700 billion worth of fraud and waste in Medicaid?" Hunt interrupted. "700 billion? I mean, it's the cost of the whole thing!"
Roy fired back "First of all, remember that we've gone from $4.5 trillion of spending Casey, in 2019 to $7 trillion in 2025. We've identified $1 trillion in improper payments. I worked in the Attorney General's office in Texas and the Medicaid fraud division there was very busy because of all the fraud! We can do a better job getting the actual dollars to the people who are supposed to get them!"
Watch the live clash right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca653d0-214b-458f-b16d-f70b2dff80d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Senator Kennedy SCHOOLS CNN clown Jake Tapper on Elon Musk's & DOGE's right to slash
Sen. John Kennedy **[defended Elon Musk's right to slash the federal government, ](https://substack.com/redirect/87224a14-af3c-4870-8094-e0f7a5b25f36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**strongly pushing back on CNN host Jake Tapper's suggestion that the tech billionaire created DOGE to seek personal gain.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/87224a14-af3c-4870-8094-e0f7a5b25f36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/87224a14-af3c-4870-8094-e0f7a5b25f36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Are you confident Musk is doing this for the reasons that President Trump says, purely to help this country, and not in anyway to help his America-based companies?" Tapper prompted Kennedy.
"Yes!" Kennedy answered Tapper clearly. "His work for President Trump has cost him a lot of money. I think Mr. Musk is doing it because money is important to him but some things are more important to him. I think he's like to leave something behind besides styrofoam."
"He's done more in a few weeks than I've seen anybody else do in 8 years up here," Kennedy continued. "I don't think anybody should be surprised. Trump said he was going to scrub the budget, and he's scrubbing the budget."
Critics of DOGE say that Musk's ongoing contracts with the federal government present a conflict of interest in his current role. Trump and his allies do not seem concerned about this, and have stood behind Musk amid harsh scrutiny from the media.
Watch Kennedy tell Tapper to his face exactly why Elon Musk is the right man for the job:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/87224a14-af3c-4870-8094-e0f7a5b25f36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump declares Biden's pardons void for "autopen" usage instead of physical signature
## **" It's not a real signature, and we're going to fix that mess fast."**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2cfb10ee-c46f-4643-9432-c7af56131d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump declared Monday that pardons issued by President Joe Biden using an autopen are now void, claiming they lack legal standing without a physical signature.
Speaking at a press conference at his Bedminster golf club, Trump argued that Biden's use of the autopen--a machine replicating a signature--for clemency documents during his final days in office invalidates them.
Trump, who took office Jan. 20, said his administration is reviewing all 102 pardons and commutations Biden granted after the November election, targeting those signed mechanically. "An autopen doesn't count," Trump said. "It's not a real signature, and we're going to fix that mess fast."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d488734-8d71-4927-8207-9dfa2548e47b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The President claimed that the the required pardoning documents were not approved by Biden, but likely by others who may be implicated in crimes.
"The necessary Pardoning Documents were not explained to, or approved by, Biden," he wrote. "He knew nothing about them, and the people that did may have committed a crime."
Trump further warned that members of the former Jan. 6 House select committee who were pardoned "subject to investigation at the highest level."
"Therefore, those on the Unselect Committee, who destroyed and deleted ALL evidence obtained during their two year Witch Hunt of me, and many other innocent people, should fully understand that they are subject to investigation at the highest level," Trump added.
The move could escalate Trump's plan to erase his predecessor's legacy, and threaten many of his political enemies with legal repercussions.
* * *

"
OECD's quarterly report is the first sweeping report to document and forecast the damage from Trump’s policies to America and its trading partners. The report shows what the stock market has been signaling for several weeks as they’ve rapidly fallen: Trump’s tariffs could choke the global economy and reignite inflation at a precarious time .

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrtsckugkcso87pid8f577cc9kmj00sonp3ohdq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j61o34cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0ddl61253aqh5gc88frpn7gitool8a0ji910j9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j61o34cth2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgjdbamrelpp6heuhet3c1i0pndic8bnimvlctu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9j61o34cth2bs)

clean_body: These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. **The Survivalist’s Machete Bundle – FREE** I'll keep this short. If you spend any time outdoors, you need a **good blade**. Whether you're clearing brush, chopping wood, or handling camp chores—**a machete is a survival essential**. But why settle for just one... When you can get **TWO badass machetes – absolutely FREE**? For a limited time, I’m giving away a **Steel River Cane Machete + Panga Machete**. These are **serious tools** —not some cheap knockoffs. Each one features: **✔ 18” stainless steel blades** – Tough, sharp, and ready for action **✔ Textured, no-slip handles** – Solid grip in any condition **✔ Protective nylon sheaths** – Keeps them safe and secure And to make this even better... **You're protected by a 60-day guarantee.** If you don’t love them, send them back for a full refund. No questions asked. All I ask is that you cover shipping, and these blades are yours. They’re going fast, so don’t wait.

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20693/6374453/f3b7311e2c7219ed18822ad75be68b0c1ef31a86/dac757e21ab745f035b279fa90baed535918eaf3)

There are **2 WEEKS** until the special elections in Florida’s First and Sixth Congressional Districts!

This isn’t just a huge moment for Florida — this is a huge moment for our Republican majority. If we fall short in Florida, our Republican majority in Washington is GONE!

body:
We must defend the work of Elon & DOGE

| | | Peter, I see dead people...

That's right - Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency exposed the unthinkable. Thousands of **DEAD INDIVIDUALS** are receiving government handouts.

Without DOGE, this insane waste of taxpayer dollars would otherwise go _**undiscovered, unnoticed, and unchecked. **_

Unfortunately, Democrats are coming after Elon and DOGE with everything they’ve got. They're launching lawsuits, blocking Elon from accessing federal government information, and trying to **dismantle DOGE COMPLETELY.**

Now is our moment to hold the line. We must act now to defend the heroic work of these Patriots, or else the corruption in D.C. will go on FOREVER. We’re not going to let that happen, Peter. [**Stand up with us, fight back, and help us defend Elon Musk and DOGE as they stand up for YOU.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Peter,

**Voting is now OPEN for our 2025 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award!**

This year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award nominees give us so much hope at a critical moment when Republicans are trying to take this country backwards. These EMILYs List state and local champions are fighting for the will of the American people every day, and their leadership is essential to holding Trump accountable and defending our most fundamental freedoms. And now we want to hear from you, Peter: Which of these trailblazers do you think should be our next Rising Star?

[**Read more about the nominees and add your vote for the 2025 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104007016/533969134/437708007?refcode=WUENE340_20250317_RIsingStarVoteOpen_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055822&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzRhYTQ4Yy00MjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0-DmVnD8jAwGQFwE1SdlqwnT-XWFVxUiW9ACwpwWXo=&emci=e64aa48c-4203-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e74aa48c-4203-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5177934)
**[VOTE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104007017/533969135/437708007?refcode=WUENE340_20250317_RIsingStarVoteOpen_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055822&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzRhYTQ4Yy00MjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0-DmVnD8jAwGQFwE1SdlqwnT-XWFVxUiW9ACwpwWXo=&emci=e64aa48c-4203-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e74aa48c-4203-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5177934)**
---
The nominees are Arizona state Sen. **Priya Sundareshan** , Georgia state Rep. **Jasmine Clark** , New Mexico state Sen. **Cindy Nava** , North Carolina state Rep. **Lindsey Prather** , Pennsylvania state Sen. **Amanda Cappelletti** , and Virginia state Del. **Adele McClure**.

When you visit the voting page to cast your vote, you'll be able to read more about each nominee and how she is leading in her community and making positive change from the ground up.

Voting is only open until **this Friday, March 21 at 11:59 p.m. ET** , and the winner will be announced in April.

We're thrilled to honor the groundbreaking work of these six nominees, but know that there's far more to come, and this is only the beginning of their greatness. Our advice: keep an eye on these women!

clean_body: We want to hear from you, Peter | Voting for our annual award celebrating state and local rising stars is now open! | Peter, Voting is now OPEN for our 2025 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award! This year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award nominees give us so much hope at a critical moment when Republicans are trying to take this country backwards. These EMILYs List state and local champions are fighting for the will of the American people every day, and their leadership is essential to holding Trump accountable and defending our most fundamental freedoms. And now we want to hear from you, Peter: Which of these trailblazers do you think should be our next Rising Star? The nominees are Arizona state Sen. Priya Sundareshan , Georgia state Rep. Jasmine Clark , New Mexico state Sen. Cindy Nava , North Carolina state Rep. Lindsey Prather , Pennsylvania state Sen. Amanda Cappelletti , and Virginia state Del. Adele McClure. When you visit the voting page to cast your vote, you'll be able to read more about each nominee and how she is leading in her community and making positive change from the ground up. Voting is only open until this Friday, March 21 at 11:59 p.m. ET , and the winner will be announced in April. We're thrilled to honor the groundbreaking work of these six nominees, but know that there's far more to come, and this is only the beginning of their greatness. Our advice: keep an eye on these women! Thank you for voting! Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Interim Vice President of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/bcpJXRlr_jHnVhq-4j7tVuOUNP3VC7rg3qk2JCbCOiRb7zH_dS7fToV0Pb2iOxDVRwGR7HZiE7vm-nR7ITVfi3XLEPVy-3DBsQ_ZjEeZKu6isY6Zug-I_jGu_9gK5_dmvlZOf-dQIzqnuAPVi6-wVYsUCI1Rr27b8K2dFzbUHLVYgKLAxlSPCgoGKjIQi-7VH8hip0_e4l6_T0HSIBqtrYoNXhfvV5R7WyX3YZmh5fUNB4wHl7mxF-l_xzNHA4gvNFrAbiE9toVIXGqSbwAJRU9LuzbXYmRxTfJWGZ74xE_5KbaPQ0pcfWY2RKSudEMQupRs4B96g3Q8l7Ju8DKjHqYLjeKZdtAVoB03rF0tO_5s4RGejMsYKzGhUe-dP2IguHljTr2hkISaqwXP_gvgYPZtzxlK2L5WHhVuiAqmmMvYBqpKUz8MDDjgEThTwwQ/K6AQVc_QEt6duQj9dvMsVjJW-9bGgAfy/7).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/hQIM6lQfi3yi0s45k9pSW8TOrUDN1lbI5dDFnI0kjMosxqSKla7pMD3TF-qB5Wqjn8CeHFsqSPYQlg2GK8EM_773M4LjpUkq59pCRa--wWKTHAVH1igeK1JXzlZUwY3uU6Q7T-qkRr5iJ2psePAWOcF7BH2vZ3Hi32GAuryVqw-OC7UKVZkAkcnKpzRrQRogsB4bDwR8rnI0a-9g03ax5Sa5biLCuIVEGKdDY4aCCntWAFMTDPMm8gybeN9lqnBQYqmjirC36VDlT5XB6e_28sH-qaF7EJzkpjgeR5JB745kOnSvwbifQSTZRQbhysaS4jtgCz9VLxeCN1av2uO2DELoiBWrJkJa8jMUIUidX2akb8HNx9mk97fo7TjeLxfPBit02wh1qkgB-jLvc0JSXyoz6LRdUFhLAPw-IiEvoFz7hJr890YZOLU6k33sbBs/JfFjlXeN0rpTFjVTRuG-DyAWWTVHoEMZ/7)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Even for Democrats, this is low
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA _
body:
Anti-Jewish hatred should never be tolerated in the United States |
---
__

Fellow American,

As a newly sworn-in U.S. Senator, I know that time is short, and there is more news to consume than possible in a day, but I’m writing to ensure you saw a piece that caught my eye in the WSJ, which every major news outlet in the country has now picked up.

In short, President Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have revoked the green card of a Columbia University student who led the pro-Hamas movement on campus. These student-led “protests” in support of radical Islamic terrorism have destabilized the New York City university since October 2023.

You shouldn’t be able to come to this great nation and reap the benefits of a world-class education while spreading anti-Jewish hatred and openly supporting a terrorist organization, yet some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have taken to social media to decry the move by the administration as an attack on free speech; **it’s their new cause celebre.**

clean_body: Anti-Jewish hatred should never be tolerated in the United States | Fellow American, As a newly sworn-in U.S. Senator, I know that time is short, and there is more news to consume than possible in a day, but I’m writing to ensure you saw a piece that caught my eye in the WSJ, which every major news outlet in the country has now picked up. In short, President Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have revoked the green card of a Columbia University student who led the pro-Hamas movement on campus. These student-led “protests” in support of radical Islamic terrorism have destabilized the New York City university since October 2023. You shouldn’t be able to come to this great nation and reap the benefits of a world-class education while spreading anti-Jewish hatred and openly supporting a terrorist organization, yet some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have taken to social media to decry the move by the administration as an attack on free speech; it’s their new cause celebre. Thank you, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/TUNTJgRij0TUMmja8FjanG1qxV2-I9M1AEkjQqwH4uSy_HLWhmLZjvYrbglRKCtd7thBm_iU7SIC7EsmIjB1u9Tj7LX2iLvPS1yJjOkPsrJz54We5j6eXMhWMJnbyNUMmxDxgpTY-DkTHJybYPWXTnNRzKf51ucyt2p8Kmd0mdO_9ygXjVYJLSWu4ZenyWY0sshc3R8WRxu85DYw_xrbZjtXr1oDSoftb-GCNFkmHIdggowA6l1cIcDwfjnusSgQ9UCuAzIvienypSDa_yLoBiXPn6DnUdUQg4gnlrZcOuLMsEe2aUpEs-d3rVpa6MA4jFlfcNBnKQnPNNFYZRmmEGfiGlALEGlte3aJvAFgmDg5BPigoY07XJL-T6bkAvzEIw4YDaOQpX8UH0bpEOhheRdnm3D3Iig1g_kkSxGNnIKW3y0Dp8pcTHgAvReNWN0/pNu3oAoSu3jvoArq6E-sUKZdpWQ5lFNO/7).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/qnYhkvqxtnFDI0LcFdMW1tuMgp6UbFr24P4PpobV3QTpWUUqaZsNDXfHKHD39QaD79dprA3aWnj9UYp6AAY0Ajl-JX9iOHzMoUIgSph4sD86POKxTd-0ZkcOObB57VkBADTJKRk7zLjMbEvpdElghleEbA7hZ3uAiwxJCvzwHT2Jjp3H0yqC4P_VHzzDusS6neubo91BIIIuIaOOpJp5mD0BnCCGBdRjDqcBlX30CwDQIMN0ikNI6-I9w0ksvkJVr_P-fTCBFKVGgHWPNpdobI7a1scrTeb8_GtKYn1BQ7FQ-imnFTtgwab_VvolEq-1CtCsjFNadDkVIBsuNyrzejruEIc7f8knseqgvbTlibiThHv5BAb-t81DuRxK42zzXb8kNfOOFK7DArhAd9olRgKsBlbItohGIK8YCik011smvHKo0x9r2V8htDrknBU/AgHc-2o_3Nb9db-jHmNso_gWZoDYn44L/7)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

Marie knows that people in Southwest Washington don’t want to see petty political fights, or foreign billionaires dismantling our government. They care about good schools, safe streets, and being able to afford eggs without reaching for the credit card. They want our government to function so that we can access the services we pay for. But while Marie is working to deliver real solutions to our district, we need to have her back against the attacks that have already launched against her. Rush $10 immediately: = Thank you for your commitment to Marie! Team Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by Marie for Congress Marie for Congress PO Box 1164 Washougal, WA 98671 United States

body:
You’re not going to believe this

|
---
| | | Folks - We've received word that 7 key Republican-held seats were rated as toss ups:
**AZ-06** - Juan Ciscomani
**CO-08** - Gabe Evans
**IA-01** - Mariannette Miller-Meeks
**MI-07** - Tom Barrett
**NY-18** - Mike Lawler
**PA-07** - Ryan Mackenzie
**VA-02** - Jen Kiggans
_**[If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, our conservative Majority will be lost, and with it, all the progress we've made toward a stronger, more prosperous America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06pp4hocd08502v0t3uplmboqfm3hcmipjuc7jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9gm8or0c3h2bs "If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, our conservative Majority will be lost, and with it, all the progress we've made toward a stronger, more prosperous America.")**_

**We're not just talking about a minor setback ... We're talking about a complete reversal of all our hard-won gains.** But we can't do this without you. _**[Every dollar you give will be used to launch a targeted effort to save these seats and protect our Majority.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9f6n9k7f5bhiplnhq2eh23vjmi1q8tk06adppv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9gm8or0c3h2bs "Every dollar you give will be used to launch a targeted effort to save these seats and protect our majority.")**_

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Can I get your response before I board Air Force One?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
We want to read your answers on my way to Mar-a-Lago!
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kdFu2yAUhp8G3xHhgwPNhS_SOW41qduiTYq2G4vCcUwFmNnYWff0lS03tz_fOfwfKB-dbd9LIh8JQGfNSAAIPxKA4xkuP3_hCSUNT_2JqhN-_bacwpcNneEOB60uL248zk_Pr-Nj9bfD_8V5zu94eo94h7dLd-iVdUsqq8yUoB9A6wzLXBYAIIv9Q9aVQuzz1rxKBFSSGZ0rFNIovdcawcAhsyUw2DOey1wwzvY7xTQrRG4Oh1axNi9IwW427EwflDNvaZh83OneZ67sUorjWqkmUI-opwF3NxsGNAtBoF5pGlSyyzTVvfc2JUT61moCtYu0a-mqQU1_RRp75-gs6AyE11PyjUdjJ094tbmKJRz7adBIeOVi42LTtVuulY_KXgPh1adTk4JultXb5hmarm3M2qtx8XOwDwlDIrxaLBMSEE1w1hBe_bleLmelnluxhusP8-r4_fdt_Pfy45ANpYk365wdhSQFuy411-eZS_gIAAD__3CMrH0)
---
How are you enjoying the Golden Age of America so far?
Over the past six weeks, we’ve delivered on promises like no Administration before.
**_America First NOW AND FOREVER!_**
My Department of Government Efficiency — or D.O.G.E. as I like calling it — is doing incredibly, but now I need your ideas on how to keep slashing the waste, fraud, and abuse.
**_[Let’s start with an easy question: Should I audit ALL FEDERAL CONTRACTS to ensure the American people are getting the best possible deal?>>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUFvpCAYhn8N3jD4wch48DBdxzabtLtNN5n0ZCjgSAPIKup2f_1G15nry_N9vA8IF6xpv0rEHxBAZ9SIABA9IYDTK1zefumz5tg_9mcszvr7y3oK33Z0hjvspbg82_E0Pz59jA_V707_Za9zdsfjV9B3eL801U4Yu6a8SlQJ8ghSJrrMOAMAzg7HpCsFYZQXRMu2kKxQRcu5zFjO1YfK1FGxxJRA4EBoxrOcUHJIBZGE5ZkqilaQNmOIkcX4VPVeWPUZh8mFVPYusWUXYxi3SjWCetRyGnS6GD9otRII6o3GXkSzTmPZO2di1Bp_thJBbQPuWrxpYNVfNQ69tXjO8QyI1lN0jdPKTA7RanfN13Dsp0FqRCsbGhuart1zKVwQ5uoRrW5OTfSyWVfvm2dourZRW6_Ghttg76P2EdFqtYwaQd54axSi1aV4WtzL23v1P9x-mFanH-_L-Of5Z5EMpQqLsdaMOUeMXNea2_PMJfwLAAD__31jq80)_**
**2025 DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (D.O.G.E.) POLL** **Participant ID #: 16452447-484** **Submission Status: [PENDING]**

[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP2ywQhn8NvhHhwTHJwYfs52Q_tUrbVSut9mQRGGK2gGmM7U1_fWXLm-vLM8P7gPTRWXOviHgiAK3VPQEg_EAADi_w-vMXHlHQ8NwdqTzil2_zKfy3oiM84KDk69n1h_H5_0v_VP9p8W_xMuYPPN0jPuD10g16ad2cijrTFagdKJVhlYsCAESx3WVtJYXZSy6M3gFnF7G_mBLN9sI0Yo6Il8xWwGDLeC7yknG23UimWFHmer83kpm8IAWbbNjoLkin39Nt8HGjOp-5qk0p9kulE4FTj2q44Way4YZ6JgicFpoGmew8TVXnvU0Jkb4bReDkIm0NXTSo7q5IY-ccHUs6AuGnIfnGo7aDJ7xeXcs57LvhppDw2sXGxaY1a66kj9JeA-H1p1OTgmrm1evmEZrWNHrp1bj4OdiFhCERXs-WCQmUTXBWE15_PZe_432Y3j6WcPlhXh--v039x_nHPrtVOk7WOduXghTsOtdcnmes4F8AAAD__9xerTQ)
It’s very important to me that we cut levels down to where they should be.
We’re spending your money after all!
That’s why I feel so strongly that you should have a say in this process before we go any further.

Over the past six weeks, we’ve delivered on promises like no Administration before. America First NOW AND FOREVER! My Department of Government Efficiency — or D.O.G.E. as I like calling it — is doing incredibly, but now I need your ideas on how to keep slashing the waste, fraud, and abuse. 2025 DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (D.O.G.E.) POLL Participant ID #: 16452447-484 Submission Status: [PENDING] It’s very important to me that we cut levels down to where they should be. We’re spending your money after all! That’s why I feel so strongly that you should have a say in this process before we go any further. Thank you and may God bless you, Donald J. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A story from the Jewel:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011717/533981656/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIxNGI3MS00OTAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgtXIBrWdZoPXgqfWEcZm9RArH6fHSkz4rA60445_dI=)
Peter, Let me tell you a story: I was at my local Jewel-Osco, and had just walked up to the meat counter. A kind lady came up and asked if I was hosting a town hall soon. I said, “Yes, I am. This weekend, actually.” She told me she was so thankful that I was listening to them. At which point our butcher leaned over the counter and said, “I’ll tune into that one.” This interaction was a testament to the importance of engaging with constituents and showing them that their voices matter. If Democrats want to take back the House, we need to do a better job of communicating, and actually speaking (and listening) to people who may not necessarily identify as “Democrats”, but Americans. **And Americans need to know about what Republicans are doing to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), and how these cuts will cause stores like our local Jewel to go out of business.** 30-40% of folks in our district pay for their groceries through SNAP. Over 42 million folks rely on SNAP across the country. And I’m no economist, but a store losing more than a third of its revenue usually forces them out of business. **In fact, estimates show that the planned cuts to the program could cost states _$20 billion annually._** A lot of members of Congress are ambitious people, but some sincerely lack a purpose beyond themselves. My purpose is to continue having conversations like the one in Jewel. It’s to continue engaging in conversations that build a path forward to prosperity for everyone who calls IL-17 home. And it’s to continue to fight for the support of our district over partisan political points. These months ahead, but I take pride in knowing that the people of IL-17 have someone in Congress willing to listen to and fight for them every step of the way. [**We’re two weeks out from our first major filing deadline of 2025. Can you contribute ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline so I can continue having these types of conversations, and help keep working folks first in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011719/533981657/1514584251?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIxNGI3MS00OTAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgtXIBrWdZoPXgqfWEcZm9RArH6fHSkz4rA60445_dI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011721/533981659/1514584251?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIxNGI3MS00OTAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgtXIBrWdZoPXgqfWEcZm9RArH6fHSkz4rA60445_dI=)
