At which point our butcher leaned over the counter and said, “I’ll tune into that one.” This interaction was a testament to the importance of engaging with constituents and showing them that their voices matter. If Democrats want to take back the House, we need to do a better job of communicating, and actually speaking (and listening) to people who may not necessarily identify as “Democrats”, but Americans. And Americans need to know about what Republicans are doing to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), and how these cuts will cause stores like our local Jewel to go out of business. 30-40% of folks in our district pay for their groceries through SNAP. Over 42 million folks rely on SNAP across the country. And I’m no economist, but a store losing more than a third of its revenue usually forces them out of business. In fact, estimates show that the planned cuts to the program could cost states $20 billion annually. A lot of members of Congress are ambitious people, but some sincerely lack a purpose beyond themselves. My purpose is to continue having conversations like the one in Jewel. It’s to continue engaging in conversations that build a path forward to prosperity for everyone who calls IL-17 home. And it’s to continue to fight for the support of our district over partisan political points. These months ahead, but I take pride in knowing that the people of IL-17 have someone in Congress willing to listen to and fight for them every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011765/533981711/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWYyMTRiNzEtNDkwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HXX41tdwWaOtndBkFwwfhYIoqFhTNxLj4BZACSYzthc=&emci=e9214b71-4903-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ef214b71-4903-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
**The Trump administration isn’t just dismantling the federal government—they are waging an unprecedented war on free speech.**
According to a New York Times report, federal agencies have flagged hundreds of so-called "woke words" that are now banned from official use.
**Here are just a few examples:**
Community | Belong | Equality
Clean Energy | Historically | Inclusive
Disabilities | Pollution | Female
Climate Science | Hate Speech | Native American
Women | Minority | Cultural differences
[**See the full list of words the Trump administration is trying to "ban"—then donate so COURIER can ensure that freedom of speech survives this dark moment.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011766/533981739/-1392131424?refcode=20250317_Banned_Words&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWYyMTRiNzEtNDkwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HXX41tdwWaOtndBkFwwfhYIoqFhTNxLj4BZACSYzthc=)
**[SEE THE "BANNED" WORDS& DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011767/533981767/-1392131424?refcode=20250317_Banned_Words&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWYyMTRiNzEtNDkwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HXX41tdwWaOtndBkFwwfhYIoqFhTNxLj4BZACSYzthc=)**
**The Trump administration is purging federal agencies of words, ideas, and policies that don’t fit their authoritarian agenda.**
And they’re counting on compliance—from the press, from institutions, and from the public.
**COURIER refuses to comply.**
At a time when:
* Jeff Bezos gutted The Washington Post editorial board, aligning it with Trump’s agenda.
* Disney laid off 6% of its news staff at ABC and shut down FiveThirtyEight, kneecapping investigative journalism when we need it most.
* CBS News is preparing to cave to Trump’s bogus 60 Minutes lawsuit, signaling yet another major media outlet afraid to stand up to Trump’s attacks.

**COURIER is standing firm.**
**We don’t answer to profits. We don’t soften our reporting out of fear. And we don’t put the truth behind a paywall.**
Instead, we deliver fact-based, unflinching journalism to millions of Americans where they already are—on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and email, cutting through the noise, the disinformation, and the mainstream media’s cowardice.
In just the past year, we’ve:
* Built a progressive media network reaching nearly 6 million people.
* Generated billions of social media impressions, ensuring the truth reaches those most at risk of disinformation.
* Expanded local newsrooms in key states, where Trump’s allies are working to consolidate power.

**This fight for free speech isn’t coming—it’s here. And if independent media doesn’t stand up, who will?**
[**We can’t let Trump erase reality. Donate now to help COURIER fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104011768/533981768/-1392131424?refcode=20250317_Banned_Words&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWYyMTRiNzEtNDkwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HXX41tdwWaOtndBkFwwfhYIoqFhTNxLj4BZACSYzthc=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You’re not going to believe this

|
---
| | | Folks - We've received word that 7 key Republican-held seats were rated as toss ups:
**AZ-06** - Juan Ciscomani
**CO-08** - Gabe Evans
**IA-01** - Mariannette Miller-Meeks
**MI-07** - Tom Barrett
**NY-18** - Mike Lawler
**PA-07** - Ryan Mackenzie
**VA-02** - Jen Kiggans
_**[If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, our conservative Majority will be lost, and with it, all the progress we've made toward a stronger, more prosperous America.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjk2030pt4dmi4hau946ermru29i0sgp723l09f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9gm4pb4cdh2bs "If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, our conservative Majority will be lost, and with it, all the progress we've made toward a stronger, more prosperous America.")**_

Everything we've worked for will be undone. _Democrats will seize control and dismantle our America First agenda, replacing it with a radical left-wing ideology that will CRIPPLE our nation._

**We're not just talking about a minor setback ... We're talking about a complete reversal of all our hard-won gains.** But we can't do this without you. _**[Every dollar you give will be used to launch a targeted effort to save these seats and protect our Majority.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z49afk7di2ieuvfvuitg5f8itldlfbo7leh0ncm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9gm4pb4cdh2bs "Every dollar you give will be used to launch a targeted effort to save these seats and protect our majority.")**_

We've made too much progress, and the stakes are too high. _**[That's why we're counting on you to rush an emergency donation today to help save our America First movement.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z40shll2eu9ioumpivdad64h1oa4ncr7d5ulmsb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9gm4pb4cdh2bs "That's why we’re counting on you to rush an emergency donation today to help save our America First movement. **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. Last November, billionaires and special interests – including Elon Musk’s super PAC – spent millions of dollars trying to defeat us.
Despite the surge in outside spending and strong national headwinds working against us, this grassroots coalition helped us hold one of the most competitive districts in the country – **one that Donald Trump carried by 2%.**
House Republicans are desperate to expand their majority, and they believe MI-08 is one of the best places to focus their efforts.
If we want to retake the gavel and put a meaningful check on Trump and Elon Musk, we cannot lose districts like MI-08. The future of Social Security, abortion rights, and our children’s educations could all come down to what happens right here – and that’s no exaggeration.
We’re on the Frontline, and we need to start preparing today:
[**One of the most consequential actions we can take right now to put a check on the administration is to win back the Majority in 2026. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll chip in a split $10 donation between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC to help me defend this seat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104013926/533988921/-805089004?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20250317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZmNTQwMGQtNGQwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vQXUeRnB7OlBDTeEHoChxsDInNsOh9y91PNZMpAM4o0=)

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Luck of the Irish🍀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=60707f4729&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Top o' the morning to you!

_If you’re enough lucky to be Irish... You’re lucky enough! _Happy St. Patrick’s Day. Most of the legislation I have sponsored this session has been voted out of the State Senate and sent to the House.

Last week, we voted out quite a few of my bills, including
* [SB 1227](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9843676489&e=a7ab36849c), school safety grant program to comply with cell phone policies in classrooms.
* [SB 1507](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=32fe2f7dea&e=a7ab36849c), establishing an independent office to monitor the Arizona Department of Corrections, Rehabilitation and Reentry.
* [SB 1658](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8ae09b2a65&e=a7ab36849c), providing an alternate educational pathway for certified veterinary technicians.
* [SB 1659](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b2483a5706&e=a7ab36849c), allows the highest ranking official of a school or school district to request information from the State Board of Education relating to allegations of conduct that, if true, constitutes grounds for disciplinary action before the SBE investigates the allegations or determines whether to take disciplinary action.
* [SB 1660](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7cb587c7b3&e=a7ab36849c), establishes the Sex Offender Surcharge Fund consisting of monies collected from additional assessments on sexual offenses and modifies the composition of the Sex Offender Management Board.

Later today, the Senate will vote out [SB 1234](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ee46f8a351&e=a7ab36849c), a bill to address the rise in animal cruelty cases. I went on [TV](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f0325e1406&e=a7ab36849c) this week to discuss this bill after a recent dog abandonment case in Surprise went viral.

Several of my bills have already been voted out of House committees. Last week, the [Motorcycle Safety Fund Continuation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b94c48c1ba&e=a7ab36849c) bill was voted out of the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure by a vote of 6-0. [SB 1105](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0cbe12cb34&e=a7ab36849c) ensuring medical marijuana dispensaries are not located near preschools went to the floor of the House and should receive a vote very soon. [SB 1206](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6834d9052f&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1255](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f331c85f6b&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1271](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dbf5a69afa&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1449](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5c30b66890&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1506](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8f3f1e498c&e=a7ab36849c), and [SB 1527](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8e7e1e835b&e=a7ab36849c) are all ready for House Caucus.

This week, quite a few of my victims rights bills will be heard in the House Committee on Government this Wednesday morning, including [SB 1103](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=172e836610&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1104](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=feaad4b70f&e=a7ab36849c), [SB 1220](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1f51989804&e=a7ab36849c), and [SB 1424](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bfae9ad599&e=a7ab36849c). [SB 1508](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c34167b448&e=a7ab36849c) designed to fight back against bullying in Arizona's K-12 schools will be heard in the House Committee on Education.

[SB 1627](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d056df24c6&e=a7ab36849c) hasn’t received a hearing in the House, yet. Once passed, this bill provides much needed government transparency. The bill would help offer insights into how rules and regulations are being interpreted and enforced. Please consider sending an [email](mailto:jchaplik@azleg.gov?subject=Please%20schedule%20a%20hearing%20for%20SB%201627&body=I%20demand%20more%20government%20transparency.%20This%20bill%20will%20help%20offer%20insights%20into%20how%20rules%20and%20regulations%20are%20being%20interpreted%20and%20enforced.%20%0A%0APlease%20add%20SB%201627%20to%20your%20agenda%20next%20week.%0A%0AThanks!) to the chair for the House Committee on Regulatory Oversight requesting a hearing next week.

Sadly, it has reached the point of our legislative session where personalities sometimes prevail over common sense policy. I am often reminded of one of U2’s songs called “Get Out of Your Own Way” around this time of the year.

_In the News_

Starter Home Legislation
https://www.kjzz.org/politics/2025-03-10/revived-starter-homes-act-advances-at-the-arizona-capitol

Cracking Down on Bullying
https://www.azsenaterepublicans.gov/post/senate-federalism-committee-sparks-solution-amid-fire-insurance-crisis-in-arizona

I have filed to run for another two-year term in 2026 representing Legislative District 2. If you live in District 2, [please sign my online nomination petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0d4dd374c5&e=a7ab36849c) that helps ensure my name appears on the Republican primary ballot. I need to collect several hundred signatures to qualify for the ballot. It only takes a minute or two to login to sign your name on my online nominate petition.

If you're so inclined, please [donate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dfb2f0c7f6&e=a7ab36849c) to our campaign. As you may know we had to raise close to $400,000 dollars last election to save this seat. If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, please [email me](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=Volunteer) and let me know how you'd like to help us secure this seat.

_May your heart be light and happy, may your smile be big and wide, and may your pockets always have a coin or two inside!_ Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

name: A Quick Poll [DOTL]
subject: re: Elon Musk buying MSNBC!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Only a few hours left to submit

|
---
**Peter is receiving this message because they have not completed our poll about Elon Musk’s proposed buyout of MSNBC!**

**Here’s the problem, Peter:** Trump gave Musk unrestricted access to Americans' private data and the power to cut critical federal programs like Social Security.

If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – **giving him control of both the federal government and the media.**

* Grew industrial production by **70%**
* Cut government debt by **a third**

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Reader, Most Americans have forgotten about President Calvin Coolidge. But in the 1920s, he launched an economic miracle that: Grew industrial production by 70% Cut government debt by a third And sent stocks soaring 265% It sparked America's greatest wealth boom in history.... Grew the number of millionaires in the U.S. by 2,000% Now, Trump is following Coolidge's exact playbook. Even better - he's combining it with a technological revolution that could dwarf the prosperity of the 1920s. As Trump says, we’re “in a NEW Golden Age of America.” To show you how to prosper during it, investment expert Alexander Green joins the world-famous journalist Bill O'Reilly to reveal why Trump's plan could mint 20 million NEW millionaires**. What’s more, Alex will reveal his top THREE stocks to take advantage of this new Golden Age of America... completely free of charge. name: Tim Kaine
subject: I filed legislation to un-do Trump’s tariffs on Canadian goods
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, I have officially filed legislation to un-do President Trump’s disastrous and wildly unpopular tariffs on Canadian goods.
Our legislation works by terminating the “emergency” that Trump declared on February 1st in order to launch his trade war with Canada — once we do that, we will have successfully eliminated the tariffs on Canadian imports that resulted from the declaration.
Americans have made it unmistakably clear that they do not support Trump’s reckless trade war and these tariffs on Canada — so it is incumbent on those who represent the American people in Congress to take action [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2nbaPbo-xUqo9A1ZnkH7DA2] !
Virginians and Americans all across the country want lower prices, not higher ones. They want economic growth, not recession. They want stability, not chaos.
But Trump’s senseless taxes are playing fast and loose with the American economy at the worst possible time.
When we bring this legislation to the Senate floor, I look forward to giving each of my GOP colleagues the opportunity to publicly answer one key question: Are you willing to put our economy above Trump’s worst impulses?
Right now, I’d be grateful for your support on this legislation: Will you sign my public petition saying you agree we need to end Trump’s tariffs on Canadian goods? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2nbaPbo-xUqo9A1ZnkH7DA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2nbaPbo-xUqo9A1ZnkH7DA2]
We will keep doing everything we possibly can to counter this lawless and reckless Administration — I’m grateful for your support in this work.
Thanks for speaking out.
-Tim Kaine

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: The answer may surprise you
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9ec0i060tdyjyu60jcxfvn18zqk3i393o032f0komnp0iuzetyldsy5ut8qvfd9jjc1qi3czaw1pp5dtr&__stmp=sta1uk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfuhdugjwt2i27aa9kp3cxpssgebbciwhdk6llz5s8jw35vmxw4d3yvrm5vaoi1swp704bzezvlmh4ln78tipll2xhke4ismjmkgwf8azfh8z6cliolzj1naazb8e62fq3zs1t49on5kym5jc3jn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfuhdugjwt2i27aa9kp3cxpscth5jugrzb5yb60eyxvqjs98nddjm5ljsazpftsusm9o593zc7fy78b60pxe0y8fmedd1gdmg1fbrn9n09ick4s6km3mw0jkpwl68lypcpoefjd97oha3l98zepj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sta1uk&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
| | | Hi Peter, I hope you saw my last email and took action to protect our wildlife and public safety! I'm reaching out to make a clarification on my past email. [HB 2978](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015775/533994415/-879382013?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) will not provide funding itself for wildlife crossings, as **it is a policy bill only** , but it will pave the way for wildlife crossing funding to be included in [SB 5541](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015777/533994417/-1607778674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), ODOT's budget bill. **[**If you haven't already, there's still time to take action in support of HB 2978!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015779/533994419/760167761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)**
---
[Take action now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015780/533994422/760167761?contactdata=BTo/z6oT2UG0IMORO9DkEaN9DZcqECxRbtJEAOmsSuzUX0XgwcV8iMwtFeZ0tbFBvp/Zi7Umlgnpcg769FnxMjr2StzFGpk+1cmbqkni7wVNr6WYeBSti05xjS5xEeb4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

Please reach out if you have any questions. Together,

Eliza Walton _(she/they)_ OLCV Coalition Director
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015781/533994423/760167761?contactdata=BTo/z6oT2UG0IMORO9DkEaN9DZcqECxRbtJEAOmsSuzUX0XgwcV8iMwtFeZ0tbFBvp/Zi7Umlgnpcg769FnxMjr2StzFGpk+1cmbqkni7wVNr6WYeBSti05xjS5xEeb4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, We’re lucky to live in a state full of wildlife. Yet, in the age of vehicles and roadways, our wildlife is at a great risk of vehicle collisions. Each year in Oregon there are over 7,000 wildlife-vehicle collisions reported, although the actual number of these collisions is likely much higher, as half or two-thirds of large mammal collisions go unreported. It’s time to make changes to protect our wildlife and for the safety of our public. [**Tell your representatives to support wildlife crossings!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015782/533994424/760167761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
[Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015783/533994425/760167761?contactdata=BTo/z6oT2UG0IMORO9DkEaN9DZcqECxRbtJEAOmsSuzUX0XgwcV8iMwtFeZ0tbFBvp/Zi7Umlgnpcg769FnxMjr2StzFGpk+1cmbqkni7wVNr6WYeBSti05xjS5xEeb4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
On Monday, March 17th, the House will vote on [HB 2978](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015784/533994426/-879382013?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), a bill that would minimize transportation impacts on wildlife through wildlife crossings, collaboration with Oregon Department of Fish and Wildlife (ODFW), training programs for staff, and resource sharing with agencies, Tribes, NGOs, academic Institutions & other community partners statewide. HB 2978 would lead to decreased collisions, and in turn, decreased costs, as seen with U.S. 97’s wildlife crossings. [ODFW expects these crossings on U.S. 97 to pay for themselves in just 10 to 12 years](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104015785/533994427/1763183872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkYTFhYzIwLTUxMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jl0Q7T8WgyE5QHqoET1Wh5geWL3uosqmbc5jLacCMB8=&emci=73f08fa1-4703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ada1ac20-5103-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230). Imagine what we could do if we passed HB 2978. Our wildlife deserves our protection and consideration in transportation designs, not only for their livelihood, but also for the deaths and hundreds of serious injuries that we face from these dangerous collisions. Let’s save the lives of thousands — both wildlife and people — each year by passing HB 2978! clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I hope you saw my last email and took action to protect our wildlife and public safety! I'm reaching out to make a clarification on my past email. will not provide funding itself for wildlife crossings, as it is a policy bill only , but it will pave the way for wildlife crossing funding to be included in , ODOT's budget bill. Please reach out if you have any questions. Together, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director Dear Peter, We’re lucky to live in a state full of wildlife. Yet, in the age of vehicles and roadways, our wildlife is at a great risk of vehicle collisions. Each year in Oregon there are over 7,000 wildlife-vehicle collisions reported, although the actual number of these collisions is likely much higher, as half or two-thirds of large mammal collisions go unreported. It’s time to make changes to protect our wildlife and for the safety of our public. On Monday, March 17th, the House will vote on , a bill that would minimize transportation impacts on wildlife through wildlife crossings, collaboration with Oregon Department of Fish and Wildlife (ODFW), training programs for staff, and resource sharing with agencies, Tribes, NGOs, academic Institutions & other community partners statewide. HB 2978 would lead to decreased collisions, and in turn, decreased costs, as seen with U.S. 97’s wildlife crossings. . Imagine what we could do if we passed HB 2978. Our wildlife deserves our protection and consideration in transportation designs, not only for their livelihood, but also for the deaths and hundreds of serious injuries that we face from these dangerous collisions. Let’s save the lives of thousands — both wildlife and people — each year by passing HB 2978! **** Now is our chance to secure funding for this necessary program for our wildlife, transportation, and public safety! Together, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: I know what working families need because I come from one
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104017526/533999113/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDcxZjdkMi01MjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM0Ee-w2tCk7GWNjVg-VGtcrosD4svVgO8DKIkDuAeI=&emci=e1f8a6cc-5203-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5071f7d2-5203-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
Peter, A lot of you might know this, but most folks don’t: while I’m running a full-fledged campaign for Congress by day, I’m also waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104017527/533999114/-1637803984?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDcxZjdkMi01MjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM0Ee-w2tCk7GWNjVg-VGtcrosD4svVgO8DKIkDuAeI=) The truth is, I grew up in a working-class family and don’t come from a lot of money. Life on the farm wasn’t always easy, and we weren’t strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough and competition with larger dairies got stiff. I also know I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- and that’s a big reason why I’m running for Congress. The ultra-rich already have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. **I know what working families need, because I’m part of one. If I’m elected, I’ll make policy that works for us -- not the elite.** That’s why I am running, and it’s why I need your support: [**This is a campaign powered by the people and for the working people of Wisconsin. Can I count on you to chip in today? We were one of the most competitive districts in 2024, and every single dollar matters to win in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104017528/533999115/-2080889167?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDcxZjdkMi01MjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM0Ee-w2tCk7GWNjVg-VGtcrosD4svVgO8DKIkDuAeI=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ****[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104017529/533999116/-2080889167?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDcxZjdkMi01MjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fM0Ee-w2tCk7GWNjVg-VGtcrosD4svVgO8DKIkDuAeI=)****

clean_body: | Peter, A lot of you might know this, but most folks don’t: while I’m running a full-fledged campaign for Congress by day, I’m also waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. = The truth is, I grew up in a working-class family and don’t come from a lot of money. Life on the farm wasn’t always easy, and we weren’t strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough and competition with larger dairies got stiff. I also know I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- and that’s a big reason why I’m running for Congress. The ultra-rich already have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. I know what working families need, because I’m part of one. If I’m elected, I’ll make policy that works for us -- not the elite. That’s why I am running, and it’s why I need your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= | = **** | | = | = **** | | = | = Thank you, Becca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI 54702 United States

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 8
| Our dynamic hosts have planned quite a road trip—a not-so-scenic look at a Tesla dealership near the White House with heavy traffic coming from the **crashing stock market** and **the** **tariff trade war.** They make a pit stop to observe the **continuing resolution** to stop a potential government shutdown and share their insight on the **iconic Latino lowrider culture**. | | **The NEGOP invites you to attend the _2025 Nebraska Republican Senators' Recognition Dinner_** Dear Republican Friends,

**TODAY IS THE DAY TO BUY YOUR TICKET **to the 2025 Nebraska Republican Senators’ Recognition Dinner, _NEBRASKA: A CALL TO GREATNESS_ _, _hosted by the Nebraska Republican Party, on March 27, 2025. Don’t miss out on this memorable event recognizing past and present greatness!

**BUY TICKETS TODAY: **
[https://secure.anedot.com/negop/events/electedofficials25](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b8d27509f5&e=25844e23a8)

See you there!
Angie Eberspacher
NEGOP Communications Director

**CHECK OUT THIS HALL OF FAME'S IRISH ROOTS! HAPPY ST. PATRICK'S DAY!** [](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7288fffefd&e=25844e23a8) _**WILLA CATHER**_
Inducted into the Nebraska Hall of Fame in 1962, the renowned American author **Willa Cather** was recognized for her novels of the immigrant pioneer experience. Her most notable works are My Ántonia, O Pioneers!, Song of the Lark, and One of Ours, which earned Cather her Pulitzer.

Cather had a notable connection to Ireland through her family heritage and scholarly interest in her work. While Cather herself was born in Virginia in 1873 and spent much of her life in the United States, her paternal ancestors were of Irish descent, having emigrated from Northern Ireland to America in the 18th century. This Irish lineage is often traced back to the Cather family’s roots in County Tyrone, particularly in the area near Limavady, which later became a focal point for Cather scholars.

Cather never visited Ireland during her lifetime, but her ancestral ties to the region influenced her identity and, indirectly, her writing. Her family’s migration story—from Ireland to Virginia and later to Nebraska—parallels the themes of displacement, immigration, and cultural adaptation that resonate in her novels, such as _My Ántonia_ and _O Pioneers!_. These works often explore the experiences of European immigrants on the American plains, a reflection of the broader Irish diaspora among other groups.

Though Cather’s direct engagement with Ireland was limited to her ancestry, her work has been embraced in Irish academic circles, and her family’s origins provide a compelling link between her American narratives and the Irish immigrant experience.
Get your tickets and tables soon!
[https://www.ne.gop/senatorsdinner25](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f45f454462&e=25844e23a8) **[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=51e89aa3cc&e=25844e23a8)

It's Maxine.
I am not afraid to confront extremists or demand more from the people who swore to protect our interests.
While the Democratic Party is acting rudderless, the Republican Party is gutting our most essential programs to fund tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104019493/534004720/458544607?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_170325_FR_DOGE_Cty-Party-Split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIwMjI3OGMtNTcwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C0-g7nxvTG3ZKDbYqJJAqeNG1f9603lkR8AGRIwM__c=)
Team,

We told you a couple days ago about our shifting mindset here at IDCCA. We aren’t taking chances on races, we’re prepared to take every single fight to the Republicans, and we’re going to do what we can to counter their extremist, MAGA apparatus with a movement of our own.

But to do that, we need you.

All politics is local, and Republican candidates without opposition can do more damage and hurt more people at the local level than they can at the federal level.

Why?

When those candidates are elected, they have more responsibilities, more free reign to make decisions, and fewer people to tell them no and hold them accountable. And while all eyes are on the chaos in Washington, these local MAGA extremists are able to pass their agendas here at home.

Which is why ensuring they don’t get elected at all is so crucial.

[**We’re countering Republicans by building up our movement, and that means supporting all of our county parties across the state. With just one contribution, you can benefit over 75 different county parties to make their work possible. | **Peter,

I don’t want to take up too much of your time, so here’s what you should know about this race:**

**1️⃣ **Working families need a real fighter in Washington right now. I’m running to protect good union jobs, make sure families can afford to live with dignity and defend the right to a living wage.

**2️⃣ **CA-40 is one of the most competitive races in the country, meaning this seat could be the race that determines who controls Congress.

**3️⃣ **While Trump and Musk are hurting working families and causing total chaos, my GOP opponent has been silent.

**Peter, we need leaders in Congress with a backbone. name: Gay Valimont
subject: MAGA is Defying Judges; We’ve Had Enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear Friends,
The Trump administration's decision to invoke the 1798 Alien Enemies Act— a law last utilized during World War II —to deport alleged Venezuelan gang members has raised significant legal and ethical concerns.
A federal judge issued a temporary restraining order to halt these deportations, emphasizing the importance of due process and adherence to contemporary legal standards, but Trump has defied this process time and time again in order to push the MAGA agenda.
We have 14 days until the most important elections , right after the presidential, take place, and we have the chance to put a huge check on Trump if this campaign goes through. But I need your help.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6862694356373962414E6A4F46585056774749686E79734D3578597172736C4344323530566E4F6962483036646C66576B416A7464635A322F2F64495444636A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-17%20at%2010.48.27%E2%80%AFAM.png]
As a community, we must advocate for immigration policies that balance national security with our foundational principles of justice and compassion. The use of archaic wartime laws to address modern immigration challenges sets a concerning precedent and risks undermining the rights of individuals seeking refuge and a better life in our country.
In Florida's 1st District, we have the opportunity to elect leaders who will champion fair and humane immigration reforms. Our campaign is committed to policies that ensure security while respecting the dignity and rights of all individuals.
Your support is crucial. Together, we can advocate for an America that upholds its values and offers hope to those seeking a brighter future. Pitch in $10 and help a campaign for the people, ran by the people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6862694356373962414E6A4F46585056774749686E79734D3578597172736C4344323530566E4F6962483036646C66576B416A7464635A322F2F64495444636A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-05%20at%202.24.04%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Without you, MAGA gets exactly what it wants.
Thank you for standing with us in this pivotal moment.
Warm regards,
Gay Valimont
Democratic Candidate for Congress
Florida's 1st District

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: I know the difference a union makes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Workers across the nation are under threat by Trump and the billionaires and the big corporations he empowers.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104019560/534004824/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzAyMjc4Yy01NzAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dtfNlZeUXe7b6Eu-KqvBneZnGpXIRoOvpGt0km6TogQ=&emci=d4d9d737-3f03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d302278c-5703-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)

| | As the son of a union machinist, I know the difference a union makes in delivering fair wages, strong workplace protections, and the dignity that every worker deserves. Unions don't just build better paychecks — they build stronger families and a fairer economy. **Recently, I joined my colleagues in reintroducing the PRO Act, bipartisan legislation that protects and strengthens the rights of workers in Oregon and nationwide to stand together and bargain for fairer wages, better benefits, and safer workplaces.** Workers across the nation are under attack by Trump and the billionaire-backed corporations he caters to. They're trying to slash wages, gut protections, and union bust. Passing the PRO Act would give power to America's workers to improve their working conditions with better pay, benefits, and safety through collectively bargaining for a better deal. Unions built the middle class, and they are the backbone of an economy that rewards and lifts up hard-working people.**I will never stop fighting for working families and ensuring they have every opportunity to succeed.** Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: A strong education is the foundation for a strong future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m fighting to ensure that every kid in Michigan has access to a quality public education that sets them up for lifelong success.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=154%2E181023%2EJ-PRj8)
A strong education system is the foundation for a strong future in Michigan, team.
As the daughter of two school teachers, I saw the importance of public education firsthand. My love for education, and the incredible teachers who do that hard work day in and day out, has grounded every step of my career.
At 35, I was appointed dean of Wayne State University Law School, becoming the youngest woman to lead an accredited law school in American history.
I didn’t take that honor for granted. I worked to raise money to ensure all students could pay for their education, lower costs by freezing tuition and expanding scholarships, and build a team rooted in honesty, integrity, and service to people.
**As a result, Wayne Law became one of the country’s leading law schools. I’m incredibly proud of that achievement.**
But it’s clear that there’s still more work to do to take us from the bottom ten in public education to the top ten. As a mom, I know how important it is to know you’re sending your child off for a world-class education.
**As governor, I will work to cut red tape, fully fund our schools, and help get Michigan in the top 10 states for public education.**
**[Let’s fight to give every kid in Michigan a strong education — no matter what zip code they’re born in. Add your name now to stand with me >>](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/public-education/?AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250317_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=154%2E181023%2EJ-PRj8)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/public-education/?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250317_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=154%2E181023%2EJ-PRj8)**
Let’s get to work!
— Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=2&akid=154%2E181023%2EJ-PRj8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=3&akid=154%2E181023%2EJ-PRj8)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

clean_body: Will you renew your House GOP Membership for 2025 right away? | | | | Hi Friend, It's Speaker Mike Johnson. I'm contacting you directly about your House Majority Membership. 🚨 As of today, your membership is "inactive". 🚨 "I need you on the team this year, Friend. We’ve got a lot of work to get done to save this country and none of it is possible without your help." I would hate to see you miss out on all the excitement we 're going to have this year. | | "RE-ACTIVATE MEMBERSHIP FOR 2025" | | "House Membership" You've been one of our biggest supporters, and all of the hard work you put in to get our House Republicans into office has not gone unnoticed. But our work is just beginning. That's why renewing your House Majority Membership for 2025 is so important. We're counting on your support as we go toe to toe with the radical left and fight to put AMERICA FIRST. "We simply can’t do it without you, Friend. Renew your membership before it’s too late!" | | "RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP FOR 2025" Thank you, and God bless, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). subject: Don’t lose hope.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Democrats in state legislatures are on the front lines making life more affordable. The DLCC is leaning in to fight back against whatever Trump and his authoritarian buddies throw our way. | | |
---
| |
---|---
While Donald Trump focuses on dismantling everyday services that Americans rely on, we know a lot of people are feeling discouraged, angry, or fearful. **But we are writing to you today to share a sentiment that’s resonating deeply with our movement:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd3_78pn3hJDDU0Aq8tV-ktnIDCDgguDOezcJRAParzLpaPPumOaZ0n2sqYs7-j9EiOMefnhlUsYJE0yN8VIv8nxezW_StorFpSJbrtl89y08qzPfge0UNkedFlue_J5LzIU6xOwBiPXVhjIutxFqeU12ygSs8x8ZcmApen4qgNHxUpM2hdL_ALABhtUwS0qqpbSywjE2hfOXsXgaVorG6jfa-pNHSEyyYNkthNRkuv3z2X25vIAB4YzVsWnLDiT07gMM0OtRaIZsbFDBk9RniN2-VewfzR2bf0j7m8QnCBxAJtSf-UDQjJSuD5dv5pdIv5U5se4yW80VNshX7Twncdwqt9mg3m6ezPBN1Bk-RSE9slGeIYxRcWrgD7wtV9mGBE675xsMydY--U76_D-vTxzZLpUBiaNyLOVWHcP00J0_AWf8sGI5TKmhr6HKBDKVCLb8_YTJb_dZFiBjXE3XIUo4evueHom95WisEg1EkCy6RJwm4nRzAijPqV8tjdOu9fAfl-xPxM9mr7Zd4POjUwvSKQrsByhEd68QHZtfvIQW1/4ev/in8pSLitT-a6ryV-lPQF-g/h0/h001.OsQiEt9JkuJwG6X5yT21nyKfWi_DaPCPclLXKlv6pYs) Now is the time to fight for American democracy against the Trump administration’s vicious attacks and think critically about our role in this historic moment. clean_body: | | Impeach President Donald Trump. | | | | | Friend, we've emailed you twice. We need your signature as soon as possible! Trump's administration is currently arguing to remove birthright citizenship, jeopardizing everybody's Constitutional rights. We MUST impeach him NOW!** | | | | Trump has violated the Constitution by attempting to abolish birthright citizenship and seizing Congress's power of the purse. Even Republican Members of Congress have spoken out against the illegal freeze of over a trillion dollars of spending appropriated by Congress. | | | | It's no surprise Path to Progress would be the first organization to do this. We're led by young Americans and engage millions of young people across the country. That's why we're willing to say it's time to put democracy ahead of decorum. Friend, Trump is flooding courts with unconstitutional orders which are harming millions of Americans. It's time we shift the narrative and go on the offensive. No matter who your Congressperson is, they have to be told that there's only one way out of this constitutional disaster, and they know it: IMPEACHMENT. Friend, join Path to Progress in calling for Trump's impeachment with Path to Progress today. If we do not fight for our future, this President will destroy it.** | | | | Thank you for your support, | | | Sam Weinberg Executive Director Path to Progress | | | | | Path to Progress Action Checks can be sent to : Path to Progress Action PO Box 34004Washington, D.C. Dear Friend,
---
We’re gearing up for a huge Memorial Day weekend, and we need **YOU** to be a part of it! On **Friday, May 23rd** , my friend **Russell Brand** and I are holding a **mass baptism** on **Santa Rosa Beach in Florida**. A great multitude of believers have already expressed excitement to publicly profess their faith in Jesus and be baptized. The next day, we’ll hold our **Revive in 25** revival in **Miami** , lifting up a shout of praise to heaven! And the worship doesn’t stop there — on **Wednesday, May 26th** , we’ll hold **another Florida revival** , this time in **Port St. Lucie**! **_WATCH THE REVIVE IN 25 WEEKEND PROMO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎_**

Trust me, you **NEED** to get to Florida for Memorial Day weekend. **God is at work, He’s on the move, and you can be a part of it!**

name: Team WFP
subject: Democrats caved. Trump capitalized
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, On Friday, in a sad display of cowardice, Senate Democratic leadership capitulated to Trump and Musk. TEN Democrats voted to clear the way for the GOP funding bill — which targets programs for working families like food assistance and education. They claimed that if they voted no, it would have empowered Trump and Musk to slash federal spending even more. **But guess what? Right after the vote, Trump and Musk made more cuts anyway.** Within hours of the budget being passed, Trump issued an executive order to eliminate agencies like the Institute of Museum and Library Services, the Interagency Council on Homelessness, the Minority Business Development Agency, and over a half-dozen more.1 Trump and MAGA Republicans want to ransack the government and steal health care from millions of families. The Senate Democrats willing to help them have lost the plot completely. And working families are the ones that will pay the price. **[We need to build an alternative force in American politics — one that puts working families first and will OPPOSE Trump and Musk, rather than wave the white flag at the first sign of conflict. If you’re with us, please help the Working Families Party take up the fight by making a donation today.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9UeORXHBApW8M-M1ZHIs2jLfZzEouhyepmqGTb8EcKw0Q4L_h4I-9plS7enk4jHFIRRiEGbWRk0E4meU6k_PTRCpCFxTCUFq1_XhQ0fKdjLQOoAPI_HtIf18TJf7blwcNUkGeXfHwNv1rPad6HGEEPACruf7i-u6FshbWZBrpMBFryVaJUe9RStB1YLehYpWtUU1wOAHwIrawqXBm8ufm8gU2ndMgo_55IWM-UdUoX6zNkEqq2FTpElIdRNmaDXExoEyj8jBKHx7GSjo3kHZvOXf12bqqg5a3YiJtwcjLogWjMri9c-z7dgKspi22dNCLmiALIB88PSpTcnF2CAfc2YuBc7JHrxZmGNoBe_gl0yybw4jijvW8uyIJMILD7r3jaCFmbghw5u6nEKPGY74CxA/4ev/AVTIDVyoQjuowIPPrc2YSA/h0/h001.ePa2ipuCEIGnyWQBDc0Cozxhp7f9eAO1uMp4D33nTqM)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9UeORXHBApW8M-M1ZHIs2jLfZzEouhyepmqGTb8EcKw0Q4L_h4I-9plS7enk4jHFIo0THWVbhwHLjOhBeQCNcsIN56Jjx_7xEJEiR5tn3gTsDfTR7kGsK7qyFaZOtHvctLcNFq0XRUn26nwJzh-eiMz8Y48AiTxCte5e_dZJYUNaN-Lrco1hevwjOtdu5hp18oaXJ05vvzWAOcdsz2YfKX6yUWwL-_EbT-IZAjFqvWwotbzTNcQhKzWisyIK8pJRwvLuUt_2-7c-5wf0ek9JtLEEHBqePz1Nq645pJ5pxNlIj7fjlxDtMHf3e9V8Ws851Rx4qsokzQrKfmmqylbGtKde5-KWCa8TLAY2H4syPoHoBcobphWN0xqhC85xVrkzgtvZYA73HKoUQ9aHHyebsFA/4ev/AVTIDVyoQjuowIPPrc2YSA/h1/h001.a67OHVtjtmzJ_ti2gbuSLym9_h3dfasIY0J4DcWwBpc)** Democratic leadership needs to realize that we can’t just sit back and wait until the next election. Voters are paying attention now, and they will remember who stood with working families in this moment, and who paved the way for more attacks and cuts from Trump and Musk. **The time for a real opposition party is _now_.** Thank you for joining us in this fight, Team WFP Source: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, On Friday, in a sad display of cowardice, Senate Democratic leadership capitulated to Trump and Musk. TEN Democrats voted to clear the way for the GOP funding bill — which targets programs for working families like food assistance and education. They claimed that if they voted no, it would have empowered Trump and Musk to slash federal spending even more. But guess what? Right after the vote, Trump and Musk made more cuts anyway. Within hours of the budget being passed, Trump issued an executive order to eliminate agencies like the Institute of Museum and Library Services, the Interagency Council on Homelessness, the Minority Business Development Agency, and over a half-dozen more.1 Trump and MAGA Republicans want to ransack the government and steal health care from millions of families. The Senate Democrats willing to help them have lost the plot completely. And working families are the ones that will pay the price. Democratic leadership needs to realize that we can’t just sit back and wait until the next election. Voters are paying attention now, and they will remember who stood with working families in this moment, and who paved the way for more attacks and cuts from Trump and Musk. The time for a real opposition party is now. Thank you for joining us in this fight, Team WFP Source: 1\. , Jake Sherman (Punchbowl News) on Twitter, March 15, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Team Tina
subject: Getting better results from our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
With stronger accountability for districts, schools, and the state, we can ensure students succeed across Oregon. |
#
---
Peter, Governor Tina Kotek is deeply committed to improving schools across Oregon. She’s committed to increasing funding for schools, leading a historic investment in the State School Fund. But it doesn’t stop there: Tina is _also_ making sure that money is being spent responsibly to best improve schools for students, families, and teachers. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104021558/534011460/1162032635?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVhZDFkYi01YjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=275gy1k_qlHGmOxTPdJ6NUCjj5BYTlv9PmzGbliQsTw=&emci=7dead1db-5b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=80ead1db-5b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729) When Oregon’s education system is not delivering for students, we cannot keep doing the same thing and hope for different results. Tina has made it clear: **Increased investment _must_ come with better results for Oregon students.** With stronger accountability for districts, schools, and the state, **we can ensure students succeed across Oregon.** [**Show your support for Tina’s plans to improve accountability and results in the Oregon education system — add your name today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104021559/534011467/1852020277?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVhZDFkYi01YjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=275gy1k_qlHGmOxTPdJ6NUCjj5BYTlv9PmzGbliQsTw=&emci=7dead1db-5b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=80ead1db-5b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729) | [SUPPORT OUR SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104021560/534011474/1162032635?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250317_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVhZDFkYi01YjAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=275gy1k_qlHGmOxTPdJ6NUCjj5BYTlv9PmzGbliQsTw=&emci=7dead1db-5b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=80ead1db-5b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)

name: Marine Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi. Always faithful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m running for Governor of Virginia – to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way – a beacon of hope.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=aea0f23e3ccf46a3a2380d9b0dc54a77&_e=de5dp0fYRkeZ374yUO1iRNm_mNTFLcbr-K7Lz0lNn3zhhrF7jmewmhlRR0ocfCeOkkZaBPNCUqj5gsCkXre2391Q93p48v-Tl9zUof5vDIdToc3QrQfvwAIayam0yqox9Yan5ry6dw4zMgC3zWwAyS8SZyrmbUnAy7QfFfzQKmDococEONnfGOmnIiwTAUUHonoM0diSgjtZAUcrT52QEuCs4lJutiBCX_ev5qre7wWO4qtd56UkD5FHl5XsO7HxcqLVZ8btsXt_rtCzxZuFkZ9JxF_Ego04ApgnYL0q1geUVGomZbcjV7oLBF4nphd98slfcKNHqZxUwD5WbpGQv55qEx_U1LKDMAn08TprqVPMkECSChVEESacghJOiHmA)

**Semper Fi._Always faithful._** I often get asked, _" Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?"_
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=aea0f23e3ccf46a3a2380d9b0dc54a77&_e=de5dp0fYRkeZ374yUO1iRNm_mNTFLcbr-K7Lz0lNn3zhhrF7jmewmhlRR0ocfCeOkkZaBPNCUqj5gsCkXre2391Q93p48v-Tl9zUof5vDIdToc3QrQfvwAIayam0yqox9Yan5ry6dw4zMgC3zWwAyS8SZyrmbUnAy7QfFfzQKmDococEONnfGOmnIiwTAUUHonoM0diSgjtZAUcrT52QEuCs4lJutiBCX_ev5qre7wWegW9e9E6AcTdLgqdDAFFBLq7-XgvpcEPvyqKaegRJxpo17r1LnJ_SIqyWfKyDMz9l8CfH_0PBWA7OvmkagVSoA8VgTiIKxod2BWgc-GocEJZCY9MRSCSO5F4j79jbnZTBuMfac2h1iWfe1fSzkOxh)
---
And to that, I say **absolutely.** Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, **and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:**-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old.
-I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician.
-I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: _**my story is only possible in America.**_ And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.

_But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children._**Not on my watch. ** _**[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today--even if it's just a few bucks--to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=aea0f23e3ccf46a3a2380d9b0dc54a77&_e=de5dp0fYRkeZ374yUO1iRNm_mNTFLcbr-K7Lz0lNn3zhhrF7jmewmhlRR0ocfCeOkkZaBPNCUqj5gsCkXre2391Q93p48v-Tl9zUof5vDIdToc3QrQfvwAIayam0yqox9Yan5ry6dw4zMgC3zWwAyS8SZyrmbUnAy7QfFfzQKmDococEONnfGOmnIiwTAUUHonoM0diSgjtZAUcrT52QEuCs4lJutiBCX_ev5qre7wW-ZBRHfNofAwvDFMPlEjOxm6LQclfRgIbwJj3ifBzOLd-gc8fBRggXby93pnW2njh0C8uRVcSmyGQNMNrtESDfZvehIC5cZZCs_UK-9t3enkZmEY5OnQ8aorJp3h7TQIqTj-_7yBqjDtpSaYN5sb7_)**_
---
[ **CHIP IN HERE >>**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=aea0f23e3ccf46a3a2380d9b0dc54a77&_e=de5dp0fYRkeZ374yUO1iRNm_mNTFLcbr-K7Lz0lNn3zhhrF7jmewmhlRR0ocfCeOkkZaBPNCUqj5gsCkXre2391Q93p48v-Tl9zUof5vDIdToc3QrQfvwAIayam0yqox9Yan5ry6dw4zMgC3zWwAyS8SZyrmbUnAy7QfFfzQKmDococEONnfGOmnIiwTAUUHonoM0diSgjtZAUcrT52QEuCs4lJutiBCX_ev5qre7wWRWBCGpkLv3hr27B4D50Fsjl8486_7yeQqsJiXe2elvoI1RXjUqQ6PfjQpuh5dW-byeM6HIxoxqku9MYRzOCNoul4deu-KeeJ6Z7O_TnlE-9JM3zMhKUT4Ph73IQMsanH_lwJZuv-gq95bi98uXWIm)

clean_body: I’m running for Governor of Virginia – to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way – a beacon of hope. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. | | | | | | | | | Semper Fi.Always faithful. I often get asked, " Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to all of us conservatives working together to win. | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Elon and I both immigrated to the US, but only one of us bothered to learn the law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Nearly every day, Elon Musk spreads dangerous misinformation
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1540%2E791427%2EXy5v37)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3092?t=2&akid=1540%2E791427%2EXy5v37)
Friend — Nearly every day, Elon Musk spreads dangerous misinformation. Here, he is claiming that simply informing people of their constitutional rights is somehow illegal.
**Elon Musk and I both immigrated to the US, but clearly only one of us bothered to learn the law.**
So let me set the record straight: Immigrants, even undocumented ones, are entitled to certain rights under the constitution. It’s my job as an elected official to make sure people in my district know their rights, and Elon will never stop me from doing that job.
But Elon’s on a power trip right now, consolidating more and more power into his hands despite the fact that he’s never received a single vote or been appointed to any office. He and Trump are working together to enrich themselves and their oligarch friends at America’s expense.
So, I asked you this when Musk attacked me the first time, and I’m asking you again today:
**[Can you make a contribution today to help me fight back against Trump, Musk, and the oligarchy trying to take over our government? We need all hands on deck to take on this constitutional crises and the billionaires trying to rip off the American people.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250317-1-120&t=3&akid=1540%2E791427%2EXy5v37)

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/U3U5wI4mKprifTt9XnXOwINplMQqH-I26JN7cX4Bk8D1ZG84Z3g7xlsk7gb1zoNpZxvcd1DAobzKThJ0o2tX-4wwsvYHAnexlJ-uTUGFILD6B1QUciyODLG6CE7rN1TozpYgfbRs4HBw1eipPoFLKb0odKWvzVh6SF515V-q18M2hhHuoNKOqyPuD6NUcEDc29fErT-naL_r0I_2WNbMTtqED5SnSwYMLG8qxk8Uqb9n_8TsbdB9lmWrCsBNEWczuJ5qvY556AYqecVcBn_6ZHiXmXQiZqbcTWwHOp33fl8x6DWHW7Ci20FKGO5xpIkEb2VDi0SSe0H12tbk6W7IjevQVFZ2hTg7swLEA_XBa0hVFKXGOjVFVBYspGIto_skPbb2-V_5DbaBzJk5gsfyHInEx1bc5FZGte-NeWAwR0hxbb8dNA-WzSamZewhOe-DHO-qhd34WxrJgPdcAGXtzpWwJco8ED6fqmn7cQyzWD2dyaZih2w_okE8UA/Snx8xdlAaqTPWHuDM7ep99-_sTTyV-XH/7)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/XdVbiYM95w6Lt2iLvBU48FxOvJtbDc-0P4nhDytv_PxPqgt8NrWgLHPWafGAjTQaljUI4O7Ipynx0L8TlVCsSuBDmv3PBownObnlCiQU_h-zRo1UYcZ754Kgw4szAyOlQdkbuKZVNGX3ArSsgz2b0SA9l6PwiiDsrMGJ2NRPJ69rtq38pDTuoQ1JFq_cGHeqLQr8ImZ-0SZDOljQP9KIYG3WWVL3U-avY1mnd8uw8kPq66WnQT35yIub1xNkNh5rCx_NTlVZ39Q4netftVpqdn6fPhcu5eIZMX0Ukz6GrLzO00wLnOcgzI1poMjCLHPSFcPGIE1LRTEWT-hJMEVbI0JWc__ut6yTjbLB93gNH1gJfAFCzic5PnF5ZCs0aSM4AmEb4kKUOB5D4pnOzAK9Lsz4xz2NoYfr_WsKBS7g8wIGjPYusTOLpYKi5Qh1L2yIF_3Ei0d8vEj8rb4Bzl-19a1RiPyf3O2ZEbOJepxy6tEnoLb5sU_NMK6G4A/JBe75YJ61P91rzMLgXd0a4qJ_tlOP4m-/7)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/0S7qgke0QUwj8Yor4V2s2IAGAlIb3GlhJM-XoRhpgxkKfNahQ_0jw4tnHvF08O1oJCau_g9bpAYzfvyz622wdE4phKN-kEV9Tpf2_4OAquxoUjGpu-e04tbFQYm-gupXqHrqXfhSQKBpHL55_GPPuVXC_MXfkJxisq2V5yUzek1Hk37ZcOCu8v2M6b9dakdYy3YIdzbY8WUWIwi1OKRzsuRSlBhNrJbnJgqmQLrUKfByXl6MZSLzcoLxmrvJIyJdHTXwvYqfqHc2sfcJhl8Fe6v_JrS-7RC9ri4O34jO8y-brUClcO9QwHo9t8u_GCOKN5BOPviARCI_xlwYTK2CQIr-7d9NJo2Gw6V4vjmMUiAEshIC31kYZ1rw2g7l6yrYXlx7QWLHpgcvx71Pw0QIeOipZNgYrSw4ofa2Tudra_7sEIZCIDrdYr-uE5yQHfs1L0cX7XYgflnyBvixYpNCLb25hB-Xr4GoOTI98reOWA5WKHjRsjZ5lKcE8g/e6kt2dA3CQDZEUdqfmgBzZt58ni9AG16/7)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/imgIO61XoLd8HBTw-mY-GHyPmvBmu1NVPBhKS1DiYU85D6Znc1TSBpt-AlE2eXJqmaoh6vfHLVVYtNIhK7fKD87DWQPWg5gcLhsrhLq8-5BuXxC73kO0UytYh_-aQljgCWYKN4yjmxanSRQ6gqBLW3whfxH7m5ID3Jjo9xFwjbGFBTqXm38yLXyoUcxIXNrAxCLoAh5hXRIGPiAtH2WnNdmlvte9lZo_QHAhGtDqwTLj3uq7K7E2wHswYI3JjoXMfhcrPg46ektSHn95_f9Z0VVAS1xgzkLU6aM43DWyg84sDmw7uJERRrR7Nr0sp2Mdj6jeaNZO404Pk1gSttWc_wWaEMGdE023cgq7E0FdbAhkDulN-BM8-JyI36oHzWUHPoRKQnm87n8tsPhMRg9Rv3C6PE2Wo8GkLz9SZRucOp-G1NSgqdQaGzO9D-6EzVO_hfBApA7lkRRwxJfw7k_uLHoDX_oex-ZPiTw4pQdAfLjCNYiQVbLtpoKyYQ/I8NTDMpWT5jCUQXUPufPfmGlS0cwyWoM/7)**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/iVuGrRSEYz8TKGVtgY4bMyao3_geiK_OF9eViEvBCbEfU6e5vTSLKxyfhtg4eb7nWqkdIpZLJu35yzTE8gOkFyIKnP-Ula_RM5GWxjenVse2LsflFEYHcs_vpn494nbUda-EiuWawNfoPuV7xhnSIASws2vh_OBU1biqNVUqcF7YXf3W7zwn2WTEV-imQf46HicD4t1k4SQpj7E2d2mVLFfu4ogheojoFGXUqAAQmhEZy_S0G3aSXy4aykw8sSS4DfHm_CI6MiZS3WuS1yYzfkI6pnk28XWqGxVnrD3GjOplg-q0QFyKZ5VUmFLlEy9H_MTvK-WXYVuSl0wF0f9SDZsifvfF3LAPLMbonL3dEnA3-4JzJIF5PlsQUqpTMTkTRapRMl897PS5Tty4ZSwSiCAnCY2YyX_w1s085Xi_7hSzlzLlEdofVXRNwE_q5ADKPbJ__yL3pQaQqfRM7AMN7oB4wDZRcpdElLDXY8Qy6VyUvNVEaFX2bl2Udw/aNdwrqz9UCP6M5P6i8w1Hyz70KI2IWro/7)

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81b360013316427b95fc35f71b1d761b&_e=t7I4mkp2Z8DC9dhV4zzNYFFbb9EMxrZ0EQzNgp6DFhKCPIfkzi7PCL5z6Yhu7BVfUk2H1p3ipLd75-6XILM5yxmQEU-dmq4ByG5cilBmF8mbb4sp9Pj1_fqi_VQIlA2O3deWxBHOUGuOR3j3r31gL_4NYXOgZ02r5nWEfI7M6ei9i21e0Yz6xiy6T-cc6woJDTrptJ4kNgVfQaIeHc2twNLdVIBFlYXoDCuxJaVL9M9p24wTzWPLKT49i4YAjnoisCiMDNGhERfjHq1dRqOzBkIhovTHtGdQG6FQrWMOMRll8OFPCYos2QwcLvnk4WQdOlcQTiR0QMtXBgyYcyjLcNVZ4x5LuoVjmfVqg9Tm4jw8X5OoeXHLtoBdb7f-4XLvMsWbMFyZfB6yukofFo3OdzpjNOvQ5WdCP6Ebg0PgjXU0Ze6rAwkUR7g_o-KwJUXu)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=81b360013316427b95fc35f71b1d761b&_e=t7I4mkp2Z8DC9dhV4zzNYFFbb9EMxrZ0EQzNgp6DFhKCPIfkzi7PCL5z6Yhu7BVfUk2H1p3ipLd75-6XILM5yxmQEU-dmq4ByG5cilBmF8mbb4sp9Pj1_fqi_VQIlA2O3deWxBHOUGuOR3j3r31gL_4NYXOgZ02r5nWEfI7M6ei9i21e0Yz6xiy6T-cc6woJDTrptJ4kNgVfQaIeHc2twNLdVIBFlYXoDCuxJaVL9M9p24wTzWPLKT49i4YAjnoisCiMDNGhERfjHq1dRqOzBkIhovTHtGdQG6FQrWMOMRliWLo37EleOwisT8YdAa4-ODLAgzCAmcYshOkyvGKUbn2YUfg1mLIBzVS_xeQeD-vUSq9luImE5PaFU0nb4bBj15AHwm7wrqvsA98vAmSHkSlDc-7kXzIf9JMnwvmSnOW2D9C8jCCVUjgntbhWKLos)
