name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: [photos attached] Celebrating St. Patrick’s Day with our community! ☘️
body:
|
#
Hi there, happy Saint Patrick’s Day! Yesterday, I joined what I think is the best parade in the country – the Bay City St. Patrick’s Day parade! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104030412/534039618/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmYxYjkyZC03NDAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0a3sPqM053npQduBY27ZoOpK7ZQrWCrr3wHlG648jY=) _Thank you to our grassroots supporters for marching with us!_ This year marked the **70th anniversary** of the Bay City St. Patrick’s Day Parade, and just like every year, it brought out the best of our community. From our local small businesses to community groups and organizations, it was wonderful to see everybody showing up to support each other. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104030413/534039619/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmYxYjkyZC03NDAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0a3sPqM053npQduBY27ZoOpK7ZQrWCrr3wHlG648jY=) Events like this always remind me what makes Mid-Michigan special – the people who call it home. And as we tackle challenges in Washington, the conversations I’ve had with folks here will continue to guide my priorities. Whether you’re spending the day with a laptop at a desk or a Guiness in your local pub, I hope your day is filled with laughter, good company, and maybe even a little luck! Sláinte! 💚 Kristen **P.S.** We’re just two weeks away from our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since being sworn in, and we’re falling a wee bit short of our goal. [**$3 from you would go a long way!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104030414/534039620/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmYxYjkyZC03NDAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0a3sPqM053npQduBY27ZoOpK7ZQrWCrr3wHlG648jY=) | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104030415/534039621/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmYxYjkyZC03NDAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0a3sPqM053npQduBY27ZoOpK7ZQrWCrr3wHlG648jY=)

body:

We can finally stop Trump's reign of terror and hold him accountable - but only if we get 1,5OO Democrat signatures TODAY. [**_Add your name before 11:59 p.m. to demand Congress IMPEACH Donald Trump >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60222?t=4&akid=22931%2E4449941%2EiXI_KY) | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60222?t=5&akid=22931%2E4449941%2EiXI_KY)
---
In just his first two months, Trump has already left a path of terror, destruction, and chaos.

He's **pardoned** every single January 6th rioter, **accused** USAID of being corrupt and dismantled it, **investigated** FBI agents who worked on Jan. 6 cases, **froze** funding for Medicare, Social Security, and more, enacted **tariffs** on our allies, Canada and Mexico, gave **Elon Musk unlimited access** to government servers, **withdrew** from the World Health Organization and the Paris Climate Agreement, and **MORE**.

We're TERRIFIED about what he could do in the next four years.

We NEED two Republicans to do the right thing and vote in favor of his impeachment!

But this vote is risky, and they'd be bucking their party.

_So we need a massive swell of grassroots support to show them we 've got their back._
[**_Add your name before 11:59 p.m. to demand Congress IMPEACH Donald Trump >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60222?t=6&akid=22931%2E4449941%2EiXI_KY)
[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60222?t=7&akid=22931%2E4449941%2EiXI_KY)

Thanks,

# [Trump Defies Judge: IIlegally, Dangerously Goes Forward With Mass Deportation ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=159228562&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MjI4NTYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDIyNDY0MDQsImV4cCI6MTc0NDgzODQwNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AUQTg19zziLXSuW5EQ2uUUjTUS1zdQ-n4QMYuuPvkfw)
### There's treasure for the taking, for any hard-working man Who will make his home in the American Land - Bruce Springsteen

## _Blue Letter Main Story: Hearts Of Darkness_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2c33ae0d-a793-485f-b477-6b37b213629c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### _Cliff 's Note: Cruel "King" Trump Descends Deeper Into Fascist Abyss _
Donald Trump's never exactly been a fan of the rule of law. You know, the whole _checks and balances_ thing? It's as relevant to him as real hair. Or Tiffany.
But even by his authoritarian-curious standards, _this is next-level terrifying_ : his administration--excuse me, his wannabe fascist regime--**just continued** **deporting people** **even after a federal judge explicitly said,**_**hey, don 't do that**._ Because in Trump's America, court orders are _suggestions_ --like tax law or marriage vows.
This is straight out of the playbook of every tinpot tyrant he idolizes. Court says no? _Ignore it._ Constitution says you can't do it? _Pretend it doesn 't exist._ It is part & parcel to the MAGA dream of turning the U.S. government into totalitarian Disney, where only laws matter that Trump deems useful--like making sure he never faces consequences, or ensuring McDonald's serves hamberders til the moment it closes.
#### **The Enablers**
Let's not pretend it's just Trump going rogue. He's got **plenty of ass smoochers**. At this moment _HIS_ Justice Department is arguing the judge's order wasn't "enforceable" because it was "oral." So the next time a judge reads a sentence out loud in court, it's...just a suggestion? Then, there are his elected suck-ups, like Bronze-Age creep, Chuck Grassley, who makes dirt seem young.
The spry 147-yr old had this to say about the judge's decision:
_" Another day, another judge unilaterally deciding policy for the whole country. This time to benefit foreign gang members...If the Supreme Court or Congress doesn't fix, we're headed towards a constitutional crisis."_
Let me help you out, Chuck. I know because you put in time babysitting Stonewall Jackson you think you have a say in this. But, _**Judge 's make decisions all the time "unilaterally"**_ you dunderheaded, dips*t, or should we overturn all criminal court decisions? Also, Methuselah, **there 's no proof** these are foreign gang members. We're supposed to just believe you, a guy who tried to help Trump coup and has been in DC so long he voted against a Martin Luther King, Jr. holiday. Yes, that's actually true. Oh, and finally, YOU'RE THE ONE BRINGING ON A CONSTITUTIONAL CRISIS!
**MAGA MOOKS**
Trump's entire movement is built on lawlessness, cruelty and a dictator fantasy. The same Republicans who scream _law and order_ go mute when their cult leader's the one wiping his ketchup-stained little fingers all over our Constitution. **So what does he do to up the ante now? Does he deport the judge issuing the order?**
The reason these knuck-scraping pinheads are so angry is that, surprisingly, the courts have been doing an incredible job constraining Trump, including Reagan, Bush I & II and even Trump nominees. But they're not an impenetrable safeguard anymore. Even if a judge does the right thing, our enforcement mechanism is mostly...the executive branch. Our Founders figured Congress would remove an out-of-control executive. Our Founders clearly never envisioned a man with power who resembles the bookkeeper in _The Untouchables,_ in appearance and valor, Squeaker Mike Johnson.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1305a620-618d-45c9-950c-a08eb30fd95f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This isn't a Trump problem. It's a _democracy_ problem. **He 's long made it clear he thinks laws don't apply to him.** The question is, what now? What does this judge do in response, **and what are we willing to do**? Or, the next time a judge tries to rein him in, what stops him from..refusing again? **Ignoring every legal check** on his power**?**
We've seen this movie before--history books are littered with strongmen who started "bending" the law and ended in genocidal infamy. So, yeah, corporate-media assholes, maybe cover some of this? The rest of us? _**We 'd better be ready to hit the streets. Because if Trump's acting like court orders don't matter less than 60 days in, start being creative in your head about where this may be headed if we don't put a stop to it.**_
**Blue Amp is reader supported. WE NEED YOU --we're proudly billionaire-free. To support our work & access special features, please become a paid subscriber!**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.iu6M-ah-a-ugQk23DfqqfaVwJ9EIurnDKo6TIpZzNRQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=159228562)
* * *
#### _**... OTHER STORIES WE'RE WATCHING**_
* The anger at Democratic Senate Leader Chuck Schumer is still palpable. He just postponed numerous book-tour events. _Here 's the thing:_ No matter what side you're on re the Continuing Resolution, _**there is**_****_**no debate over**_****_**how he did it**. To say you won't budge & capitulate 12 hrs later is failure_. It's why we mock Trump: _Threaten a tariff, immediately cave._ This made Dems look weak. And in the meantime, House members in tough districts took an unnecessary vote they now have to defend.
**I 've long thought it's time for a new generation of leadership.** This cemented it. It's not just Schumer. Dick Durbin running Judiciary for Dems, while there were non-stop Supreme Court scandals and not constantly calling for a massive investigation--_**loudly!**_ --was another failure that's hard to comprehend. It's well past time for new blood in the Senate. Unleash Chris Murphy.

* Fully endorsed. We can ask for it back if/when we've earned it. Put it near Nice, for now, which has vibrant French, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Corsican, North African & West African populations and a bevy of local dialects:

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d91a1cc-e4ea-4bcd-bac4-001722a67e14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Elon Musk 's Daily Stoopid.** Remember, they told us he was a real-life Tony Stark. Unlike his claim below, Musk's hurt many by encouraging Nazis & firing govt workers for no reason & no authority to do so. But God forbid the EQ-challenged, Apartheid-baby who still sees an incel in the mirror ever accept accountability.
Nobody has committed violence against him. We all hate him because he's shown himself to be one of the bigger d*cks in the history of the world. A guy who took other people's ideas, lived off government subsidies, whines when he's insulted, but claims to be against government spending and for free speech. Uh huh.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/96bec267-d98f-46a2-89e6-ce4b90dbb55a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

* Feels like time for a quick kitty break! Here's Torchie deciding he's had enough of the world today. And, honestly, who can blame him?

---|---|---
* * *
#### _**... VIDEO ON DEMAND, PAID SUBSCRIPTIONS & SCHEDULING!**_
In case you somehow forgot what a cruel and evil doofus JD Vance is, we got ya covered. Here's Emmy-Award Winner and new-ish contributor, David Shuster _**(and don 't forget to look below for an early glance at our forthcoming content plan/schedule!)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/45fc402b-58ea-4f55-89ef-4f0e811e3ce2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **We dropped our paid subscriber price to $50 per year/$5 per month.** These significant savings make Blue Amp cheaper than most Paid Substacks, provide you with a deal with think you deserve while sustaining our publication
* **We have put together a tentative content schedule.** This is not to say there won't be breaking news, and can't be changes--there will be as we evolve and adapt to what you prefer. But we're looking at this schedule as of today:
* **Monday -** Blue Letter **(Free)**
* **Wednesday -** Emmy Award Winning Anchor David Shuster Video On Key Topics of the week - Cliff Schecter Humor Column; NY Times Pitchbot entry & More Being Developed **(Paid)**
* **Thursday -** Live Stream With One Big Substacker, One Celebrity **(Free if Viewed Live, Paid if Viewed Later)**
* **Friday -** Blue Letter **(Free)** , 1 hour Chat Session With Subscribers **(Paid)** , TBD based on schedules, but we'll start it next week
* **Saturday** \- Guest column by Thought Leader/Celebrity, NY Times Pitchbot (**Paid Subscriber Instant Access. Un-Paid Must Wait Until Monday When In Blue Letter)**

* **PAID-ONLY FEATURES:** Wednesday Content. Friday Q&A. Group Chats in general are reserved for paid subscribers. Archived livestreams. Saturday column when released. Ability to sign up for a first-come-first-serve quarterly zoom. You will be listed alphabetically throughout the month in our _**Thank You Section**_ added to our Blue Letters. Some questions in the Live Chat will be chosen to be publicly answered each week in Monday's & Friday's Blue Letters
* **FOUNDER FEATURES:** Everything you get for being a paid subscriber, but also: Top of the list for zoom sessions. A yearly meet-up somewhere convenient for all. Thanked in every Blue Letter Thank You Section. The ability to contribute a column once per year. Private chats with only Founding Members (TBD).
We have plenty of free content _**-- but PAID SUBSCRIBERS allow us to do all this. **_**20 more paid subscribers, we grow our messaging outreach about the monopoly- state billionaires controlling Trump --& reach another 50,000 people! 12 new paid subscribers, we add a part-time-Trump tracker to get **_**you**_**what he 's doing **_**when**_**he does it. We can only do this** _**WITH YOU.**_****
_**Thank you for considering a paid subscription! The Blue Letter will be back this Friday!**_

The spry 147-yr old had this to say about the judge's decision: " Another day, another judge unilaterally deciding policy for the whole country. This time to benefit foreign gang members...If the Supreme Court or Congress doesn't fix, we're headed towards a constitutional crisis." Let me help you out, Chuck. I know because you put in time babysitting Stonewall Jackson you think you have a say in this. But, Judge 's make decisions all the time "unilaterally" you dunderheaded, dipst, or should we overturn all criminal court decisions? Also, Methuselah, there 's no proof these are foreign gang members. We're supposed to just believe you, a guy who tried to help Trump coup and has been in DC so long he voted against a Martin Luther King, Jr. holiday. Yes, that's actually true. Oh, and finally, YOU'RE THE ONE BRINGING ON A CONSTITUTIONAL CRISIS! MAGA MOOKS Trump's entire movement is built on lawlessness, cruelty and a dictator fantasy. The same Republicans who scream law and order go mute when their cult leader's the one wiping his ketchup-stained little fingers all over our Constitution. So what does he do to up the ante now? Does he deport the judge issuing the order? The reason these knuck-scraping pinheads are so angry is that, surprisingly, the courts have been doing an incredible job constraining Trump, including Reagan, Bush I & II and even Trump nominees. But they're not an impenetrable safeguard anymore. Even if a judge does the right thing, our enforcement mechanism is mostly...the executive branch. Our Founders figured Congress would remove an out-of-control executive. Our Founders clearly never envisioned a man with power who resembles the bookkeeper in The Untouchables, in appearance and valor, Squeaker Mike Johnson. | | ---|---|--- This isn't a Trump problem. It's a democracy problem. He 's long made it clear he thinks laws don't apply to him. The question is, what now? What does this judge do in response, and what are we willing to do? Or, the next time a judge tries to rein him in, what stops him from..refusing again? Ignoring every legal check on his power? We've seen this movie before--history books are littered with strongmen who started "bending" the law and ended in genocidal infamy. So, yeah, corporate-media assholes, maybe cover some of this? The rest of us? We 'd better be ready to hit the streets. Because if Trump's acting like court orders don't matter less than 60 days in, start being creative in your head about where this may be headed if we don't put a stop to it. Blue Amp is reader supported. WE NEED YOU --we're proudly billionaire-free. To support our work & access special features, please become a paid subscriber! ... OTHER STORIES WE'RE WATCHING The anger at Democratic Senate Leader Chuck Schumer is still palpable. He just postponed numerous book-tour events. Here 's the thing: No matter what side you're on re the Continuing Resolution, there isno debate overhow he did it. To say you won't budge & capitulate 12 hrs later is failure. It's why we mock Trump: Threaten a tariff, immediately cave. This made Dems look weak. And in the meantime, House members in tough districts took an unnecessary vote they now have to defend. I 've long thought it's time for a new generation of leadership. This cemented it. It's not just Schumer. Dick Durbin running Judiciary for Dems, while there were non-stop Supreme Court scandals and not constantly calling for a massive investigation--loudly! --was another failure that's hard to comprehend. It's well past time for new blood in the Senate. Unleash Chris Murphy. Fully endorsed. We can ask for it back if/when we've earned it. Put it near Nice, for now, which has vibrant French, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Corsican, North African & West African populations and a bevy of local dialects: | | ---|---|--- Elon Musk 's Daily Stoopid. Remember, they told us he was a real-life Tony Stark. Unlike his claim below, Musk's hurt many by encouraging Nazis & firing govt workers for no reason & no authority to do so. But God forbid the EQ-challenged, Apartheid-baby who still sees an incel in the mirror ever accept accountability. Nobody has committed violence against him. We all hate him because he's shown himself to be one of the bigger dcks in the history of the world. A guy who took other people's ideas, lived off government subsidies, whines when he's insulted, but claims to be against government spending and for free speech. Uh huh. | | ---|---|--- Blue Amp is reader supported. WE NEED YOU --we're proudly billionaire-free! To support our work & access special features, please become a paid subscriber! Feels like time for a quick kitty break! Here's Torchie deciding he's had enough of the world today. And, honestly, who can blame him? | | ---|---|--- ... VIDEO ON DEMAND, PAID SUBSCRIPTIONS & SCHEDULING! In case you somehow forgot what a cruel and evil doofus JD Vance is, we got ya covered. Here's Emmy-Award Winner and new-ish contributor, David Shuster (and don 't forget to look below for an early glance at our forthcoming content plan/schedule!) We dropped our paid subscriber price to $50 per year/$5 per month. These significant savings make Blue Amp cheaper than most Paid Substacks, provide you with a deal with think you deserve while sustaining our publication We have put together a tentative content schedule. This is not to say there won't be breaking news, and can't be changes--there will be as we evolve and adapt to what you prefer. But we're looking at this schedule as of today: Monday - Blue Letter (Free) Wednesday - Emmy Award Winning Anchor David Shuster Video On Key Topics of the week - Cliff Schecter Humor Column; NY Times Pitchbot entry & More Being Developed (Paid) Thursday - Live Stream With One Big Substacker, One Celebrity (Free if Viewed Live, Paid if Viewed Later) Friday - Blue Letter (Free) , 1 hour Chat Session With Subscribers (Paid) , TBD based on schedules, but we'll start it next week Saturday \- Guest column by Thought Leader/Celebrity, NY Times Pitchbot (Paid Subscriber Instant Access. Un-Paid Must Wait Until Monday When In Blue Letter) PAID-ONLY FEATURES: Wednesday Content. Friday Q&A. Group Chats in general are reserved for paid subscribers. Archived livestreams. Saturday column when released. Ability to sign up for a first-come-first-serve quarterly zoom. You will be listed alphabetically throughout the month in our Thank You Section added to our Blue Letters. Some questions in the Live Chat will be chosen to be publicly answered each week in Monday's & Friday's Blue Letters FOUNDER FEATURES: Everything you get for being a paid subscriber, but also: Top of the list for zoom sessions. A yearly meet-up somewhere convenient for all. Thanked in every Blue Letter Thank You Section. The ability to contribute a column once per year. Private chats with only Founding Members (TBD). We have plenty of free content -- but PAID SUBSCRIBERS allow us to do all this. 20 more paid subscribers, we grow our messaging outreach about the monopoly- state billionaires controlling Trump --& reach another 50,000 people! 12 new paid subscribers, we add a part-time-Trump tracker to get youwhat he 's doing whenhe does it. We can only do this WITH YOU. Thank you for considering a paid subscription! The Blue Letter will be back this Friday! You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

**TWO:** Local elections like this one will be critical in shaping the agenda for communities across the Peach State and fighting back against the Trump administration at the local level.
**THREE:** That’s why we set a final $10,000 fundraising goal to ensure we have the resources we need to boost voter turnout ahead of tomorrow.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgvCzkHPAwDMYfAy2VZAT15a89hovOweKT77S2YaOTr-CK-Qo5fBvspX_FVdAs1TSCfDvjvkMKznSmj5Ptrc-W0i-PYZkjpss5eYAON-zpEbB21uoLh8gpNFbMDK57sS037iNGUaLaHu8l08NBbg889e)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgv9nL1UNS_reryMzE6UKokA4mbxOnPPpGrFs9G5YX0t6abiSCgthMTtJv4RcURgfJmupiLflv82fGLM8UN0BWK65Am2eBoq3ibbcmjyVbZgIoCLOh7vE9uxeF4X1KOXRON88nfuOJtswv4K3OD5RYKx)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgt6V3-Q1jgz08faI8HfA43yiu2etMjXs0yhJD0gl513HvQcF0y25Zaax9p2MmAYWZRI_B6soAJoz2EngTAQuGLw3VRPsR8lHmd505gbzlKnIZnrTJrq0EKGLUO5WAcgy6uAkNdLtfQcUwPn00nsbzbb) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgusFqGMNOfE6TJ51fvhHL2B0PDuGFPW0896RO8TDFeamxMgeYqZdv2j13PBqL0oSf-uLJ4kZqq2J8pdcpMcf36QE66oINMPr0V2Tp4WjjRE8BlZ8YJDIDhAKtKOlXw6MU3DYzeeKnKTZr6T2X8D3_IA)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgtrl2ZCgGGLPbK3EdNe7GyPtHSBZHHA6W_TQ92XywmgCypwBAavSsCJPanb_V5m6skD3FQy9q7_tL_edsBkvbCIGZWPIRm4RdNyIP-LENT2h2GLeXnWnJ7O4r5fah-HbwBTIXPAp-LfXP0RFQcTZrIO)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgta4j3T0bX_tD4QS_5IQiZaSuzd3Jo4ZAW9PPyWq-Rp23rAtwqnrYhJ1OnZnk3VuCDk7lU9hYo85H0EjBAJEuv1HN2HrefH6o2iRZthbGRkfrjhI1j7aIeemRVotwgKrHfGmqzj-ZBGjB3VmfQPMw9t)

---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2717c76d10d4f7bb708df6b7ff68944&_e=FsXnO9KwYP7334etc94mZ_uRZHtJL09hDrcTBRakrkvurtkTNbq-DBasgFMSSw3gw7Vq0HJecZkOXpHmLkcafS7BKHDZzsvsYKA6G5BWDTiP8qlplLW8QNgUIK7t1bhI0pGg0GdF7I-J7avRWi1POnDdybFjSCQdNLbf8YbDnoCBCzDSpUJEbV-X0NTlMSMq8DhjETk_6_7Xt-v9LyuSHdAmznuvDe_dSQmF_msiZgvUNpJGLzm453oIkfc6CdPe_IkP--lfOqL55-3Jw2FzjzBQ49rrLW_E6vVMONtQahD3_CPLXL-YRQ24VbqYSbILfCZNL-w5aPJv4TYcUanch5yc7i_4tv14QcQhvx_BDSGg7S-Gb8JcWVyXkIL_yvn4)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

clean_body: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and 9 other Democratic Senators voted
like cowards and refused to stand up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk last
Friday. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250317?refcode=em20250317-36509&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36509_1203867_47k_Vr&akid=36509%2E1203867%2E47k_Vr ]If you think do-nothing Democrats like them should be

recruitment fund now →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250317?refcode=em20250317-36509&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36509_1203867_47k_Vr&akid=36509%2E1203867%2E47k_Vr ]Tweet by Gabrien Gregory: By voting for the CR, these 10 Democrats
voted yes for the Trump/Musk agenda instead of putting up ANY fight at all
for working people screwed by this administration. They must all be
primaried. Durbin, King, Schatz, Schumer, Cortez Masto, Hassan, Fetterman,
Peters, Gillibrand, Shaheen

Instead of using the leverage they have (as Republicans have done time and
again when in the minority to stop progressive legislation) these
Democrats threw working families under the bus and voted to advance
Republicans’ disastrous funding bill without any consequences for or
limitations to Trump and Musk’s power grabs.

This isn’t what an opposition party looks like, and the American people
are sick and tired of it. Democratic voters across the political spectrum
are united in anger over this, while progressive groups are leading the
call for the Party to clean house, with Politico highlighting our
opposition.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250317?refcode=em20250317-36509&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36509_1203867_47k_Vr&akid=36509%2E1203867%2E47k_Vr ]Politico: ‘Uniting anger’: Democrats fume over Schumer’s handling of
funding fight. The longtime New York senator faces a precarious moment.

As Sludge pointed out, the Democratic establishment including Schumer, the
DSCC, and DSCC Chair Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand have been fundraising off of
resisting Trump and Musk’s government takeover while refusing to take real
action to stop it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250317?refcode=em20250317-36509&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36509_1203867_47k_Vr&akid=36509%2E1203867%2E47k_Vr ]Sludge: Senate Dems Vote to Hand Trump the Keys After Months of
Fundraising Off Resistance

We need REAL leaders in Congress who will fight for working people and
treat this threat to our democracy with the urgency and boldness it
deserves.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250317?refcode=em20250317-36509&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36509_1203867_47k_Vr&akid=36509%2E1203867%2E47k_Vr ]Justice Democrats is actively recruiting progressive, working-class
candidates to run in 2026 and replace the do-nothing, corporate
establishment: fuel our work with a grassroots donation today — every
dollar makes a difference.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250317?refcode=em20250317-36509&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36509_1203867_47k_Vr&akid=36509%2E1203867%2E47k_Vr ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

# ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON SB 95 (HALL) AND SB 619 (SPARKS)
|
---
SB 95 by Senator Bob Hall would require that healthcare providers obtain full informed consent prior to administering a vaccine to a child, including information about the risks and vaccine excipients. The bill would also create a civil penalty for providers who violate this law.

SB 619 by Senator Kevin Sparks protects the right of conscience of healthcare providers to decline to participate in any procedure or care that violates their fundamental values and beliefs.

These bills are being heard in the Senate Committee on Health and Human Services on Tuesday, March 18.
**TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE SENATE COMMITTEE ON HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES TO SUPPORT SB 95 AND SB 619!** **1 \- Email the Committee Members:**
|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov;bob.hall@senate.texas.gov;kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov;borris.miles@senate.texas.gov;molly.cook@senate.texas.gov;lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov;charles.perry@senate.texas.gov;cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov;kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov?subject=VOTE%20YES%20ON%20SB%2095%20AND%20SB%20619&body=Dear%20Senator%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20support%20SB%2095%20and%20SB%20619%2C%20which%20are%20being%20heard%20in%20Health%20and%20Human%20Services%20on%20Tuesday%2C%20March%2018.%0A%0AInformed%20consent%20is%20a%20basic%20human%20right%2C%20and%20full%20informed%20consent%20should%20be%20provided%20to%20parents%20and%20healthcare%20providers%20before%20participating%20in%20any%20medical%20procedure.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---
_Our new easier Action Alert process will populate with a sample message. You are welcome to use it as is by signing your name or feel free to include your own personal experience in your email to the committee __regarding why informed consent is important to you.
If this button does not work on your device, _you are welcome to copy and paste all of the emails below in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email with the provided sample message to all committee members at once:__ _[bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov](mailto:bryan.hughes@senate.texas.gov), [bob.hall@senate.texas.gov](mailto:bob.hall@senate.texas.gov), [kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov](mailto:kelly.hancock@senate.texas.gov), [borris.miles@senate.texas.gov](mailto:borris.miles@senate.texas.gov), [molly.cook@senate.texas.gov](mailto:molly.cook@senate.texas.gov), [lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov](mailto:lois.kolkhorst@senate.texas.gov), [charles.perry@senate.texas.gov](mailto:charles.perry@senate.texas.gov), [cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov](mailto:cesar.blanco@senate.texas.gov), [kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_ **SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:**

Dear Senator,

I am writing to you today to ask you to please support SB 95 and SB 619, which are being heard in Health and Human Services on Tuesday, March 18.

Informed consent is a basic human right, and full informed consent should be provided to parents and healthcare providers before participating in any medical procedure.

Thank you,
[YOUR NAME]

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032068/534045711/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ZDNkMmMtN2IwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-zNOhK0IusLxa8DB_ApYB7sLN7sIbV3GF7mjEWBjiaI=&emci=24008369-6c03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1a9d3d2c-7b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Yes, we’re fighting back!
But to win back the House, Senate, White House, and Supreme Court, we need a plan and have to start right now.
We’re doing our part but need your help.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate to end lifetime appointments to the Supreme Court and enact 18-term limits.
If we don’t act now, the radical right-wing majority on SCOTUS will control the court for decades to come.
That’s Project 2025’s plan!
What’s ours?
We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates in the midterms who pledge to support the TERM Act. We need the majority in Congress. We need to tap into public opinion, which is overwhelmingly support.
Will you help?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032070/534045713/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ZDNkMmMtN2IwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-zNOhK0IusLxa8DB_ApYB7sLN7sIbV3GF7mjEWBjiaI=)
Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito have been able to wreak havoc on the rule of law because there are no consequences, ethics codes, or guardrails.
**[>>>If you’re mad and want to start fighting back, it begins here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032072/534045715/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ZDNkMmMtN2IwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-zNOhK0IusLxa8DB_ApYB7sLN7sIbV3GF7mjEWBjiaI=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032074/534045717/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ZDNkMmMtN2IwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-zNOhK0IusLxa8DB_ApYB7sLN7sIbV3GF7mjEWBjiaI=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032076/534045719/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ZDNkMmMtN2IwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-zNOhK0IusLxa8DB_ApYB7sLN7sIbV3GF7mjEWBjiaI=)

Chicks On The Right kick us off this week for this very festive St. Patrick's Day episode. In a new NBC poll, 44% of Americans think the country is finally headed in the right direction, up nearly 20 points from November just before the election. In the same poll, Democrats have hit a literal all-time low, only 27% of registered voters have a favorable view of Democrats overall. Chuck Schumer is on the Democratic chopping block after he voted with Republicans to pass the stop-gap funding bill and avert a government shutdown. The Democrats brought their knives out after the vote, some hoping AOC will primary him in the next election. President Trump took definitive action against Houthi rebels that have been causing chaos in the Suez Canal, Red Sea and the Gulf of Aden. Showing peace through strength, the president also tweeted that in cooperation with Iraqi and Kurdish governments, a wanted ISIS leader was killed by intrepid warfighters. Was President Biden aware of the 11th hour pardons he approved of? The Heritage Foundation has released images showing that Biden used an autopen on some of his most egregious pardons including of his entire family, General Millie, Anthony Fauci and the J6 committee. Even President Trump has declared them VOID as they were signed on his behalf without his knowledge or consent.
Featuring:
Chicks On The Right
Mock | Miriam Weaver
Daisy | Amy Jo Clark
https://chicksonright.com/

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Donald Trump is attacking free speech at every opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032188/534045988/623074613?refcode=jtk1396-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk5ZDNkMmMtN2IwMy1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6Arfo7xMjIZaedJZFXLeGOovcj5ex6YaaSNXSQ_1vPk=&emci=75f4a150-4a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=199d3d2c-7b03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9329426)
---
The overt and brazen way that Donald Trump is attacking free speech and the First Amendment rights of all Americans is absolutely unlike anything our nation has ever seen, friend.
He has been retaliating against news organizations that don't conform to his political narratives – revoking the Associated Press' access to events and press briefings and suing CBS News over an interview they did with Kamala Harris during the election.
He and his co-president Elon Musk are pushing Congressional Republicans to remove federal judges who are blocking this administration's unconstitutional and illegal efforts to dismantle our government – attempting to intimidate other judges out of following suit.
He has declared anything related to diversity, equality, and equity "illegal and immoral." His executive orders have removed references to great Americans who served our nation with honor from being acknowledged on government websites or noted in national cemeteries. He and his co-president Elon Musk are literally white-washing our history.
And now, he is targeting law firms – one that investigated whether the Trump campaign conspired with Russia to influence the 2016 election, and another that supported the special counsel who pursued two separate indictments against Trump.
**Each and every one of these actions is an attack on free speech and accountability. Many of them are flat-out _against the law_. And _all_ of them are meant to send a clear message to America: If you act against Donald Trump's wishes, you will be hunted, you will be erased, and you will be punished.**
The freedom to speak truth to power is the foundation of our democratic republic. Without it, we are not Americans. It begs the question: Is that exactly what Trump wants?

After all, this is the same man who told his supporters on the campaign trail that they wouldn't ever have to vote again if he won a second term in the White House. This is the same man who has demonstrated a dangerous pattern of cozying up to corrupt, oppressive foreign leaders like Vladimir Putin. This is the same man who vowed to be a dictator on day one of his second term.
Friend, I refuse to sit idly by and let Donald Trump erode the freedom of speech that has defined this nation since its inception – the freedom that truly makes America great. I refuse to let him rule our country like one of the dictators he idolizes so much. I refuse to be silenced. I refuse to be intimidated.
You have my word, today and always, that I will continue to do everything in my power to fight this administration's crusade against free speech. I will never give up. Thank you for supporting this effort.
Sincerely,

Dick

clean_body: | | | The overt and brazen way that Donald Trump is attacking free speech and the First Amendment rights of all Americans is absolutely unlike anything our nation has ever seen, friend. He has been retaliating against news organizations that don't conform to his political narratives – revoking the Associated Press' access to events and press briefings and suing CBS News over an interview they did with Kamala Harris during the election. He and his co-president Elon Musk are pushing Congressional Republicans to remove federal judges who are blocking this administration's unconstitutional and illegal efforts to dismantle our government – attempting to intimidate other judges out of following suit. He has declared anything related to diversity, equality, and equity "illegal and immoral." His executive orders have removed references to great Americans who served our nation with honor from being acknowledged on government websites or noted in national cemeteries. He and his co-president Elon Musk are literally white-washing our history. And now, he is targeting law firms – one that investigated whether the Trump campaign conspired with Russia to influence the 2016 election, and another that supported the special counsel who pursued two separate indictments against Trump. Each and every one of these actions is an attack on free speech and accountability. Many of them are flat-out against the law. And all of them are meant to send a clear message to America: If you act against Donald Trump's wishes, you will be hunted, you will be erased, and you will be punished. The freedom to speak truth to power is the foundation of our democratic republic. Without it, we are not Americans. It begs the question: Is that exactly what Trump wants? After all, this is the same man who told his supporters on the campaign trail that they wouldn't ever have to vote again if he won a second term in the White House. This is the same man who has demonstrated a dangerous pattern of cozying up to corrupt, oppressive foreign leaders like Vladimir Putin. This is the same man who vowed to be a dictator on day one of his second term. Friend, I refuse to sit idly by and let Donald Trump erode the freedom of speech that has defined this nation since its inception – the freedom that truly makes America great. I refuse to let him rule our country like one of the dictators he idolizes so much. I refuse to be silenced. I refuse to be intimidated. You have my word, today and always, that I will continue to do everything in my power to fight this administration's crusade against free speech. I will never give up. Thank you for supporting this effort. Sincerely, Dick | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 1111 Summer Street Suite 301 Stamford, CT 06905 United States

name: California Democratic Party
subject: Join us to save Medicaid! Help us make calls in these districts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
Democrats,
The future of Medicaid is at stake and we need your voice.
Fifteen million Californians rely on Medicaid for health care, but the Republican budget would take it away. Becoming uninsured would have the biggest impact on the most vulnerable Americans, including low-income seniors, children, veterans, people with serious disabilities, and people who take care of their children or elderly parents. Republicans are doing this so they can give more big tax breaks to billionaires, wealthy CEOs, and the biggest companies.
That is why the California Democratic Party, our labor allies, and grassroots groups across the state are mobilizing to make urgent calls to fight the dangerous attacks that House Republicans have made against our healthcare. We need you to join us!
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/FightforourHealth.png]
Make calls into CA - 22! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/761667/]
Make calls into CA - 40! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/761662/]
Make calls into CA - 41! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/761659/]
We’re calling into battleground districts that represent our frontline defense against Medicaid cuts. Each call you make helps us protect healthcare for those who need it most.
In solidarity,
CADEM

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan’s latest witch hunt—this time, it’s Woke AI
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Gas is expensive. Groceries are through the roof. Medicaid is on the chopping block. Our veterans are losing access to care.
And what is Jim Jordan doing?
Investigating whether artificial intelligence is too woke.
I’m serious, you can’t make this up.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250317_woke_ai_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250317_woke_ai_image]
Jim Jordan just subpoenaed 16 of the biggest tech companies—including Apple, Amazon, and Microsoft— demanding they hand over five years of records in an insane attempt to prove that AI is secretly biased against conservatives. Notice how he isn’t going after Elon’s X and their AI tool, Grok!
Instead of working to lower costs for struggling families, improve healthcare, or do literally anything useful, he’s on another ridiculous crusade to fight the imaginary “woke mind virus.”
Because that’s all Jim Jordan knows how to do—grandstand, whine, and waste your taxpayer dollars on partisan nonsense.
I don’t know about you, but I think Congress should be spending its time solving real problems, not cooking up more right-wing conspiracy theories. If you agree, contribute today to help me send Jim Jordan packing. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250317_woke_ai_link1]
Ohioans—and Americans across the country—are working harder than ever just to stay afloat.
But instead of working to pass legislation that would bring down the cost of housing, gas, and groceries, Jordan is using your money to fund yet another witch hunt.
And to make things worse he’s done this before.
Remember when he wasted millions of dollars on “investigating” Trump’s indictments?
Or when he tried to impeach Biden over...well, nothing?
Now, instead of tackling inflation or fighting for better wages, he’s pretending that AI is the real problem. It’s pathetic. But then again, he is Job Killer Jim, so we shouldn’t expect anything else, right?
ULTRA-MAGA extremists like Jim Jordan love to scream about “woke madness,” but the truth is, they are the ones living in a deranged fantasy world.
While the rest of us are out here trying to make ends meet, they’re pushing bizarre conspiracies about libraries, drag queens, M&Ms, and now artificial intelligence.
They claim to stand for “real Americans,” but they’re too busy fighting fake culture wars to actually help the people they represent.
It’s projection, plain and simple. Jim Jordan isn’t fighting for you—he’s fighting to stay on Fox News.
I’m running for Congress because I believe in getting things done. Unlike Jim Jordan, I don’t need to be handed praise for doing my job—I just believe that if you put your trust in me, I owe you results.
That means fighting for families, defending healthcare, and making sure Congress serves you, not MAGA extremists chasing conspiracy theories.
If you want a Congress that actually works for you, pitch in today to help me take this fight straight to Jim Jordan. [https://placeholder]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

Tamie Wilson For US
273 Saratoga St
Delaware, OH 43015
United States

name: A.G. Holder Alert
subject: WE are the ones responsible for protecting our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The power of the people is how we win
|
---

Hi Peter:
A.G. Holder is sounding the alarm on what’s at stake this year:
[**“The work we put in during the weeks and months ahead could make a _massive difference in fair representation._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104032571/534046818/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAlert_email_20250317-AOTL-Tier1-AGAlert_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250317-AOTL-Tier1-AGAlert_&utm_campaign=AGAlert&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwOWQzZDJjLTdiMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2vOolB8_9wXnPVYh8vorewjWKK6-QuzuD980mCWe2x0=) We must not wait, we must not waver — the stakes are simply too high.” — Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General
---
**He’s always the first to remind us that there is no cavalry coming — WE are the ones responsible for protecting our democracy.**
So as we face attacks on so many fronts — anti-voter legislation that could jeopardize fair maps in Arizona, court cases that could affect whether voters are fairly represented in Louisiana, politicized attempts to tamper with the 2030 census — the work we do now is essential to our democracy.
**We know this will be a tough fight. But the ones that matter most always are.**
[**We’re counting on your support today. Make a donation to All On The Line right away to help power the movement for fair maps in the critical months ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104032572/534046819/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAlert_email_20250317-AOTL-Tier1-AGAlert_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250317-AOTL-Tier1-AGAlert_&utm_campaign=AGAlert&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwOWQzZDJjLTdiMDMtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2vOolB8_9wXnPVYh8vorewjWKK6-QuzuD980mCWe2x0=)

clean_body: The power of the people is how we win | Hi Peter: A.G. Holder is sounding the alarm on what’s at stake this year: = We must not wait, we must not waver — the stakes are simply too high.” — Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General He’s always the first to remind us that there is no cavalry coming — WE are the ones responsible for protecting our democracy. So as we face attacks on so many fronts — anti-voter legislation that could jeopardize fair maps in Arizona, court cases that could affect whether voters are fairly represented in Louisiana, politicized attempts to tamper with the 2030 census — the work we do now is essential to our democracy. We know this will be a tough fight. But the ones that matter most always are. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Elon Musk is bankrolling Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign because they know Wisconsin’s highest court can stop their lawless coup. Brad Schimel would be a rubber-stamp for Musk and Trump’s assault on constitutional checks and balances, giving themselves sole power to enrich the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of us.
**This is a watershed moment in this election.** A MAGA Supreme Court in Wisconsin could reverse our progress on fair state legislative maps and lock in power for far-right legislators, giving them the power to overturn elections when they don’t like the results.
**Brad Schimel has cut shady deals for campaign cash his entire career, but now he’s cut the biggest and shadiest deal of his political life.** With only 13 days until Election Day, WisDems needs your support right now to make sure voters learn about the stakes, reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, and elect Judge Susan Crawford.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: The Trump administration is targeting people’s right to peacefully protest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In times like these, it’s more important than ever to know the law and understand your rights.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250317-4859-footer&t=1&akid=4859%2E420207%2E1j0myI)
Peter,
**The Trump administration is targeting people’s right to peacefully protest.**
In times like these, it’s more important than _ever_ to know the law and understand your rights if you choose to speak up and make your voice heard.
To help make sure members of this grassroots movement are ready, **Pramila is hosting a series of nonviolent resistance trainings, both in-person and virtual, in the near future.**
These trainings are critical, but they’re also expensive — between clipboards, paper, pens, snacks, and venues, the costs rack up quickly. And we’re hoping supporters like you can help us continue to make them happen.
[**If you’re with us in the fight to protect our rights and our democracy from the Trump administration’s crackdowns, can you pitch in $3 to support Pramila’s work for the progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250317?refcode=em20250317-4859&amount=3&refcode2=4859_420207_1j0myI&akid=4859%2E420207%2E1j0myI)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250317?amount=3&refcode=em20250317-4859&refcode2=4859_420207_1j0myI&akid=4859%2E420207%2E1j0myI)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250317-4859-footer&t=2&refcode2=4859_420207_1j0myI&akid=4859%2E420207%2E1j0myI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4859%2E420207%2E1j0myI)

name: Senator Dick Anderson
subject: Joint Ways and Means is Headed on the Road
body:
| | | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fbulletins%2F3d7535e/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/ZPB5Rf0f1m4ZTAYQiFuBObfZlrWrcwCOUTucvRI3Sak=396 "View Online")
---|---
---
As your state senator, I’m committed to ensuring our district’s needs are heard as Oregon shapes its 2025-2027 biennial budget. I’m excited to share that the Joint Committee on Ways and Means, which oversees the state’s budget process, is hitting the road for six community budget hearings—and I’ll be there to listen to you. These hearings are your chance to tell us what matters most—whether it’s funding for schools, roads, health care, or other priorities. With limited resources and some uncertainty from federal actions, your input will help guide tough decisions ahead. For the first time in decades, one hearing will even take place on tribal lands in Warm Springs, a historic step toward inclusivity. Here’s where and when you can join:
* **Gresham | Saturday, March 22 (10:00am – 12:00pm)**
Mt. Hood Community College, College Theater
26000 S.E. Stark Street, Gresham, OR 97030
* [Members of the public can register to testify here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FCommittees%2FJWM%2F2025-03-22-10-00%2FAgenda/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/nvTIeUqbsdLXqrpA6q0gSwZiZlzE2TewC7yhmsAdPz4=396)
* **Astoria | Friday, March 28 (5:00pm – 7:00pm)**
Liberty Theatre Astoria
1203 Commercial Street, Astoria, OR 97103
* [Members of the public can register to testify here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FCommittees%2FJWM%2F2025-03-28-17-00%2FAgenda/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/uzu90x-Sq-OwTu445TaTiKMKKDhDTz0Jrvb-vp4C6O4=396)
* **Warm Springs | Friday, April 4 (5:00pm – 7:00pm)**
Old Warm Springs Elementary School
1112 Wasco Street, Warm Springs, OR 97761
* [Members of the public can register to testify here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FCommittees%2FJWM%2F2025-04-04-17-00%2FAgenda/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/ZthYpXHpIUu1tJX4JZLKJPSg0APy5_j1JnMIjmTFWxE=396)
* **La Grande | Friday, April 11 (5:00pm – 7:00pm)**
Eastern Oregon University, Hoke Union Building #339
1 University Boulevard, La Grande, OR 97850
* [Members of the public can register to testify here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FCommittees%2FJWM%2F2025-04-11-17-00%2FAgenda/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/PtNiXgF54Eb1Lmd09svoxVML_LD2JFigLmHnzrxYHNQ=396)
* **Salem, Statewide Virtual Testimony Prioritized | Wednesday, April 16 (5:00pm – 7:00pm)**
Oregon State Capitol Building, Hearing Room F
900 Court St NE, Salem, OR 97301
* [Members of the public can register to testify here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FCommittees%2FJWM%2F2025-04-16-17-00%2FAgenda/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/bmZRWepmvBOCu28Y45OtGx7VQsYUZkzTw6csAfssqws=396)
* **Klamath Falls | Friday, April 25 (5:00pm – 7:00pm)**
Klamath Community College, Building 4 Commons
7390 South 6th Street, Klamath Falls, OR 97603
* [Members of the public can register to testify here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FCommittees%2FJWM%2F2025-04-25-17-00%2FAgenda/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/Agm1RGZo7GCgHRCTig1WATIU9QGMzEvRiE0jlh3qtmw=396)

Want to share your thoughts? Sign up to testify at the hearing nearest you—or join virtually on April 16. Registration links are available through the Oregon Legislature’s website. Can’t attend? Feel free to email me your budget priorities anytime. The budget framework will drop just before March 22, giving us a clearer picture of what’s possible. Together, we can ensure our community’s voice shapes a balanced budget that works for all Oregonians. Looking forward to hearing from you,
Dick |
* * *
---
**Capitol Phone:** 503-986-1705
**Capitol Address:** 900 Court St NE, S-311, Salem, OR, 97301
**Email:**[Sen.DickAnderson@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Sen.DickAnderson@oregonlegislature.gov)
**Website:**[http://www.oregonlegislature.gov/anderson](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fanderson/1/01010195a62fbf84-97c601ff-648a-4fa0-a71a-445b7164ac2a-000000/WLdDAKZ2js3lg3S8vaEEyUGEjrV4pjOVGgj25yUjr2s=396)
Replies to this message are sent to an unmonitored mailbox.
To contact me, please click here: [Sen.DickAnderson@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Sen.DickAnderson@oregonlegislature.gov)

name: dpwillis67@gmail.com, Nancy Pelosi
subject: New York Times just reported
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | | New York Times:
[**THE RESISTANCE TO TRUMP IS “TIRED”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104032932/534048338/1694059021?refcode=20250317_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDVkYmVkYi03NTAzLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jaM-qKfxDOutXdmzQB-yx5s2jGvxI3HRCI08CUsXPxg=)
---
Did you see this?
The New York Times just reported that our resistance to Trump’s extremism is “TIRED.”

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Sues California to Stop Counting of Ballots Received after Election Day – Lawsuit Filed on Behalf of Congressman Darrell Issa
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a federal lawsuit against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days beyond the date established by federal law.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 17, 2025
---|---|---
| [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72872&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099) | |

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a federal lawsuit against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days beyond the date established by federal law. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 17, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | “Federal law requires an Election Day – not an ‘Election Week,’” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “California’s counting of ballots that arrive a full seven days after Election Day is unlawful, encourages fraud, and undermines voter confidence in election outcomes.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) lawsuit against the New York State Department of Environmental Conservation for records about the seizure, testing and euthanizing of a squirrel named “Peanut” and a raccoon named “Fred” belonging to Pine City, New York, resident Mark Longo (Judicial Watch Inc. v Sean Mahar, Interim Commissioner, New York State Department of Environmental Conservation (No. 902596-25)). ---|--- | | | | | A federal lawsuit filed by yet another George Soros-funded group highlights how the Trump administration’s swift crackdown on wasteful government spending is enraging leftists whose coffers have long been replenished with taxpayer dollars. The case involves a tribal college in Lawrence, Kansas called Haskell Indian Nations University (HINU) with an enrollment of 901 and a long history of financial mismanagement and corruption. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in response to a Judicial Watch request and lawsuit for communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner A Georgia judge has ripped Trump critic and Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis for falsely denying having records of conversations with one-time federal Trump prosecutor Jack Smith and demanded that she turn them over. Washington Examiner Many are asking if federal judges can be impeached as a consequence of judicial activism, deciding a case based on their personal preferences rather than what is stated in the Constitution, statutes, and applicable precedent and in usurpation of legislative and executive power. The answer is yes. A series of extreme and activist decisions against President Donald Trump’s constitutional authority exercised through the Department of Government Efficiency and his appointees such as Elon Musk have brought the question to the fore. The Federalist The Washington D.C. Metropolitan Police Department is charging the conservative legal watchdog, Judicial Watch, more than $1.5 million to access bodycam footage of the Jan. 6 Capitol protests. On Tuesday, the non-profit published a press release outlining the department’s demands following a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit filed last summer. Judicial Watch filed the suit after local law enforcement refused to release the footage in August 2021. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |
